**_Less than 1%. _**

**That was my margin of victory the last time I ran for the Senate in 2018.**
And this year, it could be even closer.
I’ve made a lot of enemies in Washington on BOTH sides of the aisle by REFUSING to compromise our values.
It’s riled up patriots like you to RESCUE AMERICA - but it’s made me a top target in 2024.
Right now, I’m starting to plan our path to victory, but I need your help.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: I'm proud to stand for freedom in our public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
The GOP wants to use their playbook from 2021 to smear me.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62370350/403229739/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTIxYjk3MC04ZWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gztd-Xy-vrPOva5FrZYDN-DqARqsucxisSeUQXcqLlo=)
---
Friend,

House Republicans recently passed a bill they claimed was about "freedom" in public schools. In reality, their legislation would just open the door for books to be banned, for critical resources to be cut, for teachers to be attacked simply for teaching the real history of our country, and for students' privacy to be violated.

**I voted against this extreme bill. But after Virginia Republicans turned education into a wedge issue in 2021 to electoral success, you can be sure that I'll be facing a lot of attacks for my position. I'm going to need resources early on to counter the lies that will be thrown our way.**

**[Will you help me by donating $10 today? Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in 4 days, and we need to raise $10,000 by then. Every bit of grassroots support goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62370351/403229740/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230426EOM_EOM_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTIxYjk3MC04ZWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gztd-Xy-vrPOva5FrZYDN-DqARqsucxisSeUQXcqLlo=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62370352/403229741/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230426EOM_EOM_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTIxYjk3MC04ZWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gztd-Xy-vrPOva5FrZYDN-DqARqsucxisSeUQXcqLlo=)**

---
As the mother of two kids in public school, it's been infuriating these last couple of years to watch Republicans try to turn the classroom into a battleground for their extreme culture wars.

I believe that hard-working teachers should not be demonized. I believe that we should be more worried about gun violence in our schools than history books that Fox News have deemed "controversial." **If the GOP wants to have a debate on which party is more focused on improving public education, then bring it on.**

But I'm not taking anything for granted. The GOP will try the same playbook that helped them flip the Governor's mansion and the House of Delegates just 17 months ago.

We need the funds _now_ to flip the script. And that means hitting all of our key fundraising goals this spring.

clean_body: The GOP wants to use their playbook from 2021 to smear me. = Friend, House Republicans recently passed a bill they claimed was about "freedom" in public schools. In reality, their legislation would just open the door for books to be banned, for critical resources to be cut, for teachers to be attacked simply for teaching the real history of our country, and for students' privacy to be violated. I voted against this extreme bill. But after Virginia Republicans turned education into a wedge issue in 2021 to electoral success, you can be sure that I'll be facing a lot of attacks for my position. I'm going to need resources early on to counter the lies that will be thrown our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = As the mother of two kids in public school, it's been infuriating these last couple of years to watch Republicans try to turn the classroom into a battleground for their extreme culture wars. I believe that hard-working teachers should not be demonized. I believe that we should be more worried about gun violence in our schools than history books that Fox News have deemed "controversial." If the GOP wants to have a debate on which party is more focused on improving public education, then bring it on. But I'm not taking anything for granted. The GOP will try the same playbook that helped them flip the Governor's mansion and the House of Delegates just 17 months ago. We need the funds now to flip the script. And that means hitting all of our key fundraising goals this spring. = Thank you, Jennifer Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18939?t=1001&akid=3176%2E346206%2EUeTQVM ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230426-3176-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3176_346206_UeTQVM&akid=3176%2E346206%2EUeTQVM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3176%2E346206%2EUeTQVM

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Our Revolution
subject: 2024 is underway, and we're scaling up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Senator Kyrsten Sinema and other corporate-funded Democrats have recently made a series of arguments to try to explain why they are personally standing in the way of passing critical voting rights legislation.

Her insane intellectual gymnastics to defend the filibuster — a racist tool that has historically been used to block civil rights — continue even as Republicans openly attack the right to vote with draconian state laws.

Senator Sinema thinks she can gaslight all of us into forgetting that she is defending a filibuster that has been a tool of racism to block progress since its inception.

Peter Willis, the bottom line is this: we can’t let Senator Sinema and other corporate Democrats act as the agent of big money in politics and block the For the People Act.

The filibuster is a threat to the continuation of American democracy and our core values as a country. Can you rush a donation now to help us double down on our organizing in Arizona to expose Krysten Sinema’s unpatriotic attack on American democracy for what it truly is? name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Can we count on your $4.86 donation on the 26th of every month?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Our campaign recently announced our fundraising numbers for Q1, and the
results are incredible. Over 145,000 donations over the course of three
months.

When Adam announced his campaign for Senate, there was no telling how many
folks would come on board. Republicans like Kevin McCarthy, Jim Jordan,
and Matt Gaetz threw everything and the kitchen sink to try and smear
Adam.

But the proof is in the numbers — and the numbers show that the momentum
is on our side.

Momentum to hold Donald Trump and his acolytes accountable.

Momentum to defend democracy against insurrectionists.

Momentum to stand up for justice and the rule of law.

Momentum to take Adam’s message and leadership straight to the Senate.

And here’s how you know our movement is truly grassroots-powered: Our
average monthly donation is just $4.86.

Alone, $4.86 might not make much of a difference. But compounded over
months — and joined by supporters from Cresco and thousands of
others making the same recurring donation — it adds up to a lot.

And that’s how you win a campaign in a state as big as California.

To be very frank, all of our previous recurring donations stopped when we
jumped into the race for Senate. So as we’re ramping up this campaign,
knowing that we can count on your donation on the 26th of every month
would greatly help our campaign plan these next few months.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1894?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.ysDPGS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]We’re hoping 3 more Democrats in Cresco will respond: Will you
activate a $4.86 donation — on the 26th of every month — to take Adam’s
message to the Senate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
recurring donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1895?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.-LH98u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]DONATE $4.86 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1033?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring._EwNu2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]DONATE $10 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1034?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.6LLKWf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]DONATE $25 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1035?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.txKXl2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]DONATE $50 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1036?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.Gq4fO9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]DONATE $100 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.qwleT5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

The grassroots support we’ve received has been incredible. And we’ve only
just begun! Thank you for your support,

— Team Schiff

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_recurring.2Sjs2w&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2145%2E5257348%2Eb6cEtK ]DONATE ONCE

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

if everyone who got this email contributed, we’d smash our goal with days to go | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62381139/403264665/17860314?refcode=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI0MmExYzUtOWNlNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YObv9zvBmI4Hfvg7XvhVcUG7bvbFWZ_x941rUhtVBrs=)

Peter, In four days, our fundraising numbers for the first public filing deadline of the campaign will be locked in for everyone (including Tate Reeves) to see. With all eyes on us, we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $52,000 online before April 30. This number wasn’t pulled out of thin air – it’s exactly what we have to raise to hire staff, train volunteers, mobilize voters, and win. [But it doesn’t take much to help us reach that goal, Peter. For just $5 – the price of your coffee tomorrow morning – you can help us build a winning campaign to take on Tate Reeves. If you’re able, will you make a donation right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62381140/403264666/960250762?amount=5&refcode=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI0MmExYzUtOWNlNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YObv9zvBmI4Hfvg7XvhVcUG7bvbFWZ_x941rUhtVBrs=) | **[DONATE ☕](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62381141/403264667/960250762?amount=5&refcode=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI0MmExYzUtOWNlNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YObv9zvBmI4Hfvg7XvhVcUG7bvbFWZ_x941rUhtVBrs=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62381142/403264668/960250762?amount=5&refcode=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI0MmExYzUtOWNlNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YObv9zvBmI4Hfvg7XvhVcUG7bvbFWZ_x941rUhtVBrs=)
And with our first public filing deadline of the campaign just days away, we’ve been going through a lot of coffee at Presley HQ – we’re working around the clock to hit our $52,000 online fundraising goal before the books close at the end of the month.
We can’t afford to take our foot off the gas. Tate Reeves has a war chest stuffed with millions of dollars from his daddy and his lobbyist pals, and we need to meet our fundraising goals to keep this race competitive.
But here’s the truth: if everyone who got this email donated just $5, we’d smash our goal with days to go.
[So, Peter: Will you invest the price of a coffee into our grassroots campaign right now? When these numbers go public, let’s show Tate Reeves the strength of this grassroots team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62381143/403264669/960250762?amount=5&refcode=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4242a1c5-9ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI0MmExYzUtOWNlNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YObv9zvBmI4Hfvg7XvhVcUG7bvbFWZ_x941rUhtVBrs=)

name: Sara (personal)
subject: Reproductive rights - let’s talk about where things stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230426_em_sjj_repro [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230426_em_sjj_repro]
Friends, there has been a ton in the news lately about the fight to protect reproductive rights - and the fight to roll them back. Let’s take a minute to talk about where things stand as of now, and what we can do from here.
First, a quick rewind: More than 20 years ago, after a review of all the scientific evidence, the Food and Drug Administration approved a drug called mifepristone for medical termination of pregnancy. They determined that this drug was safe and effective.
Then, just a few weeks ago, a federal judge in Texas issued a ruling that would have halted that two-decade-old approval.
The Biden Administration immediately appealed the ruling, and the Supreme Court has granted a stay - meaning that while the appeal is litigated, access to mifepristone will not be restricted.
Right now, this critical drug remains safe, effective, and on the market. That’s good news!
Here’s the problem: Extremist Republicans have set their sights on a national abortion ban, and we know that they won’t stop until they achieve that dystopian dream.
And it’s not just dystopian for me, a pro-choice Democratic woman! The data on this issue is clear: A strong majority of Americans (61%!) [https://www.pewresearch.org/religion/fact-sheet/public-opinion-on-abortion/] believe abortion should be legal in all or most cases. Even among those who think it should be illegal in most cases, 4 in 10 [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/abortion-pill-cbs-news-poll-2023-04-16/] say mifepristone should remain legal.
Let me make a few things clear:
This fight doesn’t just stop at abortion - we know that things like IVF and contraceptives are next.
Because abortion bans aren’t about saving lives - they’re about control.
And finally, if I’ve said it once I’ve said it a thousand times - abortion is a kitchen table issue. PERIOD!
I will keep fighting for legal, safe, and accessible abortion care, but I need you by my side - and the fact of the matter is, we need to work together to take back the House in 2024 if we have any hope of codifying the right to abortion into federal law.
So please, right now, let me know that you’re in this fight with me by signing my petition to take back the House and protect reproductive rights in America. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2?contactdata=sWYlUmiN/x5ujIU5xNeKKxOc6oMvpPiVudScqeNVXMn5zEOK6VNMcrf0avqV0jtyJRhPHIZsSNxDPl/Je73bd/liEliR2PJgtbOox1OkmfCNWvLIC8Zna+UxCFtYBJqigUDnTx6HGBBHF4c/E2lMKg==]
Thank you.
-Sara
https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2?contactdata=sWYlUmiN/x5ujIU5xNeKKxOc6oMvpPiVudScqeNVXMn5zEOK6VNMcrf0avqV0jtyJRhPHIZsSNxDPl/Je73bd/liEliR2PJgtbOox1OkmfCNWvLIC8Zna+UxCFtYBJqigUDnTx6HGBBHF4c/E2lMKg== [https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2?contactdata=sWYlUmiN/x5ujIU5xNeKKxOc6oMvpPiVudScqeNVXMn5zEOK6VNMcrf0avqV0jtyJRhPHIZsSNxDPl/Je73bd/liEliR2PJgtbOox1OkmfCNWvLIC8Zna+UxCFtYBJqigUDnTx6HGBBHF4c/E2lMKg==]

clean_body: [] Friends, there has been a ton in the news lately about the fight to protect reproductive rights - and the fight to roll them back. Let’s take a minute to talk about where things stand as of now, and what we can do from here. First, a quick rewind: More than 20 years ago, after a review of all the scientific evidence, the Food and Drug Administration approved a drug called mifepristone for medical termination of pregnancy. They determined that this drug was safe and effective. Then, just a few weeks ago, a federal judge in Texas issued a ruling that would have halted that two-decade-old approval. The Biden Administration immediately appealed the ruling, and the Supreme Court has granted a stay - meaning that while the appeal is litigated, access to mifepristone will not be restricted. Right now, this critical drug remains safe, effective, and on the market. That’s good news! Here’s the problem: Extremist Republicans have set their sights on a national abortion ban, and we know that they won’t stop until they achieve that dystopian dream. And it’s not just dystopian for me, a pro-choice Democratic woman! The data on this issue is clear: A strong majority of Americans (61%!) [] believe abortion should be legal in all or most cases. Even among those who think it should be illegal in most cases, 4 in 10 [] say mifepristone should remain legal. Let me make a few things clear: This fight doesn’t just stop at abortion - we know that things like IVF and contraceptives are next. Because abortion bans aren’t about saving lives - they’re about control. And finally, if I’ve said it once I’ve said it a thousand times - abortion is a kitchen table issue. PERIOD! I will keep fighting for legal, safe, and accessible abortion care, but I need you by my side - and the fact of the matter is, we need to work together to take back the House in 2024 if we have any hope of codifying the right to abortion into federal law. So please, right now, let me know that you’re in this fight with me by signing my petition to take back the House and protect reproductive rights in America. [==] Thank you. -Sara == [==] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfvjd6m70kulod305tt43915pa3sehbl0mkk1fu0_rp22sh2s8i66o72clge9or7clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl6h2hqjhijl4n3ol2mmigdaqhssjem0utag1ttg_rp22sh2s8i66o72clge9or7clh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcj5hcofbnambr56sdau0t4srmr8uuofohuadcjg_rp22sh2s8i66o72clge9or7clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Birch Gold Group
subject: China & Russia's New "Redback" Could Nuke Your 401(k)
body:
China and Russia are making moves that could radically harm the retirement plans of millions of Americans.

| | | | **China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your IRA or 401(k) Obsolete**
---
**China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your IRA or 401(k) Obsolete**
| | |
China and Russia are making moves that could radically harm the retirement plans of millions of Americans.

They want to REPLACE the U.S. Dollar with the "Redback", their own **gold-backed reserve currency**.

Under normal circumstances, the world would reject such a currency from these two troublesome countries.

But many predict **the Redback could actually succeed**.

Why? Because of the outlandish money printing and dollar devaluation coming from Washington. Which harms other countries' currencies and leaves many leaders secretly hoping for an alternative.

_And if it does replace the USD, what would happen to our economy?_

Here are three things you should prepare for:
* Stocks in your retirement account could crash because people aren't buying anything other than **_absolute necessities_**.
* The real-world value of your IRA or 401(k) could drastically decline. So when you actually USE your money, your purchasing power may be a _**fraction of what it used to be**_.
* Corrupt D.C. lobby groups and banking companies could collude to ensure the American people pay for all of _THEIR_ losses. Some have spoken of "bail-ins" as a possible solution if things get really bad. (That means **if they can take your money,_THEY WILL_**).

The good news is there is a way to defend your savings from ALL THREE of these...
---
# **Diversify Into Something _Physical_**
**Diversify Into Something _Physical_**
| | I'm talking about gold and silver. Because there is no arguing with 5,000 years of history! Precious metals have maintained savings through economic turmoil, war, and even the fall of civilizations.

And today, diversifying into gold or silver has never been easier!

For example, with a "self-directed" physical gold IRA, your IRA or 401(k) could be transferred out of stocks and into gold without fees, penalties, and taxes!

To see how it's done, **[get Birch Gold Group's 20-page Info Kit on Gold IRAs by clicking here.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqca5lg7fntm854cbt0ihsn7qlhj5qkql506rheo_rp22sh2s8i66o72clge9or0s3h2bs)**

Inside you will discover:
* Why Gold IRAs are**surging in popularity**
* How they protect you from government greed
* The right way to set one up** _without paying taxes or penalties_**

Getting this info kit could be one of the smartest financial moves you ever make. So click the link below to get your copy now:
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Things got heated with Don Lemon
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs5bmyWDNO

Vivek 2024

Don Lemon was WRONG on this. | My exchange with Don Lemon
and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the
mainstream media.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os5bmyWDNO

Friend,

Things got a little heated on
CNN.

While debating post Civil War
history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people
still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

That's an insult to the progress
we've made over the last 160 years. His comments embody what's
wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so
without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and
CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the
mainstream media.

I spoke passionately about the
importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil
discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course,
some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

I refuse to back down, Friend. I
believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the
issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for
office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a
prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign
and fight for the values and principles that set this country
into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. Any amount
will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help
to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.

Please consider making a small
donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me
continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was
founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over
grievance.

Thank you for your support.
Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am committed to bringing
fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back
on track. But I can't do it without your support. Please chip in
$1 or more to help me continue this fight.

WATCH NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate
America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second book, Nation
of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path
Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years. His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology. My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media. I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me. I refuse to back down, Friend. I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August. In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress. Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance. Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. Please chip in $1 or more to help me continue this fight. WATCH NOW → GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: I'm excited to share this news with you!
body:
I'm Proud to Announce that I'm ready for a rematch against Scott Perry. I'm running for Congress again in 2024!
https://youtu.be/lQXcyDlej8Y [https://youtu.be/lQXcyDlej8Y]
Friend,
Let me get straight to the point. In 2022 we came closer to beating a Republican incumbent than any Democrat in Pennsylvania, and we did it without the support of the national party. Next year, the DCCC has already announced that they are targeting Scott Perry, and I am happy to announce that I am running again!
You are among the first people to hear this news, and I'm asking you to be one of my earliest supporters. Click here to donate now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/24announce]
By donating today, your support will have a significant impact on our ability to build the strong campaign that we need, and we have to defeat Scott Perry in 2024. Why is it so important to defeat Scott Perry?
Since November, nothing has changed about Scott Perry except for the worse. He still has not answered for his role in trying to overturn the 2020 election. Now, along with his Freedom Caucus cronies, he's pushing an extreme agenda in Congress. He has even advocated for cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and he is willing to hold our entire economy hostage to get his way.
Scott Perry is dangerous. We can't let him continue to serve in Congress, and we won't. I know you're with me. I know you want to defeat Scott Perry.
Today, I'm counting on you to join our team and help us jumpstart this campaign. Click here to make a contribution! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/24announce]
Thank you in advance for your support! I'm glad we're in this together.
-Shamaine
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/24announce]

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Can I trust you with something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79079%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q9vgsJS6lpsAtVCzKmJKRA&sysid=1)

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I’m entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79070%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=34aI%2bCyQ5SNXLlh58V5ojg&sysid=1)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79071%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Noh4ivE%2burXJO3o4ZgfdSQ&sysid=1)

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

You’ll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we’re counting on your quick response.

**[Please take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey IMMEDIATELY to represent your area in our critical 2024 Election strategy.>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79072%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9L%2fH%2bM9Qmvf%2bH13mUi%2fsow&sysid=1)**

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79071%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Noh4ivE%2burXJO3o4ZgfdSQ&sysid=1)

2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. We can’t afford another defeat like the one we had in 2022. The **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79070%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=34aI%2bCyQ5SNXLlh58V5ojg&sysid=1)** is our way of correcting our missteps and ensuring a GOP victory next year.

Please don’t let our Party down, friend. We’re counting on you.

**[I need you to complete the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your response is recorded.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79073%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9dGGZIQL1ENa4GMB24VZvw&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79074%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NgmFej9jXl4aTQxt3sPsmA&sysid=1)
Ted Cruz
United States Senator from Texas

subject: It’d mean the world to me to have you with me in this fight

body:

**Did you hear? I’m officially running for re-election, and Elizabeth let me send you this note to talk about this campaign.** When I ran in 2020, I set out to do three things: Restore the soul of our nation, rebuild the backbone of America — the middle class — and create a government to work _for_ us, rather than _against_ us. Together, we took our economy back from the brink. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people — all while making wealthy and corporations pay their fair share. We passed the first federal gun violence prevention legislation in 30 years. We took the strongest action on climate in the world — I’m not kidding. **We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._But we’ve got to finish the job_. And I can only do that with you behind me.** [_**So, will you chip in a few bucks — or even $10 — split between Elizabeth Warren and my re-election campaign? >
Grassroots supporters just like you helped elect Kamala, me, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. And I’m so proud of the incredible progress we’ve made together.
But every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. _I believe this is ours._
[_**So, will you stand with me and Elizabeth Warren by splitting a $10 donation between our re-election campaigns today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62387640/403283685/-173059552?amount=10&refcode=EMZ13I_TAN_S_20230427_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc0ZGE2ZC1mZGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gNYnVx1ILEcvurU0Vx4JcNWSmf2rTgV7vBskXEJ74gM=)
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
-Joe

# Thursday, April 27, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we’re covering the razor-edge House vote to raise the debt ceiling, the censuring of a Montana legislator, and the kickoff of the NFL Draft, day one. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? [Sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79uwyAQgPGngS3RcXf86cDQJVu6drSwOWIqHCwbterbV-qc-fuW3-d9uqfa6vPxkTaJo_RpP_o5AV_QX5Amq3MsIiikJRoX0IF786DXaAPhAj6nwAYkWWcCEc7ocxHkuegaEZCA0RtgT-YKxTJRQW_D4ni2ikFyHf24fvX6HKuU9tu_5bgufdMtrmPsp6J3hTeFtxfLEfP-U1urp_OK4bGl2v7DeAX5CwAA__9ErEhj) and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? [ Drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to hear more news? [Follow us on Twitter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz72K6zAQQOGnkbqY8Yx-nELFbdwlt1nY0kj2KNYiR0YWMXn7hd126wMHvs_bdPMpp-fj7jd2LZZpr-WYQF3QXpAmLRcXmZFJsuvNgAbM1YJcnblG9KQ0-3mh4Oc5WOBgIQxBoycrk0NAAoW2B2Wp7yBqRRTR6mE2KmihgJfUSu2-Snq2lWN-lxfXbi6bzG5tbT8E_RM4ChzbmVr7bQLHj5XH_P7_4nrn85DVLfuZck6HsULBY_Mp_1zaX6TvAAAA___EO0yK) and stay in touch. _A quick note to our readers: Yesterday’s edition of The Flyover suffered a few mechanical problems going down the runway, but those issues have been addressed and we are ready to fly. Prepare for takeoff!_

## Congress Raises Debt Ceiling with Spending Cuts
Republicans in Congress [narrowly approved](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSrCAQRb8GMyxsEJyA4CVm89INLZB2ZAvFgnat-fstJ9703uSc8_Wcni6muL_-uw0tLXk6Sq6TUBwMBzn1TbALIqBs0HZ6AC30w4hmtVoPUnkzeC9d5wavZFCPwcgQjFi0k020IEAKBaYTysiuFUuvpFzA9MOsle-ZEhgi5dJ-57jTikt65x8s7Zy3JtmV6KhM_mMwMhiv62oLnoSl3v-95JICg_GsDMZtnl2h9V15QE98xo8U9zElTlip8nOP9OZn5Ws-K_KCx-lTnN1e-c3Jb2XNYGyKDccVU4pVG6bEa3MxfZDorz6_AQAA__9jhmYa) raising the debt ceiling after attaching major spending cuts to the bill. The final vote was 217-215, largely on party lines, but President Biden has sworn to veto the bill, though few expect it to get through the Senate. The vote was seen as a [key test](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7uO6yAUheGnwR0W3lxdUJzGXU47pcVlEzMixjIk1rz9KKmnW9Iqfn1ft_Xmcsn7_b97oO2prsdZ28oEBU2Br3KINiEC8gHtpAwopmbNhs0qg3qOzMlkJjOHFA0kLeXMkzdJuzRkCww4E6AnJjSfRpak4DyBliYo4SURDGPu9Ry_a977hqn81BeeY6iPodit96MR_o_AQmC5rmsMvu14tfdPYHlPAstWnw3picfTlxzc3mhE32nAD4v6XAp91Y4EluG08bhyKbkpTQS7P1wun1r_i_4bAAD__86dWpI) for House Speaker Kevin McCarthy in holding the GOP together, and with four defections, he managed to do it. Though the bill has little chance of passing, McCarthy has been clear that he thinks it gives Republicans [a strong position](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQAL8Gd1h4wYALiic9ubsoXUoL48XeiDMWkJzu76NcnXqamfm4LTdPic79zd_RtZiXq-S6CMXBcJDL2G0uIgLKDt2gLWihJyO6w3lvg1yNtKOIk5201SCiniDEVWwWRUcOBEihwAxCGTn0Io5KyghmtEGrdWRK4EYtl_4z09kOjOmZv7H0Id-75I7WrsrkPwYzg9mv4cRH7ff8ixnM7zlRo1AZzEf-qsj3fPHTl5If6ckvXytWvlJKvHiqyDdcGw_4imUw15bLk8mZNib_T9baQUrTFbddD0qJqjZMif3uKb102l9vfgIAAP__rLNkZA) for further negotiations. Democrats oppose the bill because of the extensive spending cuts it requires over the next decade.
## Montana House Disciplines Trans Legislator
Montana legislators vote to [bar transgender lawmaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oiOOwz2wNAlW7p2tIg5x1QYLCCNkq-v0rnj01ue3tdlvrgQQ7p9up1tW_N8lFxnUAKNQJqH3tuVGZl6tlKPqEFPBvrNEqCXBHI00-BI4ui0QjVIgHHRevF9sAhIoNBIUIbkCdZBEa1ohnHR6jp0CtiHlsvpO4fUNl7jM_9wOS1576PdWjtqRx8dnjs8uyPxo77VG0oLS-QOz6-c-SlefGzPIlpxqd44eS5iz6m55MSW75XF_fCucRUEg7rqK_vJLaAmBFQTawIcUbIk6Iv1xyPEGKo2nYLb7kL862n_zfkNAAD__9kiYpc) Zooey Zephyr from participating on the state house floor for the rest of the 2023 session. Zephyr has refused to apologize for saying lawmakers would have ["blood on their hands"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9uhSAUgPGn0Q2D_NWBoYvb7drRoBz0NAgEaG-8T9-0c-dv-fL7eKwPiwHj8W4vMM2nNZdUVyoI04TxVfbOeAAGvAczqokpqmZN-9NsIwWhYRLgvZRqptopKdy2zeAZd6JHwyjjVDA9UqH5OFAvBeeeaTntSmyyExQctlSGz4SxneDDnb6hDHu6-mDO1nLt-FvHlo4tEZ51uO2Z0m_u2PJKCW7ygnzehVwpNhstacXGekB0UEiAA2uwLRVSIH9tAXcbicO6Yw4YgYxaTuNE9Tyc7Qp9MS4_MQSsSneCHpfF8LfS_nP5CQAA__8a0GVq) over a vote to ban transgender medical care for children. Republicans in the state house says she overstepped bounds of decorum and incited disruption. [Police arrested](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurTAQRL_GdEZmbcC3cPEad_e1KZHBy8WJwci7CcrfR6RONyONNEfn7Tk9Q8rpeP0POzpey3TWQpMyEkYJeuqb6FZEQN2g6wYLgxoeo2o2Fx6dXky0AfRsu2jnPqhojbURwFrsmuRAgVYGxk6ZUXetWnuj9Qpjb5fBzL0wCmPiUtv3kg7ecM3f5Qtru5S9yW5jPknofwK8AH9dV0tn-UDaw3EvBHjiUhOSAH8_CfDhrHfpBfizFkZirCRDrXeKMqyMVe7l4HAEuZVPQkkp47EgSRbgm-rieaWcEw2jMOq1h5R_cfgvNz8BAAD__2T3ZLQ) seven protestors supporting Zephyr earlier this week. This marks only the latest episode in a growing national culture clash over transgender issues. [North Dakota](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAQQL9GO26WXQQtKNJcd2lTOiiLkqA4iLnJ32cudco3r3nzPh7jw8UU9-XdbWxryONR8jmCEmgE0ti13gZmZGrZSt2jBj0YaFcbaJCMflYOHBL3qGSQwB31akIDpo0WAQkUGgnKkLxB6BRRQNP1s1ZT1yhgH2sut88c97pySD_5m8ttzlub7FrrcTb01uC9wbs7dn6eL_WCUuOcuMF7LW4_F949FzG5upacN7HnUlfh3VeuTvh8LWK6ynJtoiOCiQK6gbSTYQCpSBH2ELSkMGBbrD-eMaV4atMoWDYX019O_e_NbwAAAP__DP9ijg) this week passed a law restricting the use of bathrooms in spaces such as jails and college dorms by people identifying as trans. On the other side, a [Vermont school district](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2TpCAUAH8NZlj4-HICgkvM5tILLUceI1fgs4DRnX-_tRNv1EEnXf3vPt-XmOL-_LtkdC3QfBSqs1AcLAc56867gAgoO3SDGcEIc7Oi25y5WemlF9qMD-0DeDkENRohwroor1UXHQiQQoEdhLJy6EXQSsoAVo-rUQ_NlEAfG5X-P8W9bRjSm04s_Uq5S25r7ahM_mEwMZiu6-oDfe141R_PYMro48JgOrFk2huv60aUuI-1lbg2XjDTiZXnJSEP-MHxemBpb17wKORfa4sn8vquDTNPWCvttSvOH1dMKVZjmRLPvMT0SWq__fkOAAD__0mXabo) this week removed references to the gendered terms "male" and "female" in its classes on human reproduction, referring instead to "person who produces sperm" and "person who produces eggs."
## Who’ll Be the No. 1 Draft Pick?
Alabama quarterback Bryce Young remains the [[betting favorite]](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskb2O2zAMx59G3mzIlPyRwUPQQ7bremMgWVTMlrEEiWiapc9e2PNN_w-QP4Dg1-f90xHT_vjpnrhITPdcUr1r28LUgrkPTVgiIqBpcOnHGUY9XibdbAsMM0DUdp5hGLH3xlobPaxjj2EGExpaQIPRFqZe28n0nY6DNSbCNMzraP2grMZAkkr3K9EuG0Z-pz9YujU9G142kVyVuSq4Kbi9Xq-ubq7kmJJ4x-x2x-9K9ZhWcPMoQvtDwa2v0h4Yx9xmWn-3uWCgVSjtbQqhtnvkNhQX5SQbZa7_lLkK_hVlPr42JwoG0JndG8tpX8R8Go-nVGRcBYOCH0cezpKemenojt2SvPPEJO8zK5gP_eit1gounYJLU5aQDzDVcVJWP56O-LxcvnvD_wAAAP__jfKC6A) to go first in the NFL Draft, which begins today in [Kansas City](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu6zAMAL_G3hTIIi06g4a3ZMtbOxqsRCZqFcuw1Qb--yKdOx5uOODervOVc8nL7T8_JDSt87rVfbZoHBkH89inoCJOoJcw-Ml5689k-3uwHpXPxDbJ5FNSQo1uQk5AoAP6PgdnHVh0NFgkGE5WRwRQR-MUPb6PHVpJudXt9FHz0u6i5ajfsp1iffQl3Ftb9w7-de7SuQuvizz3l3rB1nIs0rnLosWkjbWZo34tN_PJy867ibkdRkA5TTQAk_qBQCN7HUdJCTTi2fdbSOszl5J3Tx3a24Nz-Y23v078BAAA__-n3V2K). The Carolina Panthers have the No. 1 pick and they say they've [made their choice](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQBp8GOp-W9R8ULtJcd2lTosXevXPiA2SsnPL2EalTfvo0Gmk-bvONcsnr_Z2eHJps8163Ywaj0CvUs-1TEGZk3XMY3IgO3OShf4QoaXBgrfNkwU7TEgktLqLRRDHO9TkgoAaDfgDj9XABsUZrQW_H6MxiOwOcctvq5XPLa3uwlJ_tm-slbs--hEdr-9Hptw6vHV5pX_l1nNc5asuxcIfXnU6wHkpyPZrac_xSqxSVKklTI2qPXkAzISO4NA4ykXBiSURx6WtI-yuXkg_nOwP3J-Xyp2__tfgNAAD__xUyXjM), though they're not saying what it is. Kentucky's Will Levis is the second choice among betters to go first , following a tip on Reddit that had him suddenly [soaring in the odds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQRb8Gd1jjAYxTuNiGLttuaREYEhJiLCCJ8vcrXv2qGeleHR3df-ftbGOK-_WvfdLaQt6OkusGkqPmKDY1-DUQIYmB1mlecIb5pGG4reAWCeiEvCzOSfJhsjIoeSJUBMrKIa4IKECinkBqMY0QlBQioFaLm-VFMQnkY8tlvOe4txuF9M1vKqPLzyGtt9aOysQfhoah-Xw-o8uvEqnwe36V3abeY2hqy-Xb75FLqwyNyynRlRiaB-3t5R497S4MDcj-zx0YU-KJ3rHy7D3fQ-K-2ND4Ed2D12wLt6FR4YW8j40fuTaGRsOkBKoJQDM0Q1n90UmxzppJuD5t_PEa2m9j_g8AAP__N0pzPw). The draft runs through seven rounds, ending April 29, with teams trading, negotiating and choosing in [this pre-selected order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO2yAURp8Gb9fCFzD24KELW7p2tBy4JLQYLCCx8vaVM__z0dH36fy5rbctxJAev7edlubzepRcVy4BNaBYVecWT4QkOlqGccKRj7Pm3XOxfOBSzWQ90n1WeprtqPkk7rN0yFF3YUGOgkvUA5daDD33SgrhUavJjvKumOTkQsul_5tDak_y8ZPfVHqb9y4uz9aOysQvhoahOc-zp3qkCzI0yUeGxpXNt2uFoaktlw9DszI0wTE0Qk04obqYf8UIyUf4CpCLowKXB1uMgGqGI9h_FSq9KUHJr-QqbN5C8hYabXvtyuKOM8QY6qiZ5I99C_F7tP1U7X8AAAD__ynYagk) through the week.
➤ **The Florida Legislature** is poised to make it easier for Ron DeSantis to run for president by amending current state law so DeSantis won't have to resign as governor even if he becomes a presidential candidate. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvpCAURn8Ndhi8IowFxTZ2s-2WBuGid8OAAeaZ-fcvvvp1X85pvpx_z_VpKVLa_9oXmhbyepZcVyE5aA7jOnXeBETAsUMzqAcooWYtusNgUJP3s5yHyT20F7NG7Z3QoNRmByU6MiBgFBL0IKQeh16ESY5jAD09nJLbxKRATy2X_n-m1A4M8ZO_sPQuv7pojtbOysY_DBYGy3VdvdtqwqvensFyTwaLx2pTo8pDzIW85bXZhrzg-d4iOZsqb-XDW-busGm_TaU93aC8E4_24iBA8vPmHlMjG_lGnsHSFePPi2KkqjSTYn9Zij_v2m-pvgMAAP__cp5rhg)) ➤ **Tech billionaire Peter Thiel** , a Republican mega-donor, says he won't fund any candidates in the 2024 elections. He wants the party to focus on business growth rather than cultural issues, and says he is sitting this one out. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuxCAURL8Gd1js5eHdgiKNu02b0uJxWRNhsADHyt9HTtqUM9PMOR_P5Wliivn1bjbUPZRlr6UtTFCYKPBFDl4HREA-oL6pOyimHhMbVo3OSTSeG8mtsIEFRG8eXCplH0JYP0QNDDgTMN2YmPhtZEEKzgNM8u6UsJIIhj72UsfPEnNfMaTv8oV1dGUbkl573xvhbwRmAvN5nmPFo2Nt1341pSZPYD4agXnHjpX2NWKiFffDpuhMphu-jC-5VHqW3Gk4sqfOZB-96dgoMBC0laO6v8DpBa4IzEPVfj9jSrGpiQj22kxMv8f6f5Z-AgAA__8AIWjN)) ➤ **Priorities USA** , a top Democratic Party super-PAC announces plans to launch a six-state ad blitz for Biden this week in key battleground states. The group aims to raise $75 million to support Democrats in 2024. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJzc0rHO3CAMB_CnIZsjYwiQIUOlT9m-rh0jCHBHS0KU0EbXp6-4qUOfoJ4s_X-SZdnfPpdPm3LaH1_tFqYay3Kc5VpQAmkgsQydn2IIFEQXJq4MKVSjxu45OWekWbUmE7UNTntS0g0ozLB6F7Xs0kRIAiVpjlIL3mMcpBCR9GDWZpnE4FMtZ_-9pL0-Q8yv8iuc_Vq2Lk_PWo-LiS-MZkbzfd_9UXKqaS0NMJr3cF-M5jaF0Yyy9YrR7MMG188jnHDYFVzyYQfrweVUfwMijsIQMTHvu90CEx9Hti9Xyg9Gak-eiQ9sxWUErqQCb0wEy9cIQ5TKaedb3PD5tw4QOSrwfhRgvY4QR9Sj1LylTee3VgIFN__zbt05-eNOOadLaSbxsdmU3zet_3qwPwEAAP__tCK6WA)) ➤ **The NRA sues** in Washington state to block the state's new assault weapons ban, calling it "blatantly unconstitutional." Washington is now the 10th state to ban certain types of semi-automatic rifles. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGupCAUQL9GO8wVEJyCYhu72XZLwwgoG7wYuC47f_8yr371SU5Ozp_n-rQxRdx_29MbCnm9Sq4rSMY142KdemeC99yL3ptRzVyBemjoD-PgMc52hk0ASDfN2k1BaaEcBHDgdB8NBy5Acj2C1GIcIExSiMD1NG9KvqZOgneRchn-5oh0-JDe-Z8vw5bPPpmD6Kqd-NXxpeNLa20I-T_6Vj-848uVU6S41Y4vWCyrt6_M-TNvxRLbPyLMhTVbj4g7ZWSVLPnK0Df2SpYsUnqzG7eMlSLdFDPaxPYb2ctiX4y7WkwpVqU7CftpY_ouo582fQUAAP__KKxsTQ))
➤ **Deion Sanders** , new coach of the Colorado Buffalos, has replaced all but 16 of his returning scholarship players through the new NCAA transfer portal. More than 70 percent of CU's returning scholarship allotment has departed, a historic number. Sanders says he needed to "clean out the old furniture." ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuOpDAQheGnMVkhY3MNCDYh6003RMYuN96pdiHbDNNvP2LiyX_pOzr_HuvDBArx-de8cC6e1yNxXmULagCl165ys0dUqCucm35UveynQVb7rM02jJMcNTrpu3a0rtGumYxr1DSOHVZhVlJp2aqhke2gm_rOtPZq6Ebbt1snWokuFE71fw6x7OjpzZ-Yasuviua9lCML_UeoRajluq7abjkfnEq-C6EWy0T4RPDMZTNEQi0RryzU4jBwhGyiw5Qhm3cGy8TJOIbdOCgMltBE4LNA2RGYHPgzxVDOhBAiXOYDgT2UZGL2mOCGDQF-sTtvokqzO65AFHI_iFY-XybQz_Ty24_fAQAA__-2CncW)) ➤ **Red Sox pitcher** Richard Bleier calls out "completely inappropriate" behavior by Baltimore Oriole fans, who he says spit on Sox relievers and sprayed beer on them during their three-game series this week. Today we’re covering the razor-edge House vote to raise the debt ceiling, the censuring of a Montana legislator, and the kickoff of the NFL Draft, day one. | | | | | | Thursday, April 27, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the razor-edge House vote to raise the debt ceiling, the censuring of a Montana legislator, and the kickoff of the NFL Draft, day one. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to hear more news? and stay in touch. A quick note to our readers: Yesterday’s edition of The Flyover suffered a few mechanical problems going down the runway, but those issues have been addressed and we are ready to fly. Prepare for takeoff! | Congress Raises Debt Ceiling with Spending Cuts Republicans in Congress raising the debt ceiling after attaching major spending cuts to the bill. The final vote was 217-215, largely on party lines, but President Biden has sworn to veto the bill, though few expect it to get through the Senate. The vote was seen as a for House Speaker Kevin McCarthy in holding the GOP together, and with four defections, he managed to do it. Though the bill has little chance of passing, McCarthy has been clear that he thinks it gives Republicans for further negotiations. Democrats oppose the bill because of the extensive spending cuts it requires over the next decade. Montana House Disciplines Trans Legislator Montana legislators vote to Zooey Zephyr from participating on the state house floor for the rest of the 2023 session. Zephyr has refused to apologize for saying lawmakers would have over a vote to ban transgender medical care for children. Republicans in the state house says she overstepped bounds of decorum and incited disruption. seven protestors supporting Zephyr earlier this week. This marks only the latest episode in a growing national culture clash over transgender issues. this week passed a law restricting the use of bathrooms in spaces such as jails and college dorms by people identifying as trans. On the other side, a this week removed references to the gendered terms "male" and "female" in its classes on human reproduction, referring instead to "person who produces sperm" and "person who produces eggs." Who’ll Be the No. 1 Draft Pick? Alabama quarterback Bryce Young remains the [[betting favorite]]() to go first in the NFL Draft, which begins today in . The Carolina Panthers have the No. 1 pick and they say they've , though they're not saying what it is. Kentucky's Will Levis is the second choice among betters to go first , following a tip on Reddit that had him suddenly . The draft runs through seven rounds, ending April 29, with teams trading, negotiating and choosing in through the week. ➤ The Florida Legislature is poised to make it easier for Ron DeSantis to run for president by amending current state law so DeSantis won't have to resign as governor even if he becomes a presidential candidate. () ➤ Tech billionaire Peter Thiel , a Republican mega-donor, says he won't fund any candidates in the 2024 elections. He wants the party to focus on business growth rather than cultural issues, and says he is sitting this one out. () ➤ Priorities USA , a top Democratic Party super-PAC announces plans to launch a six-state ad blitz for Biden this week in key battleground states. The group aims to raise $75 million to support Democrats in 2024. () ➤ The NRA sues in Washington state to block the state's new assault weapons ban, calling it "blatantly unconstitutional." Washington is now the 10th state to ban certain types of semi-automatic rifles. () ➤ Deion Sanders , new coach of the Colorado Buffalos, has replaced all but 16 of his returning scholarship players through the new NCAA transfer portal. More than 70 percent of CU's returning scholarship allotment has departed, a historic number. Sanders says he needed to "clean out the old furniture." As your Attorney General, **[_I fought hard for our coal industry_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/8e2e76ee1e289398/4f855968150f04a9c3d6b838967d376c/40933) **when the Left tried to impose their woke agenda into our state retirement system. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Districts for Democracy Records First Big Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
Hi there,

I'm writing to let you know that Districts for Democracy just recorded its first big win. With your help, the three candidates we supported in the April 25th school board election in Westfield, NJ, won an overwhelming victory, after promising to stand against book bans and culture war politics.

We're delighted to congratulate Kent Diamond, Brendan Galligan, and Charles “C.J.” Gelinas [https://www.tapinto.net/towns/westfield/articles/westfield-school-board-2023-election-results-2-budget-questions-3-elected] on their victory, and to see that when the choice is made clear, New Jerseyans will stand up for the freedom to learn and the freedom to teach.

Westfield is not a town where MAGA-style politics resonates with most voters. Yet it has seen its share of challenges to books and curriculum from the far right. And in what is usually a low turnout April election, the result might have been very different had we not mobilized to inform voters about the importance of this race and where the candidates stood.

Thanks in part to our effort, turnout for yesterday’s Westfield election [https://newjerseyglobe.com/campaigns/17-vote-separate-candidates-for-westfield-school-board/] was actually the highest in the state this year! The lesson is that talking to our neighbors helps create a more informed, connected, and engaged community. And when people know who is running, and what’s at stake, they show up and vote.

We're convinced that we can achieve similar results in other communities where the extreme right's censorship message has made greater inroads, but it will take hard work. Most of New Jersey's school board elections will be this November, and we're gearing up -- identifying key districts across the state where a collaborative effort can make a difference, and forging local partnerships.

We're counting on your continued help to get the message out that our kids and schools need elected officials and board members who trust our educators and are committed to working with, not in opposition to, our teachers, librarians, and administrators.
Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/districts-for-democracy-email] DONATE ONCE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/districts-for-democracy-email]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/districts-for-democracy-email?recurring=true] DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/districts-for-democracy-email?recurring=true]

Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001
United States

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

I took the debate straight to Don Lemon, and now he's FIRED.

| **[Don Lemon FIRED from CNN.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62b9360892834781b71385abd98bb232&_e=bInV8vvTOOwpsO1hjKmmWDi1HgtHD2X8NjpHsZFbigMpmf9CyM1wnpHk-lNCkl-DltAdUQ9AxEATmJ6JhKGmnDYKOI1K4t5VMG6KRXCcm0hIpF8Tn9eFv37SFqGh4R8tEu_gq5o2F4xsbKrHd8z1jjoj8tHuQ9IR1McN2IGv6QYeJoUPd8s4xJJp2exaX_xm7M4ic89m4IJTS2HmFM_i1KILu3t3FOZD6ocY3ZTb0Asn2qeGTEjvx786oqQYWPQDHZqr5zWFrsjYmw4hqZDf4nVicEDXlOQIQVwYOufoA9afwNpUrZT1oQi84QwKSoPDsXqZdBUeiPn1Fv4GRwZZ-MIF8H-WmtC8KvBDtcr7yER6I9od_wf-cjo1gl-Lv2Uokwc7KJ1edLJm5Lw9u8DgqmL-JUE8w5t3tUfmvi48xkc%3D)**

> _**FIRST:**_ I had to teach Don Lemon a history lesson when it comes to the Second Amendment and the rights of black citizens.
>
> _**THEN:**_ Don Lemon told me I couldn't speak the truth because I am not a black American. _**I reject that.**_
>
> _**NOW:**_ Don Lemon is OUT at CNN.
Fellow American, I am not afraid to bring the debate to anyone who is willing to talk about the important issues, but I won't back down.

I am committed to bringing fresh, radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support.

**[In the next 30 minutes, will you chip in $1 or more to make sure we can continue to take the debate to the Left?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62b9360892834781b71385abd98bb232&_e=bInV8vvTOOwpsO1hjKmmWDi1HgtHD2X8NjpHsZFbigMpmf9CyM1wnpHk-lNCkl-DltAdUQ9AxEATmJ6JhKGmnDYKOI1K4t5VMG6KRXCcm0hIpF8Tn9eFv37SFqGh4R8tEu_gq5o2F4xsbKrHd8z1jjoj8tHuQ9IR1McN2IGv6QYeJoUPd8s4xJJp2exaX_xm7M4ic89m4IJTS2HmFM_i1KILu3t3FOZD6ocY3ZTb0Asn2qeGTEjvx786oqQYWPQDRNGWG8hfwX_7TxkJxjvv0haMbxY12xc8dypyksv6wmP6YCq3ZXRh5cW6czOFyY0rt74gLMQ8BLpTW6Duki58klpMV4WBd3DjfBBTQrsK2Kz2NAv8kmoiBivbmK2XIkrcysPiGYivW4YKNhvx0GqjX2Hfnab-RDSMOArv5-nf0LY%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I took the debate straight to Don Lemon, and now he's FIRED. | FIRST: I had to teach Don Lemon a history lesson when it comes to the Second Amendment and the rights of black citizens. THEN: Don Lemon told me I couldn't speak the truth because I am not a black American. I reject that. NOW: Don Lemon is OUT at CNN. Fellow American, I am not afraid to bring the debate to anyone who is willing to talk about the important issues, but I won't back down. I am committed to bringing fresh, radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. Thanks, Vivek | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It’s true: Most pundits WERE wrong about Adam Frisch’s 2022 chances against Lauren Boebert!
body:
Great 2024 pickup opportunity
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77b5a994-03aa-4404-b8ad-813a69e0a080/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Katy Frisch was wrong about one thing in a recent email she sent out, but that thing wasn't Lauren Boebert. _Frisch, wife of 2022 congressional candidate Adam Frisch, sent out an email claiming all political analysts were wrong in 2022 for giving her husband no chance vs Lauren Boebert. _** _From her email:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4db91859-1cc3-4cee-ba92-afab8c7c6470/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[_With respect to Katy Frisch---who's mostly right, as political prediction is one more realm mainstream media dove into and screwed up--she forgot Blue Amp Action. We told you from the beginning that Frisch could beat Boebert, and laid out our reasoning._](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf245fb5b-8e59-4a4c-952c-0860579d2e73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Pure analytics:_**_ Boebert's the same doltish, cruel traitor as Marjorie Taylor Greene--yet, Greene's in a +22 Republican district in a red state where Republicans suppress votes. Boebert's is only +7, she underperformed in her 202 race and lives in blue Colorado, where state government doesn't provide an assist with voter suppression._ **_Our gut: _**_Adam Frisch was a good candidate, served in local city council, is a good speaker and was a hard worker and fundraiser. _ **_Blue Amp got in early, raised money for Frisch, and kept on going. I'm proud our community played such an important role_** \--_but as they say, there's no prize for 2nd place_. **_Boebert--to speak plainly--has gotten Americans killed by attacking COVID vaccines, boosting our gun culture--including her infamous "Shooter's Grill" where servers had to be armed--and support for an abortion ban._** _I could go on._ **_Katy Frisch rightly said they only lost due to a late surge of corporate cash to save Boebert._** [**_Please join us in ensuring Boebert's late cash is wasted cash, this time, by sending $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can ___Right Now__ _ so Frisch can finish the job!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5952f6f1-3642-49a0-8059-b43ad4c437c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to clean up and take back Congress._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86ad0cd2-ca4d-4d97-b968-3d8fbc8a545b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Michael Whatley, Republican Chairman
subject: Your immediate help is needed to protect our children's education, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The future of our children's education is at stake.

| Dear Peter, Are you tired of seeing our children's education HIJACKED by woke politicians pushing extreme and harmful ideologies? **[Do you want to put a stop to the indoctrination of our children in public schools?](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9WlXpsKM3RPkr_vOIzXsu3nZYw7LHcXG9FZwR_aH9azZKvWM75pLQyg6uvbXFqmKaSk8rKjSIsthRnbk8WP_LCtMpSaWF3wiNjOffqoMEjLiMJIfmPI3zTtzsmFudB64X2koIZU88ITLrLTN6WFJ8L5P1QS3M9EBkNMtOQnWi5iQMG_lr-hRtqgj0Sog59E8SYrPqhHLbrwq9YO9G3szVUcMfBQPavcEzaDErot_TVnlsVr5ggF-61IVUDzYJ6U8cfpmaNAhxSU5JnGZ74W6Dwoc4cxRORU2f65cKCaJv76LIlrY-lCXiYt17vYRX7gq40YtDMiA4_dvoFiUoIFtDclD6r728HcGbLFxfHJmThooNYryeaTTK6Uvr3lquvAORCJTc1ZtDnC_qXUEVariB4JBrAoITw6SjVYObe9G9Lt17jVGPcj3uldiYk0T858PC&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230426_hd_parents_bill_38_78&n=1)** The Parents' Bill of Rights is the solution, and we need your help to make it a reality. The Parents' Bill of Rights is the solution, and we need your help to make it a reality. We need to elect a strong Republican governor who will stand up for our values and protect our children's education. But unfortunately, we are running ouf of time to raise the funds we need to get our message out. With your donation, we can run ads and organize events to raise awareness about the Parents' Bill of Rights and elect a governor who will support it. Your contribution will make a significant impact, and we cannot do this without you. | | | | | | The future of our children's education is at stake. If we don't act now, the liberals will continue to brainwash our children and turn them into political pawns. We need to put an end to this now, and we can only do it with your support. | | ---|--- | | Thank you for your support in this critical time. Sincerely, Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

### LANDOWNERS' LAWSUIT AGAINST PIPELINE REVIVED

The years-long legal battle over the Mountain Valley Pipeline's ability to seize private land gained new life Monday from the U.S. Supreme Court, which revived a lawsuit filed by property owners.
The lawsuit brought by six landowners in three Virginia counties has been sent back for a trial.

### Dr. White Named Virginia Superintendent of the Year
---
Roanoke City Public Schools Superintendent, Dr. Verletta White, has been named Virginia's Superintendent of the Year! This announcement was made at the Virginia Association of School Superintendents (VASS) Annual Awards Luncheon in Roanoke on Monday.
Dr. White has been with RCPS since she joined in 2020. She was recognized for her leadership in addressing the post-Pandemic challenges facing students.

Join our office tonight at 5:30 pm at a newly determined location, the Dumas Center (108 Henry St NW, Roanoke, VA 24016) on Thursday, April 27th to discuss the Legislative Session and how the bills passed will impact our community. Light refreshments will be provided. | == | == | | == | == | LANDOWNERS' LAWSUIT AGAINST PIPELINE REVIVED The years-long legal battle over the Mountain Valley Pipeline's ability to seize private land gained new life Monday from the U.S. Supreme Court, which revived a lawsuit filed by property owners. The lawsuit brought by six landowners in three Virginia counties has been sent back for a trial. | | | | | == Canvass with Team Sam! Join us Saturdays to canvass to re-elect Sam Rasoul! Rasoul - May 13 Please join Delegate Sam Rasoul on Saturday, May 13th from 2-4 pm in Wasena Park for Sam's Spring Social, a volunteer appreciation event to celebrate the Democratic community of Roanoke! There will be food, and games as we come together for a fun Saturday outing. name: Clarence Thomas Thrown off a Cliff
subject: The hateful Democrat Party has always wanted to destroy Clarence Thomas.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | The hateful Democrat Party has always wanted to destroy Clarence Thomas.
**If they could, they 'd hurl him off a cliff and never look back.**
