name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh080f7cffi3elqc0b7t85iltpr76m4f3bru3o9o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zapspherbrvtkjveeufohnah0hff784000t7fclg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkdua0cl3o136k8cph8p9jnp6dehcvhtantp7148_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zetcgjfufkgf2j8i9vkg3qatupt5ss3g7l6e7id8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuov01tso3g6abj3nas8us5866ore11007rtbq78_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn1s3s5bmurov2bjp95she7o0gm4364s6siernm8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfmdf9mls3344frp6lvh3uqv3b6nnfgpchi0ebig_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3li9hj1ek4746u5544jm10udjdgdjv1ntjiv4v0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0ij0tsr4p5n0d2hsiltprb65jiuuct05v5h8jm0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ipns14t8u2c4j5orsatm4s661vbuectvsaeol8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlnqgaa0p0anfup8981m9es6f0ojk4cmknm1st48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60p72cjhmcoh1k8gn48n24hhm1oj3chh68ob6c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9vdbd4tu4bjffco4saa588shjod293bcdvl6kp8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5a3ch656imguii0atbjtvirsk3sqvts9mmmpoa0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi64p31cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: BOMBSHELL Supreme Court Updates via House GOP
subject: Neil Gorsuch AMBUSHED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Radical Left is throwing everything it has to DESTROY our Supreme Court Majority.

| |

---
| | | **FIRST:** It was Justice Clarence Thomas and Justice Neil Gorsuch
**THEN:** It was Chief Justice John Roberts.
**NEXT:** **???**
One thing is clear friend: The Radical Left is going to do **EVERYTHING** they can to **DESTROY** our Supreme Court Majority **FOREVER**.

These smear campaigns led by the Liberal Media against Clarence Thomas and Neil Gorsuch are **RIDICULOUS**.

Toss in Senator Durbin's request for Chief Justice John Roberts to step away from the important business of the Supreme Court to testify on these baseless claims and you've got yourself a situation ripe for **INSANITY**.

**Even worse - who knows who the Radical Left will come after NEXT???**

If we lose our Supreme Court Majority, we will lose all of the hard-fought victories we have won to keep America the free country we all deserve. The future of America will be DESTROYED if we don't do everything we can to save our Supreme Court Majority.

**We 've got (1) action item for you to help combat the latest smear campaigns from the Radical Left:** Add your name below right here, right now, to **DEFEND** our Supreme Court Majority.
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND OUR SUPREME COURT MAJORITY >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemh1214kjk548dvqfnr7qtmk9dq99n848uvuogo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi6cp71cph2bs "button")
---
The Radical Left is counting on your silence. Prove them WRONG, friend.

Add your name and take a stand with Justices Thomas, Roberts, and Gorsuch. Today, it is conservative Supreme Court Justices. Tomorrow, it could very well be you, friend.

We'll be looking for your name by midnight tonight - don't delay.

---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND OUR SUPREME COURT MAJORITY >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5tr4luav9f5e0gcs0loq9gl94u1p75s3cta44r8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi6cp71cph2bs "button")
---
Thanks,
House GOP

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Is it too much to ask?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Is it too much to ask that they have some journalistic integrity and ask the Left hard-hitting questions about such an important issue? |
---
Fellow American,

This will surprise NO ONE - but the mainstream media is in the bag for Democrats and folks on the Left.

Case in point - I was recently on CNN to talk about my support of the Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Bill I introduced in the US Senate - _this is how things went:_

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744905:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)
| [**WATCH NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744905:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)
---

This interview made me question the rhetoric CNN and the other mainstream media outlets use when they're talking to Democrats about abortion. They are covering for the Left's barbaric and extreme views on abortion.

**_Is it too much to ask for the media to have some journalistic integrity and ask the Left hard-hitting questions about such an important issue?_**

Is it too much to ask that the media question the limits, or lack thereof, of the Democrats' abortion agenda?

Is it too much to ask that Democrats and their supporters in the media note where 70% of Americans fall on this issue - which is on the side of life?

The media refuses to report the facts. As we gear up for 2024, I worry our message will be buried in their rhetoric, and we'll have NO shot at **Securing the Senate.**

The facts are simple. 70% of Americans support my bill to limit abortion at 15 weeks, when the unborn child can feel pain. 47 out of 50 European nations limit abortion at 15 weeks or less.

This is a HUMAN RIGHTS issue and the Left's position is barbaric, indefensible, and out of line with the rest of the civilized world.

We are going to have to get creative to ensure our message breaks through the mainstream media - and that might include pushing back sometimes.

I think the Republican party will be in good standing to oppose late-term abortion, like most of the world. But with the mainstream media acting as the unofficial spokespeople for the Left's agenda, we have to work twice as hard to be heard. [**Can you help us cut through their noise and get our conservative message out by chipping in $10, $25, $50, or more today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744905:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)

If the mainstream media is going to lay cover for the Democrats' dangerous and unpopular abortion agenda, they will do it for every other issue as well! [**Will you help Republicans get our message out and make a contribution today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744905:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744905:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)

Lindsey Graham

[**Donate Today -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744905:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744906:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)
For text updates from Team Graham, **[click this link to subscribe!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744906:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744907:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744907:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61744908:sRy7uWD3N:m:1:877327319:1F11D1F5928C6D4BE6F354BD29FD9419:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRy7uWD3N).

Hi there – Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and American Bridge PAC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62386536/403279973/-1748614100?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2530-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNGU5NDJkLWZjZTQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3dFQVgzS0cVdWwf5tD0QH3t15U9MnvJLhunLwcJ93os=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now.

Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy.

As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.
So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,****The Hill****has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. **

So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.

We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking
**[Can you split a donation of $15 or more between my reelection campaign and American Bridge PAC? It’d mean the world to us to have your support on Day One. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62386537/403279975/-1748614100?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2530-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNGU5NDJkLWZjZTQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3dFQVgzS0cVdWwf5tD0QH3t15U9MnvJLhunLwcJ93os=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Morning=20in=20Nevada=20PAC?=
subject: Speaker announcement! Governor Ron DeSantis is coming to the Basque Fry
body:
Get your tickets now for the 8th Annual Basque Fry on June 17 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/adamlaxalt.com/radical_left-458002?e=b87806bd09)
---
| | [ ](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=3125a6f1b1&e=b87806bd09)
---
| Dear Peter, We’re thrilled to share the exciting news with you that **Florida Governor Ron DeSantis** will headline as a special guest for the 8th Annual Basque Fry co-hosted by Morning in Nevada PAC and Never Back Down.

Governor DeSantis is one of our country’s most accomplished and effective leaders. Nevadans will benefit greatly from hearing the story of his impressive record of success, and how he handled COVID and kept his state’s economy growing. It’s a real honor to welcome him to this year’s event!

---
| [ ](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=5dfdf527b0&e=b87806bd09)
---
| The Basque Fry will be held on Saturday, June 17 at Corley Ranch in Gardnerville, and if you haven’t bought your tickets yet, [just click here to do so now](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=aa9b5a025c&e=b87806bd09). You don’t want to miss this opportunity to hear from one of America’s most successful conservative leaders!

Governor DeSantis delivered a recorded-setting victory on November 8, 2022 with a battle- tested, bold agenda for the people of Florida. With his historic, nearly 20-point win, Governor Ron DeSantis created a blueprint for freedom in Florida that serves as a model for the rest of the nation. No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis, and he is now sharing this winning blueprint with the country.

Governor Ron DeSantis is continuing to deliver for Floridians with a bold agenda to guarantee access to high-quality education, create a robust economy, provide access to Floridians recovering from hurricanes, invest record funding for Florida’s environment, and stop woke ideology from infiltrating Florida.

“When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism,” Governor Ron DeSantis said in his Inaugural Address.
Don’t miss this chance to [hear from Governor DeSantis in person](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=6706dbf916&e=b87806bd09) on June 17!

And be sure to keep an eye on your inbox, as we’ll be announcing additional members of our speaker lineup in the coming days and weeks.

In the meantime, [click here today](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=bfba6869b4&e=b87806bd09), and reserve your spot at the largest annual political event in all of Nevada. If you reserve your spot now, you can get your general-admission ticket for the discounted price of $25.

Thank you, and we’ll see you at Corley Ranch!

Sincerely,

Morning in Nevada PAC
Never Back Down
---

[](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=8f6d0f12f5&e=b87806bd09)[](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=6b78ee23d2&e=b87806bd09)**

| | Well, Peter, it's been a wild month, to put it mildly. Though his fellow Republicans in Congress refuse to hold him accountable for his lies (let alone his incompetence), our campaign is confronting George Santos head-on. **And our message is getting through.** **[We're building tremendous momentum, and we can't let up now! Chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Sunday to keep us on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62387852/403284557/924952270?refcode=2023-04-27-do-your-job&recurring=0&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=520494ff-fde4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjA0OTRmZi1mZGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5_6n88K9FL7OpKQhvOe6QUtqda1j_l1fvdqeP4CMXo=)** When Santos saw how many people had joined our movement, he stooped to personal attacks against me. (Believe it or not, it was even _less_ classy than it sounds.) I wouldn't take the bait, Peter. Why would I? Despite what he seems to think, getting George Santos out of office isn't personal. **It's about making sure my community is well-represented in Congress.** So, when he took a cheap shot at me, it just showed that while he's not thinking about why health care matters to folks in our district, we are. If he wants to talk about what I looked like as an adolescent, he can go right ahead. Me? **I want to talk about electing a Congressman who will**** _do his job._** And judging by the number of folks who joined our campaign in these last couple of weeks, an awful lot of people want to have that conversation, too. clean_body: | | | | Well, Peter, it's been a wild month, to put it mildly. Though his fellow Republicans in Congress refuse to hold him accountable for his lies (let alone his incompetence), our campaign is confronting George Santos head-on. And our message is getting through. = When Santos saw how many people had joined our movement, he stooped to personal attacks against me. (Believe it or not, it was even less classy than it sounds.) I wouldn't take the bait, Peter. Why would I? Despite what he seems to think, getting George Santos out of office isn't personal. It's about making sure my community is well-represented in Congress. So, when he took a cheap shot at me, it just showed that while he's not thinking about why health care matters to folks in our district, we are. If he wants to talk about what I looked like as an adolescent, he can go right ahead. Me? I want to talk about electing a Congressman who will do his job. And judging by the number of folks who joined our campaign in these last couple of weeks, an awful lot of people want to have that conversation, too. = Josh | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress 11 East 44th St. Suite 300 New York, NY 10017 United States Email is an important way for Josh Lafazan to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues. body:
In the two years since you sent Joe and Kamala to the White House, they have been fighting for you every day: doing whatever they can to put more money in your pockets, to make our streets safer, and to create more jobs across the country. | | |
---
Peter, **I know firsthand that the presidency doesn’t change who you are. Now they’re running for reelection to achieve even more -- but the outcome of this race depends on you.** **[That’s why I’m asking you to support Joe and Kamala’s campaign for reelection. The only way to make our democracy stronger is to fight for it. We can't take it for granted. And that starts with electing leaders who know you, who see you, and who care about you.
You know that, Peter. It's why, two years ago, you sent Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House.
Since then, they’ve been fighting for you every day: doing whatever they can to put more money in your pocket, to make our streets safer, and to create more jobs across the country.
**Just like in every election, the most basic question you should be asking yourself right now is: who will fight for you? The answer is clear.**
**[So, can I count on you to make your first $25 donation to Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign right now?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoDdyHB8j1qMjbDI34Him6w-EC9jPg1Wsm6jQhzUsqlRZ9O4SFeNAgDbSmq1XBV8-MjN2YXRFMeEI4CUjb0_j93XH66FVtzgFPLeZfZh7oN-x4M3GoY_9k9pKquHyErXMtg694-vSu-pqlWEBxDPCFPOTBdYGVSlpcLrEEGlppWmQTmj0LAWBrxb5xtG08bKLd5Ph3lToCCkHDUvMqYDT1k3Zvfk7n8WnoFr_aDhelMdtZXQiFqKsFG4SMNxy9-z7Q1-cX-bM8oqFM4B3cn4h34o9NizyC4x8PFYjhgsfvCCL2kOExLhEw-pprBDRogqBqIuNHE7rTokU5ZGXQn0K4/3vp/MzPKRMd2RXqasLkG8kFRvQ/h7/pzYFg-UxnTzZ5F1y97VxVNaVHdDgDgAp-qNxVPdqUYE)**
Thanks for joining me in supporting my friends Joe and Kamala.
Let's get to work.
— Barack Obama

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our freedoms are under attack!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is fighting every day **__for__** government transparency and accountability and **__against__** unlawful government secrecy and public corruption.
In fact, thanks to the commitment of our members, for twenty-nine years **Judicial Watch** has stood strong defending and representing you in Washington and everywhere the rule of law is under attack.
Our commitment is deeply rooted in our nation's foundational documents: **The Declaration of Independence** and**the U.S. Constitution**.
But today, our freedoms and the rule of law are under unprecedented attack.
[And that’s why I hope you will give us your support with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63109&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63109&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Together, the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution represent the very best of our American spirit - our commitment to independence, freedom and equal protection under the rule of law. Since 1994, **Judicial Watch** has done its best to preserve and protect these principles. Our commitment means:

* We take both Republicans and Democrats to federal court to enforce the rule of law;

* We file lawsuits to uncover unlawful government secrecy and overreach, to hold government accountable and to bring truth to light;

* We exercise real and effective government oversight when a partisan Congress and the politically biased elite media fail to do so; and

* We doggedly persist in the courts so that "we the people" know what our government is up to, especially when it is being "weaponized" against law-abiding citizens

**But our commitment is[made possible by support from patriots like you](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63109&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)!

**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63109&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Your support has never been more important than it is today, as we dig into serious and well-documented allegations of Biden family corruption, fight for honest elections and press for enforcement of our laws against illegal immigration, which are being openly ignored by radical, open-borders Biden administration.

One way to look at it is that we fulfill the investigative and oversight roles that the media shirks and that Congress only fitfully undertakes...

...whether we're in court challenging the constitutional overreach of certain Biden executive orders... uncovering the spread of Critical Race Theory and other extreme programs that violate our laws against racial discrimination...protecting the integrity of our elections... exposing Biden administration attacks on conservatives and people of faith ... _your Judicial Watch is doing more to hold our government accountable by educating the public than any congressional committee or national media outlet_.

I know you're aware that our work comes with _real costs attached_ ...

...especially when confronted by taxpayer-funded Biden administration lawyers who are experts in obfuscation, delay and legal tactics designed to evade the law and cover-up misdeeds.

So, I would be very grateful if you would consider [making a special **tax-deductible** gift to Judicial Watch today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63109&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

Our historic caseload represents a significant challenge for us. And knowing we can rely on your continued commitment makes it easier to respond when new opportunities to uphold the rule of law arise.

With your help we will keep fighting in the courts for the principles and vision for which previous generations of patriots risked _everything_.

body:

| |

---
| | | **FIRST:** It was Justice Clarence Thomas and Justice Neil Gorsuch
**THEN:** It was Chief Justice John Roberts.
**NEXT:** **???**
One thing is clear friend: The Radical Left is going to do **EVERYTHING** they can to **DESTROY** our Supreme Court Majority **FOREVER**.

These smear campaigns led by the Liberal Media against Clarence Thomas and Neil Gorsuch are **RIDICULOUS**.

Toss in Senator Durbin's request for Chief Justice John Roberts to step away from the important business of the Supreme Court to testify on these baseless claims and you've got yourself a situation ripe for **INSANITY**.

**Even worse - who knows who the Radical Left will come after NEXT???**

If we lose our Supreme Court Majority, we will lose all of the hard-fought victories we have won to keep America the free country we all deserve. The future of America will be DESTROYED if we don't do everything we can to save our Supreme Court Majority.

clean_body: | | | Peter, the GOP’s plan to win the youth vote just leaked:it’s to suppress all methods that young voters use to vote. A top GOP attorney’s presentation to Republican donors was leaked to the press, and here’s a summary: Limit voting on college campuses (they want to shut down polling places). Prevent same-day voter registration. Prevent automatic mailing of ballots to registered voters. The GOP has been sounding alarm bells about how young voters are overwhelmingly voting for Democrats, and instead of fighting to win their votes, they’re working to make sure they can’t cast ballots. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = =_ If the GOP succeeds in limiting the youth vote, then we could lose elections up and down the ballot next year. Thank you for your continued support for democracy. GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. _What do they have in common?****_

_They’ve all tried to silence me._

**But none have succeeded.**

body:
Your active participation is indispensable in shaping the future of our beloved country.

| Dear Peter, Our nation stands at a crossroads, and your immediate action is vital! **[As a distinguished Republican in your community, I am thrilled to extend this exclusive offer for you to join the esteemed Chairman's Club.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ZoTZNeVkUW8bigk_kgmqoe1w5ut0tBwXl7RiICW7sTS3L3Vs0IFlvAWGutuNm1Pujj7SyRbC26b9tXPAJQZiWuJL3lWN5D1WErEao9-ETrv_g8FX7hQ0UdnnbVzpE1CV1ejgXSBh6U5CXbKn74UMPdpiEi7dOe3xyavhBXW4AsAB2yCLVmIupbyBkZyy0MtJH-z3HMRNlpaHgDoUEyiyErRHW_h1H2qSOHoxlZf5Y3VLQ2ZVe6Kpk-419O-sSUT_WAYxXu5rj-FJ1IxGAhADwYTfW8ex1KCkgifAcMUceateXG-I_Bgi3me2DIay_qKg0C3iiUOzj8P4ghdKBmexqtCfhwFhTN4M4fP0nDmC02InZLHH84CPKyZwHcA0xFcncv9iI4mhil1xxk413cGsLKf9o-ERs5-HNEUa1F2PdAfJRFUgNM_Q_gIQOwTvRFVm&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230427_hd_chairman_s_c_17_97&n=1)** [We are in the fight of our lives to preserve the core principles of our party, and the Chairman's Club is the driving force behind our Grassroots Team.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ZoTZNeVkUW8bigk_kgmqoe1w5ut0tBwXl7RiICW7sTS3L3Vs0IFlvAWGutuNm1Pujj7SyRbC26b9tXPAJQZiWuJL3lWN5D1WErEao9-ETrv_g8FX7hQ0UdnnbVzpE1CV1ejgXSBh6U5CXbKn74UMPdpiEi7dOe3xyavhBXW4AsAB2yCLVmIupbyBkZyy0MtJH-z3HMRNlpaHgDoUEyiyErRHW_h1H2qSOHoxlZf5Y3VLQ2ZVe6Kpk-419O-sSUT_WAYxXu5rj-FJ1IxGAhADwYTfW8ex1KCkgifAcMUceateXG-I_Bgi3me2DIay_qKg0C3iiUOzj8P4ghdKBmexqtCfhwFhTN4M4fP0nDmC02InZLHH84CPKyZwHcA0xFcncv9iI4mhil1xxk413cGsLKf9o-ERs5-HNEUa1F2PdAfJRFUgNM_Q_gIQOwTvRFVm&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230427_hd_chairman_s_c_17_97&n=2) Your active participation is indispensable in shaping the future of our beloved country. Picture the tremendous influence you'll have as part of this elite assembly. You'll receive exclusive, insider updates directly from me, Chairman Whatley, and your support will be instrumental in championing our conservative cause. **[So, I call upon you, Peter, to CONTRIBUTE $10 OR MORE RIGHT NOW to accept your membership in the Chairman's Club. Time is not on our side, and we need your support in this decisive moment.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ZoTZNeVkUW8bigk_kgmqoe1w5ut0tBwXl7RiICW7sTS3L3Vs0IFlvAWGutuNm1Pujj7SyRbC26b9tXPAJQZiWuJL3lWN5D1WErEao9-ETrv_g8FX7hQ0UdnnbVzpE1CV1ejgXSBh6U5CXbKn74UMPdpiEi7dOe3xyavhBXW4AsAB2yCLVmIupbyBkZyy0MtJH-z3HMRNlpaHgDoUEyiyErRHW_h1H2qSOHoxlZf5Y3VLQ2ZVe6Kpk-419O-sSUT_WAYxXu5rj-FJ1IxGAhADwYTfW8ex1KCkgifAcMUceateXG-I_Bgi3me2DIay_qKg0C3iiUOzj8P4ghdKBmexqtCfhwFhTN4M4fP0nDmC02InZLHH84CPKyZwHcA0xFcncv9iI4mhil1xxk413cGsLKf9o-ERs5-HNEUa1F2PdAfpJbXtUfVPS0Next9yGJBF&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230427_hd_chairman_s_c_17_97&n=3)** |

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: McCarthy wants to cut $30 billion from the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It’s time to go on offense.
#
We’ve got some bad news, Derek.
McCarthy, his MAGA allies, and the House GOP are ready to shut down the government — to cause a global financial crisis — unless they get to slash the VA’s budget by $30 billion dollars.
For a party that calls themselves “pro-Military”, it’s a stab in the back. It’s a betrayal. And above all else, it’s dangerous.
But VoteVets is uniquely positioned to fight back. We’re the only organization on the left that can reach Veterans and show them how full of shit the Republican Party is.
Think about it for a minute: There is no other organization that speaks to Veterans and to Military Families like VoteVets — and that’s because we’re Veterans, too.
We’re already working on ads slamming the GOP for cutting 80,000 jobs at the VA and slashing access to care for Veterans.
This is our thing, and we’re ready to go. But those ads are expensive, so we’ve got to ask:
**[Make an $3 donation and help us take the fight to the GOP on this disaster of a budget proposal. It’s time to go on offense, and we’re lining up Veterans from coast to coast to speak out. All we need is the funding.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230427-1-15&t=1&akid=8363%2E3013755%2Ezravyq)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

The Journal News ran [_**my op-ed highlighting a bipartisan congressional delegation trip I took to the Indo-Pacific, and the importance of defending Taiwan.**_](http://url3645.lawlerforcongress.com/ls/click?upn=ZfvMrlvpopIgW4BinaaR5Y7Msz9WvTsdUKk8UnVyhrS-2BeOUR-2FwzIgyzC6fgtWriQAHAlrDspbLhr1j8UK6xyLiTaJR97DiEB2DS-2BYGhsGS1QYsualQnQxH-2BIN-2FXIZ27Zvi7K-2F4Zzel902Ld6GMIbMQ-3D-3DnX1I_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc5-2Bd-2BEHuM4R7ROxyyucVBrIyqho6dPrRkxUz-2FcktRI-2BW4DyHUhIpyNkUIE1b3dactOe6UV26K93360dYWXc3ADaCt7AmXpAyI-2Fkyzpbe6gXRCHE6HPu4xb0ku5-2FvKPi1ixPnGZbE4Hwx4bmLl2tOjcgherPxiq7AbTXq7Eu5hN8fq60lBGMcL1yUHoA3UJs9f3x9qd69SOfGZ01I4x306RTGukea7w-2FC4Y98bg4qjynx69uIEHuLWp3FUm63H6lHE78-2BepcB-2BLOpVX84lnzLHcR7z1wSLxPfSwvWt0YYzVAHSJapMnSPcdKU8mUIhE2w5N4UqAUW5PBzceF9x3-2BQyQVfFuqV6Ulr-2FPNXVJS3-2B5XIMrIohmM7FBXutrjgwEo0Mt2FYUmdoUs-2Fp4MMor5y3sm9V6Hp6rzoKqNJ5OxvdD3v5-2Fujg6BkiYZnslLCZczCbzeoBPShNa5ZGEuseXUzLz4WQ0OZ371oaXESAgdWfyYHw7yvIsp2pVfmk7hd8DZ-2BVBosJduJCBAtsb4hq4ucTTq0o8NfzbNCcsVQBSZjsw5kIRXtwlcSUp8n7aYt071iUbIIGW09pq2-2BEmTys4KhdC78PxsgmTGMe8WLk4HsZl7eMe2Kbg4Qd60ngJ8rpPN5SUDxn2eQTsr8iQAg8JgLgKp1CFs7HI8x1E-2Fbd-2FmnT5zWeUw24PTsdqw1DKn0kKIO4PpNFLfe-2FQpRgR4iEC6CIj0-2FC9-2F9JdFz6syGg1PjVtU40VbvZenWS67tJtM93w4uMPg-2B4JEs7aNmUW2HBQyrR7ktpdE6mxNcE6dU2-2BYI-2FcjZo7bWjevaFFwynxVbJzC4mUVyoqow-2B0qk9WMSHn2WcM3sEWPWbCGgP80IUr4CPhHw) I wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to hear from me on this important issue, so I have reprinted my words below:

_In combating communism and promoting democracy, Ronald Reagan employed the doctrine of “peace through strength” — a policy that helped end the Cold War, bring about the collapse of the Soviet Union and the Berlin Wall, and put America on the path to global superiority.

Today, with military and economic threats emanating from the unholy alliance of Russia, China, North Korea and Iran, America must once again lead to preserve peace, ensure prosperity, and advance democracy.

When Vladimir Putin invaded Ukraine in February 2022, he did not anticipate the unified economic and military response of the United States and our NATO allies or the resolved determination of the Ukrainian people. The consequences for this unjust war have been severe, with crippling economic sanctions and a depleted and demoralized Russian military.

But Russian aggression didn’t begin in 2022 and the invasion was hardly a surprise. Had America and our allies acted sooner to arm Ukraine and firmly pushed back against Russia, Vladimir Putin would have thought twice about such an invasion.

We cannot allow history to repeat itself, especially in dealing with the threats and challenges emerging out of the Indo-Pacific.

China continues to ramp up global economic coercion, aggression in the Strait of Taiwan, and espionage efforts against the U.S. and our allies. Meanwhile, North Korea threatens U.S. and international security by engaging in arms deals with bad actors and testing missiles within range of nearby countries. These provocations create a unique opportunity for America to strengthen our relationship with Japan, South Korea, the Philippines, Australia, Thailand, India, and Taiwan — an opportunity we cannot afford to squander.

That is why I, along with House Foreign Affairs Committee Chairman Michael McCaul, R-Texas, and a bipartisan group of colleagues, recently traveled to the Indo-Pacific on a 10-day tour of Japan, South Korea, Taiwan, Hawaii, and Guam.

After meeting with heads of state, foreign ministers, defense officials, and legislators, as well as our own military leaders in the Indo-Pacific Command, the 7th Fleet, and the DMZ, it is abundantly clear that the United States and our allies in the region must implement a clear strategy of deterrence against China and North Korea and create stronger economic and trade relations amongst ourselves — in other words we must implement a policy of peace through strength.

In recent months, Japan announced plans to double the size of its military and increase defense spending to over 2% of GDP; South Korea increased defense capabilities and announced an expanded role in the Indo-Pacific region; the Philippines signed a maritime framework; and Australia agreed to expand defense cooperation with the United States.

These actions by our allies are no accident, and they must be the beginning of greater cooperation and hopefully the framework for a NATO-like military alliance in the Indo-Pacific. It’s the only way to effectively deter North Korea’s and China’s blatant military aggression.

As with Ukraine, some Americans may wonder why it is important for the United States to be involved in these conflicts. The answer is simple: Those who fail to learn from history are doomed to repeat it. Make no mistake, freedom and democracy are worth fighting for and a prosperous America requires it.

With over 60% of global trade navigating through the Strait of Taiwan and over 90% of the world's semiconductors being manufactured in Taiwan, any military invasion or blockade in the region would grind America’s economy to a halt and have severe ramifications worldwide. It is in our national interest to ensure that never happens.

During our meeting with Taiwanese President Tsai Ing-wen, which came two days after her historic meeting with Speaker Kevin McCarthy and a bipartisan congressional delegation in California, she outlined a clear course of action — increased defense training and cooperation, delivery of critical weapons systems, and a unified coalition in the Indo-Pacific to deliver a clear and unambiguous message to China and any other would-be bad actors: don’t even think about it.

China is our greatest geopolitical adversary and is the single most unifying issue across America. In the 118th Congress we have already seen the passage of significant bipartisan legislation on China, with more to come.

The time to act is now. America must lead with strength, boldness, and courage. With an eye towards peace and prosperity for all, our Indo-Pacific allies are ready and willing to unite._
_\- Congressman Mike Lawler_

clean_body: | | | | Read here —> | Peter, The Journal News ran I wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to hear from me on this important issue, so I have reprinted my words below: In combating communism and promoting democracy, Ronald Reagan employed the doctrine of “peace through strength” — a policy that helped end the Cold War, bring about the collapse of the Soviet Union and the Berlin Wall, and put America on the path to global superiority. Today, with military and economic threats emanating from the unholy alliance of Russia, China, North Korea and Iran, America must once again lead to preserve peace, ensure prosperity, and advance democracy. When Vladimir Putin invaded Ukraine in February 2022, he did not anticipate the unified economic and military response of the United States and our NATO allies or the resolved determination of the Ukrainian people. The consequences for this unjust war have been severe, with crippling economic sanctions and a depleted and demoralized Russian military. But Russian aggression didn’t begin in 2022 and the invasion was hardly a surprise. Had America and our allies acted sooner to arm Ukraine and firmly pushed back against Russia, Vladimir Putin would have thought twice about such an invasion. We cannot allow history to repeat itself, especially in dealing with the threats and challenges emerging out of the Indo-Pacific. China continues to ramp up global economic coercion, aggression in the Strait of Taiwan, and espionage efforts against the U.S. and our allies. Meanwhile, North Korea threatens U.S. and international security by engaging in arms deals with bad actors and testing missiles within range of nearby countries. These provocations create a unique opportunity for America to strengthen our relationship with Japan, South Korea, the Philippines, Australia, Thailand, India, and Taiwan — an opportunity we cannot afford to squander. That is why I, along with House Foreign Affairs Committee Chairman Michael McCaul, R-Texas, and a bipartisan group of colleagues, recently traveled to the Indo-Pacific on a 10-day tour of Japan, South Korea, Taiwan, Hawaii, and Guam. After meeting with heads of state, foreign ministers, defense officials, and legislators, as well as our own military leaders in the Indo-Pacific Command, the 7th Fleet, and the DMZ, it is abundantly clear that the United States and our allies in the region must implement a clear strategy of deterrence against China and North Korea and create stronger economic and trade relations amongst ourselves — in other words we must implement a policy of peace through strength. In recent months, Japan announced plans to double the size of its military and increase defense spending to over 2% of GDP; South Korea increased defense capabilities and announced an expanded role in the Indo-Pacific region; the Philippines signed a maritime framework; and Australia agreed to expand defense cooperation with the United States. These actions by our allies are no accident, and they must be the beginning of greater cooperation and hopefully the framework for a NATO-like military alliance in the Indo-Pacific. It’s the only way to effectively deter North Korea’s and China’s blatant military aggression. As with Ukraine, some Americans may wonder why it is important for the United States to be involved in these conflicts. The answer is simple: Those who fail to learn from history are doomed to repeat it. Make no mistake, freedom and democracy are worth fighting for and a prosperous America requires it. With over 60% of global trade navigating through the Strait of Taiwan and over 90% of the world's semiconductors being manufactured in Taiwan, any military invasion or blockade in the region would grind America’s economy to a halt and have severe ramifications worldwide. It is in our national interest to ensure that never happens. During our meeting with Taiwanese President Tsai Ing-wen, which came two days after her historic meeting with Speaker Kevin McCarthy and a bipartisan congressional delegation in California, she outlined a clear course of action — increased defense training and cooperation, delivery of critical weapons systems, and a unified coalition in the Indo-Pacific to deliver a clear and unambiguous message to China and any other would-be bad actors: don’t even think about it. China is our greatest geopolitical adversary and is the single most unifying issue across America. In the 118th Congress we have already seen the passage of significant bipartisan legislation on China, with more to come. The time to act is now. America must lead with strength, boldness, and courage. With an eye towards peace and prosperity for all, our Indo-Pacific allies are ready and willing to unite. \- Congressman Mike Lawler | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

subject: I'm humbly asking:

body:
Will you help us catch up to the Dems?

| |

| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc1dgsomv4drtg11gahn64gn8piesubir41etbgg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi69pb3c5h2bs)

---
| | [HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd4guq9s74dgpiisevp2qea1dhfkg2n09emu3h8g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi69pb3c5h2bs)
---

As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU.

People think that they need to write huge checks to make a difference, but that's simply not the case. House Republicans are powered by the $5, $8, or $25 donations of grassroots patriots like YOU.

Asking for money is my least favorite part of campaigning, but Hakeem Jeffries has racked up some serious cash that could devastate our ranks if we don't respond in kind.

Any contribution can make ALL the difference in setting the tone for this GOP Majority and what we can accomplish, but if everyone sits out, we're DONE.

**[Can you please send in just $5, $8, or $25 to the following link so our candidates can survive Democrats' relentless dark money attacks?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zac8q4qb149u4i4s6c1ts2o60np3t5nhj9oi4cg0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdi69pb3c5h2bs "Can you please send in just $5, $8, or $25 to the following link so our candidates can survive Democrats’ relentless dark money attacks?")**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.
I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.
I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.
But those folks have enough advocates there.
It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
That’s why I am running.
But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.
I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:
Can I count on you to split $20 between Serve America and our Senate campaign before our fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]Thank you,
Ruben

name: State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: RINOs are being held accountable
body:
Often times in our emails we talk about the bad news happening in the states. We focus on the terrible job RINOs are doing in charge of your state capitals. But today we have good news: More and more conservatives in red states are waking up to the fact that they’re not properly being represented. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=b8430dec4027432f8c36c2a1a9d8bf5c&_t=1yaszdApZM3VXV2N2y5y_wEDc9pxrUU9EYIWnE9twx7Y9U81J3S3ucm5AnzD98xuYVUY1_QJR6g0aBfnnsXIJzQ4V2P6PxC6JK6De8egn0M%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=b8430dec4027432f8c36c2a1a9d8bf5c&_t=1yaszdApZM3VXV2N2y5y_wEDc9pxrUU9EYIWnE9twx7Y9U81J3S3ucm5AnzD98xuYVUY1_QJR6g0aBfnnsXIJzQ4V2P6PxC6JK6De8egn0M%3D)

| |
---
Friends, Often times in our emails we talk about the bad news happening in the states. We focus on the terrible job RINOs are doing in charge of your state capitals. But today we have good news: More and more conservatives in red states are waking up to the fact that they're not properly being represented. In Idaho this week, three RINO state representatives received votes of "no confidence" in their respective districts. Multiple Republican committees in the districts of liberal Republicans Rep. Lori McCann in District 6, Rep. Julie Yamamoto in District 11, and Rep. Matt Bundy in District 23 gave them votes of "no confidence". Additionally, the legislative district of RINO Rep. Kenny Wrote in District 13 voted to censure him. Yamamoto and McCann are the top two Republicans on the House Education Committee. They are the reason Idaho did not get an ESA bill in the last session and voted against removing porn from school libraries. After the IDFC raised hell about it, their constituents voted to hold them accountable. For another example, several Republican committees in South Carolina counties have also voted to censure their state's House GOP leadership after they kicked the SCFC out of their caucus. This is precisely how it should work. In the past, a RINO could claim to be conservative because nobody exposed them. But now that our state freedom caucuses are getting loud, the scales are falling off the eyes of the public. **Montana:** The spotlight was on the Treasure State this week as the MTFC made national headlines for their efforts to end the disgusting practice of children going through dangerous sex changes. Thanks to the efforts of the MT Freedom Caucus, the amendment passed overwhelmingly in the legislature. As the bill passed the House, a transgender Democrat lawmaker Rep. Zooey Zephyr [told them](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b8430dec4027432f8c36c2a1a9d8bf5c&_e=R6fdTN5xt4N76ywk2AEFRVwTAkLHnED0WrrnxjycvJuqO_RmVw06JuwPYwHQ025A_gt8LqIksuuxRBtG1E3xwPcRwtUORlznkKhXZMLtqkRXN1mnLRBLsGymPkKAGfgB-9aABbW-K3FqJ58yVJF01bxxIuYXzIO1dPvwCgT9paGNF7t1bK6xac2mKgC36aSBDEZKOgdM7cq05AWijDmDIR4VLsdEbaJ-iFieybnmmj-a722BFjpg_tBUjHoU_pVr) "The only thing I will say is if you vote yes on this bill and yes on these amendments I hope the next time there's an invocation when you bow your heads in prayer, you see the blood on your hands." In response, the MTFC immediately called for his censure due to a lack of decorum, which the House ultimately approved. [ ](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b8430dec4027432f8c36c2a1a9d8bf5c&_e=R6fdTN5xt4N76ywk2AEFRV3TKhTM5cQc8xFTBmQJAnfRKhqRz2jVlAoBgd_SLaYMOy_tNEBWk2sSBPFGMoisZEJYQf0ZFjXZz_LGnjQTYx9B1OCW8aQaqpynj7s5YpF4h0F6ouvV4g88nwGJR-nQMs2RWNCXDkn3qLp0fT62SIriVfMuyYPzMN8cpKfqBpjHcHA9EhF6KADPXzXfLT2Qhbk8hLh8JqatLk_U7mAUbvlejJkIgxmYCDwU3ssRu81ObAHL6hz1-Di2TagpmAXOkZKsRulo35zrSaXoDVGapctWm6PrbRYba1H3-KQt8BxB) Several national news outlets, such as the Washington Post, CNN, and Associated Press covered the story. As you can imagine, their coverage was not very friendly to the MT Freedom Caucus. They humorously took issue with the fact that the caucus "misgendered" Zephyr in their statement (aka: they said a man is a man). [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F43c16f1f-1a5d-4cc8-a0b3-961a0ed9894d_1172x1242.png) **South Dakota:** As you probably know, Anheuser-Busch decided to completely alienate their customers by making transgender social media influencer Dylan Mulvaney a brand ambassador for their company. In response, the SDFC [called on](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b8430dec4027432f8c36c2a1a9d8bf5c&_e=R6fdTN5xt4N76ywk2AEFRRujHlVIlUDWV9uYgMICIxeIE546MRIniupAhmzRZhDB1X1Z0nX8niFwZxZ0r6YwMFyeRLmI4Y-CEjjw2eDnMUC0bo9htDBLbW_YKCk80wsMNlMjHHA-5TGlrkMcbasNIfIJl343QaelOJR7reJP9JWZel_VwqCIXy8h0vLS0_bIPfUeIAB4vYgamklFMhFqBnLEfBoGHep4yMTkq09tb_mu_uWBdFrBk4jUAoH1U3J2COMBB-E8eA-e3zjE9tWkTg%3D%3D) South Dakota Gov. Kristi Norm to immediately divest in the state's holdings in the company, totaling thousands of shares of stock in the Anheuser-Busch company. "South Dakota needs to put our money where our values are," said SDFC Vice Chair Rep. Tony Randolph. "We cannot continue to invest in a company that promotes values that are contrary to those of South Dakotans." **Arizona:** Gov. Katie Hobbs has officially set a record for most vetoes in a year for an Arizona Governor with 63. The AZ Freedom Caucus has been at the forefront of passing many common sense bills that would have done a lot of great things for the State of Arizona, but their new governor is singlehandedly preventing them from becoming law. Take a look at just a few examples. [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fe3c81a79-333f-46d2-85ec-ec890b49fcfe_1190x1074.png) **Wyoming:** Remember how Wyoming Speaker Albert Sommers prevented a bill to ban the transing of children from receiving a vote on the floor? Well, a couple in Wyoming is now suing their school board for transitioning their daughter to a boy behind their backs. The WY Freedom Caucus vows to bring that bill to the floor in the next legislative session and ensure it becomes law. [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4c99e9c3-70ab-4b17-865d-d4f488cc6180_1210x820.png) **JOIN THE FIGHT** Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. name: Mark
subject: I’m running in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
It is official! I’ve just launched my campaign for Governor

| |
---
| | |
Patriot,

**It is official! I’ve just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy. **

I’m not afraid to say that I’m a proud Christian, and America First conservative.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18114%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XOcu1z703MhdQWcuWK2c4Q&sysid=1)
---

And if you didn’t already notice, I’m a black American.

Joe Biden, the Democrats, and the liberal media will tell you that as a black American, I can’t be any of those things.

They think folks like me can’t think for ourselves. They think we should just fall in line and do as we are told.

And now they want me to just sit down and shut up, and they’ll do anything to destroy me for being a free-thinking man that undermines their sacred narrative.

It won’t be long until they’re running wall-to-wall coverage saying our silent majority is dead. Now, I’m ready for what they’re going to hit me with- but that doesn’t make fighting back any easier.

**So I’m humbly asking you to take just a few seconds today and endorse my campaign right out of the gates.**** **

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18114%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XOcu1z703MhdQWcuWK2c4Q&sysid=1)
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OFFICIALLY ENDORSE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18125%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8FdoaXiJ%2bTs7RvyDWPTqaw&sysid=1)
---
Let's show Biden and the liberal media that our movement is strong, and our movement is serious.

Thank you & God Bless.

Mark Robinson
GOP Candidate for Governor
---
|
---

---

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Wall Street Journal: Mammograms Can Promote Heart Health
body:
Calcium deposits in breast arteries can indicate a problem.| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e98e8d3d679144e7a420311853de957a&_e=cVfU9huLWOAl82ayzBkxFZJDaDa-Y_m1SmN5QdzF1_qCV73oXiWGQwWBVTwUPRhE9knfTdZnE4R9U9UcmVM3wYr9MoevqZfEwFU9f82I_jAaxTIz6RFzCvYPYWTsdTSmccQB7oyBCPt_9W7KUcOu4pL5YzTaq2NpvoL2NrpHXd-PZ5FPrzX7QzFp3b36FDTuDhsq39etSP2MxpEfYLX77Q%3D%3D)
---
_**Mammograms Can Promote Heart Health**_ By Bobby Jindal and Chirag Parghi
---
_Calcium deposits in breast arteries can indicate a problem._
---
Fifty years of technological advancement revolutionized the treatment of heart attacks and increased survival rates, but heart disease remains the nation’s leading cause of death for women. While we have made dramatic progress, efforts to prevent heart disease have been disappointing, especially for women. Yet a standard feature of women’s health—mammography—offers a promising gateway for cardiovascular screening through breast arterial calcification, or BAC. BAC consists of visible deposits of calcium in breast arteries, which can be seen on mammograms and should prompt doctors to screen for heart disease. Since the X-ray primarily screens for breast cancer, this finding is rarely reported and leaves most patients unaware of the amount of BAC on their exams. [_**FINISH READING ON WSJ.COM**_](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e98e8d3d679144e7a420311853de957a&_e=cVfU9huLWOAl82ayzBkxFcrcXUXH-dtOneny0fHJkn5uuEsaNdQ9x4HYJMtbAI5_ynn368G-9HVlS6qhK3qHONJqrxmyOB0_X5HpDWpXeNA3zxD3OLrzgCgMAIrQTEWK-OobUc1_dsri5pnNnFnIyQa-viplViu107PVv3BMrUMbHF7RDBbBRkK_A9qitwqDCwd1YIxR-xAFp9XaNyjYyspYQPgTqU3hOomHNoXU3RkQ5UiUm8QQgeYEruQj3KinSbsdSOgn2LRDL7R64nKASSpWiM05ma5-1sDHSCFyLubkzIRYjg2VWp6_u-XIdu_MZnazI_oxQyTCt4O3YYUCrw%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I want you to know this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[**Peter, I wanted to take some time today to share with you a personal note. I know it's long but I hope you’ll read until the end.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397570/403322666/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397571/403322667/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=) _Rep. Krishnamoorthi and his parents_
---
I’m the proud son of two Indian immigrants.
My family faced economic hardship when they first came here.
I grew up for a time in public housing and on food assistance.
I never imagined that one day I would become a Congressman.
That’s why I don’t take this job for granted, not even for a single day.
My family is the story of immigrants --[ **_that’s why I’m fighting to protect refugees and immigrants._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397572/403322668/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)
My family faced prejudice \-- [**_that’s why I’m fighting to stop hate crimes._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397573/403322669/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)
My family faced economic hardship -- [**_that’s why I’m fighting for a strong social safety net._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397574/403322670/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)
I will never forget the struggles my family and I faced.
That’s why I’m committed to giving every American opportunities to succeed -- and more.
[_**Peter, I’m asking for your support today to help fight for the America that made my story possible. Democrats and I have an ambitious agenda, but we can’t get it done without widespread support. If my story resonates with you, and if you’re as excited as I am about the future we can build, will you consider rushing in $14 before my End of Month Deadline in 72 hours? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397575/403322671/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)
**_[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397576/403322672/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)_**
---
I’m proud of where I came from.
And I am here because of my parents, my family, my public school teachers, my neighbors and the communities who helped me along the way.
I had their help then.
[_**Now, I’m asking for help again -- this time, from you. I’m humbly asking: can I please count on you to chip in before my End of Month Deadline in 72 hours? Anything you donate today will go further than you know.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397577/403322673/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)
****[Chip in $14 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397578/403322674/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)****

****[Chip in $19 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397579/403322675/-1810142053?refcode=20230427_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=19&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)****

Thank you,
Raja
| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62397584/403322680/-1810142053?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzk2ODQ0MC0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-WDxf4ZKV10XZbGSk3z06uAapq9UH8wfKQ6lVSK6L4=)

My family is the story of immigrants --= My family faced prejudice \-- = My family faced economic hardship -- = I will never forget the struggles my family and I faced. That’s why I’m committed to giving every American opportunities to succeed -- and more. = = I’m proud of where I came from. And I am here because of my parents, my family, my public school teachers, my neighbors and the communities who helped me along the way. I had their help then. = **= = = = = =** Thank you, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Making progress for our fellow Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Already this year, Indiana Democrats have worked hard to improve the lives of Hoosiers with the passage of meaningful legislation at the Statehouse. Democratic caucus members are making sure that more Hoosiers have access to food assistance, our first responders get the care they deserve, more students have access to a quality higher education, and that firearms can’t be manipulated to fire like machine guns. Sen. Shelli Yoder's bill to ease SNAP applications for disabled and elderly Hoosiers is another important step forward in making food assistance accessible for all who need it. Rep. Maureen Bauer’s bill to study the impact of PFAS chemicals that Indiana firefighters have been exposed to for decades will lead to more answers for those that put their lives on the line for us. Rep. Earl Harris' bill to automatically enroll eligible low income students in the 21st Century Scholars program is also a significant policy achievement. This program provides free and low-cost tuition to Indiana students and we're working to ensure that all Hoosiers have access to quality education, regardless of their financial situation. And Rep. Mitch Gore's bill to ban machine gun switches will make Indiana safer by preventing dangerous devices from falling into the wrong hands. It's a common-sense measure that will go a long way to protect our communities. [**We need your support to continue fighting for policies that improve the lives of Hoosiers. Make a donation to the Indiana Democratic Party today and help us build a stronger movement that can take on even greater challenges in the years to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62398329/403325194/1643342139?refcode=230427-Progress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzcyODhlZi0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8VeQjq7iCRaUyahSKRP2TnxSWDbzWQ8o8U1H9-TiM8=) These victories are just the beginning. We've also been working hard to fight back against harmful legislation, such as the partisan school boards bill. [**We need everyone’s support to make headway for these important causes. Chip in to the Indiana Democratic Party today and help us continue to make progress in the years to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62398330/403325195/1643342139?refcode=230427-Progress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzcyODhlZi0wY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8VeQjq7iCRaUyahSKRP2TnxSWDbzWQ8o8U1H9-TiM8=) Sincerely,

body:
Our country can not endure four more years of Biden’s FAILED leadership
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=d951d178c7de451a8fc3cf652fd56dc4&_e=WXaNeZ7m5jpMrhfjts-cGa4CC7DpvwBJsXJ1dW5UzjPYDxdjnUCP-7Qw8Zl4IGt5PicdIKJYVM-dSOg0LEEs-Qu_ufGMsrH78CdptE0nRKRc7bC7y5frChQkusf3ZLGYkqK6u-Hz2pryy1C__6FehABxDzofijCtWXHipahBVw4xBvPkIZO6sYQtCqPsIPCfDMTdnqnrYz-KwYaUQ_koHJ-98gBRphKHa7jGvWxGe3VkZBfXrAfN57S5jnWlBfnNnSRalfmXKL_-EzPbufbDhiYsgiuhGnInnJO_kyE3Yd-C1Ss_M6HA-3jBTkVnIHxiY3dTtyq5Cx4Pl_cVaIfNlnAyP6eMmG1TU0po1hU9puQ%3D)

Peter,
---
In just two years, Joe Biden’s presidency has produced the following hardships for Americans like **YOU** :
---
* **Highest inflation rates in over 40 years**
* **Loss of U.S. energy independence**
* **Proxy war with Russia in Ukraine**
* **Far-Left indoctrination of children in public schools**
* **Rise of China as a global competitor to the U.S.**
* **Disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal that killed 13 Marines and paved the way for the Taliban’s revival**

---
_**Despite his laundry list of failures and all of the damage his administration has done to our country, Biden just announced that he will run for re-election in 2024.**_
---
_It’s safe to say that our country has been in a downward spiral since Biden took office in 2021._
---
**Yet the President still believes the American people want to endure four more years of his _feckless_ leadership – _how out of touch could he possibly be_?**
---
[**Peter, it’s up to the American people to send Joe Biden and the Left PACKING in 2024 – so will you please chip in to support us as we fight to WIN next year’s election and further expand our Republican House majority?**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=d951d178c7de451a8fc3cf652fd56dc4&_e=WXaNeZ7m5jpMrhfjts-cGa4CC7DpvwBJsXJ1dW5UzjPYDxdjnUCP-7Qw8Zl4IGt5PicdIKJYVM-dSOg0LEEs-Qu_ufGMsrH78CdptE0nRKRc7bC7y5frChQkusf3ZLGYkqK6u-Hz2pryy1C__6FehABxDzofijCtWXHipahBVw4xBvPkIZO6sYQtCqPsIPCfDMTdnqnrYz-KwYaUQ_koHIeBBurBuJOv-E7neLGp_EkBi6hN0zpSPSj7fZlgJtHVmXfGKzuQoL-aod2A--icY0V8qXMiDii1Xukry4QOQLKGTEUZaeytFcu0kuMG8GpU2J1JHxJsHVQu9z-9vzlNEuas6G9VwIQoFIzArAzk82A%3D)
