name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain something, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek: Can I explain why this Sunday's end-of-month deadline is
so important?

This is our first deadline since everyone's FEC numbers were published in
a public report. And we can’t afford to lose momentum, especially now.

From the moment I jumped into the Senate race, Republicans piled on. Their
attacks have been relentless as they try to weaken our movement.

The GOP has made me a national boogeyman. Kevin McCarthy kicked me off the
Intelligence Committee. Matt Gaetz introduced legislation to ban me from
receiving classified information on the day we launched this campaign.
Marjorie Taylor Greene has called for me to be dragged in front of
Congress. And right-wing MAGA pundits are singing from the same sheet of
music on Fox News and even farther-right media networks.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]We have to prove that our momentum continues and that the GOP will not
wear us down with their relentless parade of attacks and false claims.
That's why your support is so important. Can you pitch in?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em.c2HEr4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em.2RUxgc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em.i2ayRH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em.1_b9xO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Derek, Kevin McCarthy has said he thinks a Republican can win
this Senate race.

There’s no one Republican leadership (and Trump) would rather defeat than
me. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them
accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the
Senate floor.

What they haven’t learned, after all these years of attacking me and
trying to tear down this team, is that we’re never giving up the fight.

When they kick me off my one committee (Intelligence), I go to serve on
another (Judiciary) and hold them accountable there. When they pump dark
money dollars into a Super PAC to lie about my record, our grassroots team
chips in to build the resources we need to respond. When they call us
names and throw around insults on far-right media, we keep our heads held
high and focus on what’s important.

We aren’t going to give in to the whims and wishes of Republican bullies.
Not now, not ever.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]Please, can you pitch in before our end-of-month deadline? While
Republicans ramp up their attacks, we can’t afford to slow down.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2146%2E5257348%2Er1RPBt ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

Let’s show the GOP what this team is capable of. That they can’t bring us
down.

Thanks,

— Adam

body:
In case you missed Maria Bartiromo’s show...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7EAw_r0LFvfWSheoVRetmnYTOfaQTIQNAlOUt6-Ikrv9ztHofBoXp4H6e8v0BwO4UlgYAOPvDKATH8fvqvvd2fLH1-NWWiXFtqfwhQHk-4Sf1eeVCqOjYafaFqEFb8D7AttGGVD1G9SiuLbSu7OpFYiGS_VmlHBGGS2kCXWDQemCWqiB1wJ0I0FxXjUhaM2VBueQyx6ZqDdKVRiTG8Itz2ucKj_GYmivOU_LY9KBwWFBv85YbZRmDHtjZ-4fli7iTN6Vt5FSLvs1hdnRQulS-jFGyhmRwSH5oTn7HvcZTa-1OXPGD2uOp4iB1si4ffqqHS7jOntk3Ho6uSfzLk6OLolx-3J6JWPKmDLj1phaMlCnNFBg3N6Pf48qdXL99YCPj3A7fZPuZ_d--1PMbZg2GgZalGaivuwLdrf_AQAA__9FNYyj)

Friend,
Republican House Oversight Chair James Comer went on Maria Bartiromo’s show to say that the Biden Campaign’s act of election interference was worse than anything Russia or China could ever do.
_He’s right._
You see, we accept that our enemies abroad will always try to undermine our Republic.
**But it is far, far worse when our own nation is undermined _from within_... **
For Biden’s campaign to coordinate with former U.S. Intelligence officers and spies to discredit a laptop documenting his family’s crimes is an absolute DISGRACE.
Let me be clear: I am not saying all of this to dwell on the past.
_I am saying this so that we are prepared for the future._
**Because – mark my words – this will NOT be the last time the Democrats cook up a scheme to try and seize control of the White House.**
**We’ve already watched them raid my home, indict me, and arrest me.**
But with your support, we will be fully prepared to defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts, schemes, and attacks hatched by America’s Deep State.
_(As always, if you’re doing poorly right now, please don’t even think about donating!)_
[**Please make a contribution before the April end-of-month fundraising deadline – for 1,500% impact.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX_NcAOZGbDJgcNurbRSlKqHSt2eImObZCJsEJii_fcVUbLX7z2N3qcxYRq4_2xBvQPijd0CiEBvgHiq3j9-ytOfk85_ff_Yci3rattT_AaI6XPyX9XnlcIHw8NOlc5ci7ZBazPflrJBKQ4oquzWOuqdUE1JtuoP5lD1XUOidnVDnbXuoDJuUSCJClVZoyQqSueUIqnQGE9176ESG8fCjdEM7p7mNUyFHUM2tLeUpuUx6Qh4XLxdZ19sHGfv9sbOzD-fm-Bntia_jxxT3q_RzYYXjtfcjiFwSt4DHqMdys72fp9R9ko1HQEd1xQuwTteA5B--sodLuM6Ww-kLV_Mk1kTJsPXCKRfTq9kjMnHBKSbRtSA8hIHdkD6x4wySTqv5wd8fIT0dK7N79Pb_W82t27aeBh4kQoqcd0X7G7_AwAA__-cf41d)

name: Brad Phillips, Persecution Project
subject: Bring the Good News to Sudan
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/npev5LOdR8ghBOL1bf4ZoQ)
---
Friend In Sudan, men, women, and children are suffering under an Islamist-instigated civil war. So far, thousands have been killed and hundreds of thousands displaced. People need basic life-saving items like food, water, shelter, and medical treatment. But people suffering from war and persecution need something else even more: **spiritual encouragement and hope**. **_Sharing the power of a loving Christ provides this spiritual hope, while food, water, and medicine provide crisis relief to sustain life._** At the Persecution Project Foundation, we share the Gospel of Jesus. This "Good News" truly transforms tribes, communities, nations, families, and individuals. To reach the most remote tribes in places like the Nuba mountains of Sudan, we are equipping teams of evangelists with Backpack Projector Kits to bring an audio/visual witness to a population that is more than 80% illiterate. [**During the next six months, our goal is to train and equip five more Evangelism Backpack Projector Teams to immediately deploy in several unreached communities. Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $500, or $1,500 would be a blessing as we bring relief and spiritual hope to victims of civil war, genocide, and religious persecution.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/aVOaptZik8uj9_AuD-wkTA)
---
[**Share the Gospel of Jesus Christ**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/N3lN7O8Qj07_1KKTg-jz9w)
---
| | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/ZHrG3G2nY-sRiGWJQ-Or7Q)
---
| [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/vodvFib5Ntqyl5MGkbTiMQ)
---
| | _ABOVE: Evangelism Backpacks and pastors traveling to share the Gospel of Jesus Christ_
---
In today's Western world, it may not seem like much to you - the ability to access video content - but, in the Nuba mountains of Sudan, access to movies such as _The Jesus Film_ could literally change hearts ... and lives. _Each projector system costs about $1,500, plus the cost to transport the backpacks._ This means, 15 people giving $100, 30 people giving $50, or 60 people giving $25 would cover the cost of one Evangelism Backpack Projector Kit. If you have the means, just three gifts of $500 or one incredibly generous gift of $1,500 would bring the Good News to the world's most vulnerable citizens.
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/40_sbJW3yA8NRP3j_sTbRQ)
---
[**If we can achieve these giving goals in the next few months, our evangelist teams will be equipped with the Backpack Projector Kits that will allow them to share the Good News of Jesus Christ. Can we count on your gift of $25, $50, $100, $500, or $1,500 today?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4In0/L9egUGCkWZh7rexuvSkUuA)
---
[**Give $25**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4JmFtb3VudD0yNSJ9/saF0y1GiRxVnKOKT7GPYGA)
---
[**Give $50**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4JmFtb3VudD01MCJ9/qs4H4S1IBKe8bv8C2WqOAA)
---
[**Give $100**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjM4MTc4JmFtb3VudD0xMDAifQ/MHgpLtMaB7sRHXIeC3UOeQ)
---
[**Give $500**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[**Give $1,000**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._cY4Mw)
---
Persecution Project Foundation (PPF) provides active compassion for the persecuted. PPF was founded in 1997 by Brad Phillips. In 1998, Brad traveled to war-ravaged Sudan and shot hours of video chronicling brutal persecution against Christians by the Islamist-led government. During the past 26 years, PPF's journey has brought us to virtually every corner of the Nuba mountains in Sudan. We've helped local pastors plant churches, delivered emergency relief, and built and supplied medical clinics and hospitals.
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
_ABOVE: Evangelism Backpacks being utilized to share the Gospel of Jesus Christ_
---
Because of His abundant grace, we've provided 1 million+ people with safe water, delivered hundreds of tons of medicine, supplied millions + of pounds of aid to "unreachable" communities, shared hundreds of thousands of Bibles and discipleship materials with churches, trained and encouraged thousands of Pastors ... and so much more. Providing this on-the-ground assistance while restoring hope and rebuilding communities through the love of Christ is a powerful way for our team at PPF to live out our faith. [**Your donation of any amount today would be an incredible gift as Persecution Project Foundation seeks to equip more evangelist teams with our Backpack Projector Kits and bring the Gospel to the most remote tribes.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-xQhJkA)
---
[**Share the Gospel of Jesus Christ**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._g)
---
These backpack kits will be vital to reaching tribes who are 80% illiterate in Sudan. As you consider a gift today, I hope you'll include our evangelist brothers and sisters - and those we seek to reach with the Gospel - in your prayers. Thank you, and God bless!
---
Brad PhillipsFounder & PresidentPersecution Project Foundation
---
[**Share the Gospel of Jesus Christ**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._JZrv96Tbw7dCvZgXQ)
---

Culpeper, VA 22701

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Friend In Sudan, men, women, and children are suffering under an Islamist-instigated civil war. So far, thousands have been killed and hundreds of thousands displaced. People need basic life-saving items like food, water, shelter, and medical treatment. But people suffering from war and persecution need something else even more: spiritual encouragement and hope. Sharing the power of a loving Christ provides this spiritual hope, while food, water, and medicine provide crisis relief to sustain life. At the Persecution Project Foundation, we share the Gospel of Jesus. This "Good News" truly transforms tribes, communities, nations, families, and individuals. To reach the most remote tribes in places like the Nuba mountains of Sudan, we are equipping teams of evangelists with Backpack Projector Kits to bring an audio/visual witness to a population that is more than 80% illiterate. | | | | | ABOVE: Evangelism Backpacks and pastors traveling to share the Gospel of Jesus Christ In today's Western world, it may not seem like much to you - the ability to access video content - but, in the Nuba mountains of Sudan, access to movies such as The Jesus Film could literally change hearts ... and lives. Each projector system costs about $1,500, plus the cost to transport the backpacks. This means, 15 people giving $100, 30 people giving $50, or 60 people giving $25 would cover the cost of one Evangelism Backpack Projector Kit. If you have the means, just three gifts of $500 or one incredibly generous gift of $1,500 would bring the Good News to the world's most vulnerable citizens. Persecution Project Foundation (PPF) provides active compassion for the persecuted. PPF was founded in 1997 by Brad Phillips. In 1998, Brad traveled to war-ravaged Sudan and shot hours of video chronicling brutal persecution against Christians by the Islamist-led government. During the past 26 years, PPF's journey has brought us to virtually every corner of the Nuba mountains in Sudan. We've helped local pastors plant churches, delivered emergency relief, and built and supplied medical clinics and hospitals. ABOVE: Evangelism Backpacks being utilized to share the Gospel of Jesus Christ Because of His abundant grace, we've provided 1 million+ people with safe water, delivered hundreds of tons of medicine, supplied millions + of pounds of aid to "unreachable" communities, shared hundreds of thousands of Bibles and discipleship materials with churches, trained and encouraged thousands of Pastors ... and so much more. Providing this on-the-ground assistance while restoring hope and rebuilding communities through the love of Christ is a powerful way for our team at PPF to live out our faith. These backpack kits will be vital to reaching tribes who are 80% illiterate in Sudan. As you consider a gift today, I hope you'll include our evangelist brothers and sisters - and those we seek to reach with the Gospel - in your prayers. Thank you, and God bless! Brad PhillipsFounder & PresidentPersecution Project Foundation P.O. Box 1327 Culpeper, VA 22701 Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: Jim Justice's announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Today, I am joining my friend, Governor Jim Justice in West Virginia, to help him announce his campaign for United States Senate. |
Fellow American,

Jim Justice just made it official - he's ready to flip this Senate seat for Republicans in West Virginia.

Fellow American - this is our BEST opportunity to flip a Democrat seat in 2024, and Jim is the only man who can make it happen.

**[Will you take a minute to read this email from him, then watch his launch video?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)**

Jim will be a solid vote for Republicans and he will be a strong voice against China. Our nation, and our economy, needs Jim Justice.

If we want to **SECURE THE SENATE** , we need to support Governor Jim Justice on his launch day!

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

**[P.S. After you've read and watched this video, will you chip in $5 or even $10 and split a donation to help Secure the Senate and the Jim Justice campaign?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)**

* * *

**From:** Gov. Jim Justice
**Date:** Thursday, April 27, 2023
**Subject:** I'm all in for West Virginia
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)
---
Fellow American,

This is West Virginia Governor Jim Justice. I'm writing tonight to let you know that after six highly successful years as governor of the Mountain State, **I'm launching my campaign to be the next United States senator for West Virginia**.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)
I thought long and hard about whether to enter this race. After a lot of prayer and consultation with my family, the conclusion we kept coming to was that **I must do this not only for the people of West Virginia but for every American**.

The stakes in this U.S. Senate race are high.**** Joe Manchin and I have known one another for a very long time, but I'm afraid I cannot stomach the idea of him serving in the Senate any longer. As much as I like Joe Manchin on a personal level, **as long as he represents West Virginia in DC, Chuck Schumer will continue to rule over the Senate with an iron fist.**

**I'm getting into this critical Senate race because we cannot allow a Democrat from a ruby-red state to play kingmaker in D.C. any longer.**
Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's agenda is too disastrous; we must take action TODAY. If you want to see this Senate seat flip Republican,**[can I count on you to chip in $10 to help me unseat Joe Manchin today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)**

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)
**Joe Manchin in the Senate means advancing Biden's failed liberal agenda every day.**

That's how we got The Inflation Reduction Act with its 87,000 new IRS agents.

West Virginians don't need the IRS breathing down their necks,_**nor do you.**_ The voters of the Mountain State have put their faith in me to be their governor over the last six years - **[now I'm asking them, and you, to put your trust in me and help send me to the United States Senate.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)**

As West Virginia's next United States Senator, I will fight for stronger borders and law and order. I'll defend our energy jobs, cut middle-class taxes, end wasteful liberal spending, **and keep radical woke politics out of our kids' classrooms**.

BUT - **[without your help right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)** , none of this will be possible. Joe Manchin has more than $9 million in his campaign accounts, and Democrats in D.C. will spend hundreds of millions to defend this seat because they know that without West Virginia, they can kiss their majority goodbye.

Can my team and I count on your support tonight? We need to make a big splash because Democrats are watching. **[Even if you can only chip in $1 right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)** , I assure you it'll be the best investment you've ever made.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r)
Fellow American, I'm a patriot. I truly am, and our country really means a lot to me. I'm not running out of self-interest. I'm running to serve.

Thank you - **I hope you'll come along for the ride**.

Sincerely,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745620:snO_2WD6N:m:1:877327319:111057B37A9815DCE9CFDBDC7F2E36A5:r) Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| Paid For By Team Graham, Inc.
---

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Asking you to stand up for KS-03:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Folks in Kansas and nationwide have shown time and time again that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work _for them_ , not to increase their own political power or get on TV.

Kansans are facing droughts, high costs of living, and need a new Farm Bill passed into law. But what are my Republican colleagues in the House focused on? Attacking our reproductive rights, undercutting our climate law, and launching partisan political attacks.

It’s mind-boggling. That’s why we must take action now to ensure they’re voted out of power.

**[The first deadline since the Supreme Court listened to our voices and ruled (at least temporarily) in favor of the FDA’s approval of Mifepristone is Sunday at midnight. My team is behind on our goal and needs to raise $11,000 before then to keep organizing for victory. Can you help? _We cannot let Republicans win in Arizona. Not when we need to hold them accountable at the ballot box for the harmful positions they take. We need to fight back now, and we need your help to do it._

**Things are heating up.** GOP candidates are entering races all across Arizona, and our readiness to take them on can be determined by how well we do in these next few days. We cannot go into this next month and run out of the resources we need to take them on.

clean_body: | | | | | | Hi friends. It's Yolanda Bejarano, Chair of the Arizona Democratic Party. On Sunday at midnight, April comes to an end. With races across this state heating up, raising this $10,000 will help us go into the next month ready to take on Republicans and lay the groundwork for winning these elections. We cannot let Republicans win in Arizona. Not when we need to hold them accountable at the ballot box for the harmful positions they take. We need to fight back now, and we need your help to do it. Things are heating up. GOP candidates are entering races all across Arizona, and our readiness to take them on can be determined by how well we do in these next few days. We cannot go into this next month and run out of the resources we need to take them on. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you, Yolanda Bejarano Chair of the Arizona Democratic Party Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Schrier
subject: Reclaiming a pro-choice majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
While Kim is working to protect our rights in Congress, anti-choice Republicans have already made her a top target. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62401184/403336330/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDBkNDNhMS0xNGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDBv656EySIIrM7oIUy1Motuglnz_FL86CSdmsXW1zM=&emci=60749a50-6ee4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=140d43a1-14e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last year, the Supreme Court overturned the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, stripping millions of women of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions.

Now, far-right judges and legislators want to go even further. **A Trump-appointed judge in Texas attempted to ban an abortion pill, and Republicans are working to restrict reproductive rights in Congress.**

As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim will always work to ensure women have access to safe reproductive health care. That's why she's working to protect our rights by passing legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and _the Protecting Reproductive Freedom Act._

But while Kim is working to protect our rights in Congress, anti-choice Republicans have already made her a top target. We need your help to keep Kim in Congress and bring a pro-choice majority back to the House.

**[Will you join Kim in the fight to defend reproductive rights? Before our end-of-month deadline, chip in $5, or whatever you can to help re-elect Kim and take back the House majority today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62401186/403336333/-476631296?refcode=em23_230427_EOM 2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230427_EOM 2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=140d43a1-14e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDBkNDNhMS0xNGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDBv656EySIIrM7oIUy1Motuglnz_FL86CSdmsXW1zM=)**

clean_body: While Kim is working to protect our rights in Congress, anti-choice Republicans have already made her a top target. Peter, Last year, the Supreme Court overturned the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, stripping millions of women of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions. Now, far-right judges and legislators want to go even further. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas attempted to ban an abortion pill, and Republicans are working to restrict reproductive rights in Congress. As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim will always work to ensure women have access to safe reproductive health care. That's why she's working to protect our rights by passing legislation like the Women’s Health Protection Act and the Protecting Reproductive Freedom Act. But while Kim is working to protect our rights in Congress, anti-choice Republicans have already made her a top target. Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=431ec5c67cdb41c09b4fb9098d5473ee&_e=b1xP_bJMkA1FF-bGs8Q0vFg5no94dUuaQThbhae74BzNkVZ_RY03DvEwPV18pvqPDLXn73bYoNb-jRcz8SLQT_SE9hvqzZBTPM8knI1z6LUm55uRFjtM6jqy8r8pietfX70pJ0k4CRwwALVyCM35LfE91Yu725r1kNnRXK4SFKilQcc4IMPtAPX7-tYlP7k2ZrliRBZWUQSsEeaCi6BfmrVvVdzhYqLr0sGrR6jTN_axCcI1hip9gflzjpkC5aHLCS64Dz5EBsvqE_PS1ON05tyCup4RN3Kqy6Lg02iURe6g-aDCzxfIBjASO5ZY1HBf)

When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=431ec5c67cdb41c09b4fb9098d5473ee&_e=b1xP_bJMkA1FF-bGs8Q0vFg5no94dUuaQThbhae74BzNkVZ_RY03DvEwPV18pvqPDLXn73bYoNb-jRcz8SLQT_SE9hvqzZBTPM8knI1z6LUm55uRFjtM6jqy8r8pietfX70pJ0k4CRwwALVyCM35LfE91Yu725r1kNnRXK4SFKj67Ba1XhB7Rt0vdJ6GbvfOM-hDZisk9TNG1psVNdrctHwzodfm7zN8sr05ZLlIzb-814BWqj8zzORERjhNBYs0s-5tUyx4jG89MfYwVw6ig5n9i54mYjhL_yZgMlOoh8stVk9jMkSHqK40MJelISpc)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=431ec5c67cdb41c09b4fb9098d5473ee&_e=b1xP_bJMkA1FF-bGs8Q0vFg5no94dUuaQThbhae74BzNkVZ_RY03DvEwPV18pvqPDLXn73bYoNb-jRcz8SLQT_SE9hvqzZBTPM8knI1z6LUm55uRFjtM6jqy8r8pietfX70pJ0k4CRwwALVyCM35LfE91Yu725r1kNnRXK4SFKhJH4M0vgeqdHsVObDngsogXK6lkJJNn4_3MQ2G546dSd-GjH_OSuLtAZvceDYhRuTYxMkwcT1nlx8dgl_wuPTerO4rxpSDxKnB7lgDDSOnw4eLBiXh-_tauoAMgHEHgob0qMd9cueAG3dO6Rpq-6yc)

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=431ec5c67cdb41c09b4fb9098d5473ee&_e=b1xP_bJMkA1FF-bGs8Q0vFg5no94dUuaQThbhae74BzNkVZ_RY03DvEwPV18pvqPDLXn73bYoNb-jRcz8SLQT_SE9hvqzZBTPM8knI1z6LUm55uRFjtM6jqy8r8pietfX70pJ0k4CRwwALVyCM35LfE91Yu725r1kNnRXK4SFKjEpY4qTfOEdxH--pkIFYnGAHAwnxptCI8sQ7IykjmGXjzb0ygLXJmpLLu2vDPdWxhvlxlT1w3JU8IJodawRm7bgBi2D57UHqNUep5gC942eVUIgDGewY2WDDETjdRZC_ZnGWfyVb1pjdjddQt6SHUE) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=431ec5c67cdb41c09b4fb9098d5473ee&_e=b1xP_bJMkA1FF-bGs8Q0vFg5no94dUuaQThbhae74BzNkVZ_RY03DvEwPV18pvqPDLXn73bYoNb-jRcz8SLQT_SE9hvqzZBTPM8knI1z6LUm55uRFjtM6jqy8r8pietfX70pJ0k4CRwwALVyCM35LfE91Yu725r1kNnRXK4SFKhPy-CDupHJUKYmFo7ERKhghUn6Zv077v3HIJBgBFuskpQorpZ-jO0Ma25joxwRKEbwDLfQJ-pxWtcK7G1ETEDfVldwDPrmUn0wNmD-x2doXgqdrq6S_uCHiwZO5x8Z8_-MQfWyU289ArCFbw4_4pLa)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. clean_body: This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| | | | Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [GOING LIVE] Conversations with Common Sense Conservatives
body:
Peter, I'll be LIVE IN A FEW MINUTES at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and I'll be streaming from A Seat at the Tab
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/14774985cb73998192dfc33fe52e07e7/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRE9GbiIhoHqLOYTrU0rou6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4ExCKUlBaQwB3eti2AwYorJhkKChqBZXV62u7W8uxDOBM3BLV9hKC6Wt4BZaz7_kG0ChRE4d9GGVpkZzytMg0KEulK_7SeL67auJdmOYwzz-92DCKB63uICDV47KnZnoTHRXX_JVIdoFpVm3TtOKiO0S9qXh_NjkbUAtKKVHUn-0Zjm_N_ASSG2KS)

| Peter, **I'll be LIVE IN A FEW MINUTES at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and I'll be streaming from A Seat at the Table—****the hottest convention in New Jersey for those who choose freedom and common sense solutions.** Today we will be having a handful of conversations with common ground conservatives who will be at the event, including Dan Schneider, Corey DeAngelis, Gordon Chang, and Gavin Wax.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/f72d226d9f224a9460f29d748e4acd27/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRE9GbiIhoHqLOYTrU0rou6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4ExCKUlBaQwB3eti2AwYorJhkKChqBZXV62u7W8uxDOBM3BLV9hKC6Wt4BZaz73kG0ChRE4d9GGVpkZzytMg0KEulK_7SeL67auJdmOYwzz-92DCKB63uICDV47KnZnoTHRXX_JVIdoFpVm3TtOKiO0S9qXh_NjkbUAtKKVHUn-0Zjm_N_ASQh2KQ)
---
|
---
| **Dan Schneider** is a lawyer, policy professional, and political strategist. Dan is currently the Vice President of Free Speech America, MRC Business, and the External Affairs division. He previously served as the executive director of the American Conservative Union, which organizes CPAC. His work in government has included roles in the White House, executive branch agencies, the U.S. Senate, and the U.S. House of Representatives. **Corey DeAngelis** is one of the nation's leading authorities on school choice and homeschooling. He has authored or co-authored 32 peer-reviewed studies and more than 100 op-eds in outlets like The Wall Street Journal and USA Today. He's done hundreds of speaking engagements and appears regularly on Fox News. A native of Sacramento, CA he grew up in San Antonio, TX, where he went to a magnet high school, which sparked his interest in school choice.
**Gordon Chang** is the author The Coming Collapse of China and Nuclear Showdown: North Korea Takes On the World. Chang lived and worked in China and Hong Kong for almost two decades. He has given numerous briefings at the National Intelligence Council, the CIA, the State Department, U.S. Strategic Command, and the Pentagon. Chang frequently appears on several major news networks and is a regular co-host on The John Batchelor Show.
**Gavin Wax** is a New York-based conservative activist, commentator, columnist, and operative. Gavin serves as the 76th President of the New York Young Republican Club, the oldest and largest Young Republican club in the country. He was elected unanimously in April 2019 and re-elected unanimously twice in December 2020 and December 2022. There will be a few more surprise guests that will join us as well! Make sure you [**join us now for a very special show (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/0ff44edd15348159d2f5d079c7861d75/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRE9GbiIhoHqLOYTrU0rou6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4ExCKUlBaQwB3eti2AwYorJhkKChqBZXV62u7W8uxDOBM3BLV9hKC6Wt4BZaz7zkG0ChRE4d9GGVpkZzytMg0KEulK_7SeL67auJdmOYwzz-92DCKB63uICDV47KnZnoTHRXX_JVIdoFpVm3TtOKiO0S9qXh_NjkbUAtKKVHUn-0Zjm_N_ASNX2KM) Bill

---

subject: Border crossings are up 25%

body:
the situation isn’t improving

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm21ovjmnl8hjtusd8nvpij6i2c2is3skk7l5s1o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdh6aor2c5h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,

**I'm writing to you because we need your help.**

U.S. Border Patrol encounters of individuals who entered our country at the southwest border in March 2023 totaled 162,317, **_up 25% from 130,024 in February 2023_**. We know that these dangerous crossings are bringing disease and chaos into our country, and we can't let it continue.
**The truth is, the situation at the border is getting worse.**
And it's not just because of the influx of illegal immigrants. It's also because we have so many people who are sick and dying—and who are bringing those diseases into our country.

This is not only a **threat** to our national security, but also to public health and safety. This influx of people has contributed to an increase in crime rates and illnesses such as dengue fever, rabies, and tuberculosis. **[It's time for us to take action before this becomes even worse!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zegoqp1dn9i7gkcmnpvkljq339emjik0op1dliq8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdh6aor2c5h2bs)**

We need to stop this madness before it's too late. _**[Just $5 will make a difference.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb797ts7av9mhfij39uhct7hekp7ahifjbnin8tg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdh6aor2c5h2bs)**_

We know it seems like a lot, but if every American who cares about this country donated just $5, we'd be able to put an end to this crisis.

**[So please consider making a donation today—and tell your friends and family to do the same!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zihikhr7p0lcpfmnmtg9mfgrm3apfjd5q9939p78_rp22sh2s8i66o72cdh6aor2c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

Team Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

name: Whip Jazz Lewis
subject: What a session …
body:
Friend,

This month we wrapped our annual 90-day legislative session. I’m proud of the work we did this session to tackle our community’s most pressing issues and ensure our government serves the people.

For the first time in my tenure in the General Assembly, we had an ally for progress in the Governor’s office. With the support of Governor Moore, we were able to permanently expand the Earned Income Tax Credit , lifting over 30,000 children out of poverty, establish an equitable market for the ballot-approved sale of cannabis , and create programs that allow young Marylanders to explore a career in public service . Our governor says that service is sticky, and I’m a testament to that. In my first year out of college, I worked as a community organizer. It was supposed to be one stop on my journey, and guess what? I never left public service. Service builds empathy and changes lives. I was proud to support this initiative.

I am also very proud of our team's work this term, introducing twelve bills and passing eight. I’ve mentioned a few throughout the session, from deducting union dues to expanding Title IX, but here are a few more of our really exciting wins this session:

HB 12 - The Equitable and Inclusive Transit-Oriented Development Act: Sets aside capital and planning dollars for equitable and inclusive transit-oriented development, including investment in housing, bike and walk lanes, and connecting more workers to jobs without a vehicle.

HB 332 - The Body-Worn Camera Appropriation and Financing Act: Establishes a statewide master contract for the procurement of body-worn cameras benefiting smaller agencies in the state. This will help reduce start-up costs while promoting accountability and transparency that body-worn cameras provide a community.

HB 464 - Prince George’s County Reentry Employment Incentive Program: Funds a community program subsidizing up to $5,000 of the salaries of returning citizens, helping them gain employment, and become fully contributing members of society.

As a member of the Appropriation Committee, I spent most of the legislative session working through the state’s budget and ensuring that our community receives its fair share of our taxpayer dollars. I am really proud that we secured over $513 million for budget priorities for Prince George's County to support big projects. Investments include new school construction, an Oncology Wing at UM Capital Region Medical Center, and smaller community projects at American Legion Posts and community centers. I also jumped into a few new roles on the committee as Chair of Personnel and Vice Chair of Capital subcommittees, where I have an integral part in investing in the state's human and physical infrastructure.

There is always more to be done, but I also recognize that I couldn’t do this work without your faith and support. For that, I am genuinely grateful.

I can’t wait to see what else we can accomplish together.

Jazz

By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hz01xPWa8U6TZN4BL8L0dg2?unsubscribedata=nLyMBvL1wOWPBNIt9MzCEMjhzIjCoT8Imlbl1OrAAHjGRK%2BNwZymmWeGvNyeiMDih%2Bt%2F%2BNxBDNdPINpTIR0Btkgbc%2FNra9crGE6dfEDWdKdlI%2Beyw6GlgFLlRkKDweeo23iZY4EbV2Gd8w%2FVDbcnuCC69T4pleFTqnJbbbloxVc7qszeir74EmKWuyRmm8QLAZPFUuYxtM2a%2F%2B393zfzIERc9%2BglNjEYvK4uGVmfZWPgKRHNImCwVM6NwJHX88O4JG3gQ0gPQinNXaTE6ZR9RhEWbz%2FpSDWIqNiXaFfMpICm2Rdcooh8zhsRELlkgg2Hy17E5my%2BCoAaAR0i%2BsbF7vvUHvDGMcnvTI4ISOww6n2cSYawntgjMa6kWdDPKo5ccKGjAQCLcQW8R9GQBYP7%2BxCeVd9xjoR90TQbEL7Lxk4%2BMYJgZ7hUw8riTTZka6J5 .

This will help reduce start-up costs while promoting accountability and transparency that body-worn cameras provide a community. HB 464 - Prince George’s County Reentry Employment Incentive Program: Funds a community program subsidizing up to $5,000 of the salaries of returning citizens, helping them gain employment, and become fully contributing members of society. As a member of the Appropriation Committee, I spent most of the legislative session working through the state’s budget and ensuring that our community receives its fair share of our taxpayer dollars. I am really proud that we secured over $513 million for budget priorities for Prince George's County to support big projects. Investments include new school construction, an Oncology Wing at UM Capital Region Medical Center, and smaller community projects at American Legion Posts and community centers. I also jumped into a few new roles on the committee as Chair of Personnel and Vice Chair of Capital subcommittees, where I have an integral part in investing in the state's human and physical infrastructure. There is always more to be done, but I also recognize that I couldn’t do this work without your faith and support. For that, I am genuinely grateful. I can’t wait to see what else we can accomplish together. Jazz By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account P.O. Box 341854 Bethesda, MD 20827 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Last week I joined NUHW caregivers on strike.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
The children of Oakland deserve the best care possible — and that’s why we have to support healthcare workers.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=18%2E1163%2EHQnKmO)
Last week, I joined the National Union of Healthcare Worker caregivers on the picket line while they conducted a one-day strike outside the UCSF Benioff Children’s Hospital in Oakland.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230427-1&refcode=em20230427-1?refcode2=18_1163_HQnKmO&akid=18%2E1163%2EHQnKmO)
These women and men are the healers who work tirelessly to care for our sick babies. They took action because they want UCSF to be as committed to the families of the East Bay as they are. **The children of Oakland deserve the best care possible, and that’s why I stand with caregivers to keep care in Oakland.**
**[I’ve always stood strong for workers’ rights — and in Congress, you better believe that I’ll be a relentless fighter in getting our kids and families the high-quality care that they deserve. If you’re with me, please chip in to help this campaign make our voices heard in Washington.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230427-1&refcode=em20230427-1?refcode2=18_1163_HQnKmO&akid=18%2E1163%2EHQnKmO)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230427-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230427-1&refcode2=18_1163_HQnKmO&akid=18%2E1163%2EHQnKmO)**
The communities of the East Bay deserve a representative who will champion our needs — and together, we’ll fight some of our most important fights, _and we will win._
I really appreciate every member of this team. Thank you for all that you do!!
Onward,
Lateefah Simon
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper&refcode=em20230427-1?t=2&refcode2=18_1163_HQnKmO&akid=18%2E1163%2EHQnKmO)**

subject: Nikki Haley Didn’t Mince Words, Makes This Claim Against Biden

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Hi Peter,

I’m reaching out to ask for your help. National Republicans already put me on their top target list going into 2024 and we know they’re getting ready to spend big here in Rhode Island to defeat me and expand their razor-thin House majority.

**Now, we have a monthly fundraising deadline coming up Sunday at midnight and we’re about $6,000 short of our goal.** We’ll win next year if we can keep up our early organizing here in Rhode Island — but that means we need to hit every fundraising benchmark we set, including this one.

National Republicans already put me on their top target list going into 2024 and we know they’re getting ready to spend big here in Rhode Island to defeat me and expand their razor-thin House majority. Now, we have a monthly fundraising deadline coming up Sunday at midnight and we’re about $6,000 short of our goal. We’ll win next year if we can keep up our early organizing here in Rhode Island — but that means we need to hit every fundraising benchmark we set, including this one. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Don’t forget, Republicans came within 4 points of winning last year, so we know they’ll do whatever it takes to defeat us in 2024. name: CAGOP Deadlines
subject: We don’t have much time left.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Republican Party
body:
---
| | | | |
---
| | This is our one shot, Peter. [All eyes are on California. Our Senate seat is WIDE open for the first time in years and the House majority runs through California. This could be HUGE. But we have to be honest, the odds are stacked against us. Adam Schiff just raised $6.5 million for Senate, Democrats announced 7 target Republican races in California, and then our donations came to a standstill...we're in serious danger of failing to meet our fundraising goals. Conservatives only have until TONIGHT to get back on track. Will you rush in a donation to help us meet our goal tonight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62612726:JlAvBNIxN:m:1:3366222934:E869955EF1DBFECF9C4CD533774D3CBD:r " All eyes are on California. Our Senate seat is WIDE open for the first time in years and
the House majority runs through California. This could be HUGE. But we have to be honest, the odds are stacked against us. Adam Schiff just raised
$6.5 million for Senate, Democrats announced 7 target Republican races in California, and then our donations came to a standstill...we’re in
serious danger of failing to meet our fundraising goals. Conservatives only have until TONIGHT to get back on track. Will you rush in $18 to help us
meet our goal tonight? ")
---
| | | | **CAGOP Goal Status: NOT ON TRACK **
---
| | | | [HELP CA CONSERVATIVES >> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62612726:JlAvBNIxN:m:1:3366222934:E869955EF1DBFECF9C4CD533774D3CBD:r)
---
We've seen what one-party rule looks like in California. Soft-on-crime policies, taxes increased time and time again, growth of homeless encampments...all leaving Californians in the dust. The time is now. We must meet our goals; we must take back our state. We're asking one last time: [Will you rush in a donation to help keep Conservatives on track?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62612726:JlAvBNIxN:m:1:3366222934:E869955EF1DBFECF9C4CD533774D3CBD:r "Will you rush in
a donation to help keep Conservatives on track? ") Thanks for your help and commitment, CAGOP
---

[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644adb0ca547b40d931ed126&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774&l=en-US&s=dPVhQ_Mm7S6xzZg_U7amHb05cDM%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644adb0ca547b40d931ed126&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774&l=en-US&s=77WeQtzsTKOltSCHM91bkJx8vlQ%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644adb0ca547b40d931ed126&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774&l=en-US&s=A1zzuiHonHAvuO6UpFV-Tdd3ZmM%3D) Business Insider
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644adb0ca547b40d931ed126&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774%26ss_email_id%3D644adb0ca547b40d931ed126%26ss_campaign_name%3DUpdates%2BSitka%2Bwe%2Badded%2Banother%2Bday%2BToday%2BApril%2B27th%2BNoon-5pm%2B%2540%2BWestmark%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-27T20%253A29%253A18Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774&l=en-US&s=L8NFoHji97rk8xLMREYyoioPct4%3D)
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644adb0ca547b40d931ed126&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774%26ss_email_id%3D644adb0ca547b40d931ed126%26ss_campaign_name%3DUpdates%2BSitka%2Bwe%2Badded%2Banother%2Bday%2BToday%2BApril%2B27th%2BNoon-5pm%2B%2540%2BWestmark%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-27T20%253A29%253A18Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774&l=en-US&s=EmuKnoJhbQG0QjRO-oDYydWX_Xc%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644adb0ca547b40d931ed126&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_644ad9a367ee9d55ee3be774&l=en-US&s=PpCz0JWUQngJy3k5UAoqlH9-hY4%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

Share with 5-10 people. | | | | You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count. | Soldotna was collecting up to 1 signature a minute this weekend, Fairbanks is sending in 3 books, We have finished 3 books on our trip to Juneau, Ketchikan, and Sitka. We have also handed out 5 books (750 Signatures) in Juneau, 2 (300 Signatures) more to Ketchikan, and 7 (1,050 Signatures) here in Sitka. On top of the petitions already here. Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!! Dan Powell 907-942-1312 Thank You Dan!!! | | | | | | | | Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system Business Insider Business Insider Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!! | admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans” An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!! Sign In Person Today Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!! There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000. clean_body: The FIRST deadline that our numbers will be compared head-to-head. | | | Friend, Make no mistake, billions and billions of dollars will be spent by the Democrats to try and stop us from winning back the White House in 2024. And following Biden 's announcement, we have just DAYS left until the end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head for the FIRST TIME. But while Biden relies on Hollywood, the Soros Money Machine, and special interest donors to line his coffers, our campaign has something he NEVER will... ... An entire movement of grassroots patriots like YOU with an unwavering resolve to SAVE our country. No matter how much they spend, no matter how many vicious attacks they throw our way, with YOUR sustained support, we will counter them at every turn. | The fact that the Left has to spend billions of dollars to even compete with our MAGA movement should tell you everything you need to know about Joe Biden and today's Democrat Party. How else would they sell a radical agenda that puts YOU - the American people - DEAD LAST? But even the mountains of cash that they haul in from globalist special interests won't be enough to stop our incredible movement... ...Because patriots like YOU will help us spread the TRUTH that America's choice in 2024 couldn't be any more obvious. Do you want a country that secures OUR borders, or one that secures other nation 's borders? Do you want a country that prioritizes LAW-ABIDING citizens, or one that prioritizes criminals? Do you want a country that seeks TRUE JUSTICE for all, or one that weaponizes its justice system to criminalize dissent and imprison political opposition? Do you want a country that is STRONG, or one that apologizes and bends a knee to the globalist regime? Do you want a country that is PROUD of how far it has come, or one that tries to ERASE its own history? The choice is clear, but to ensure every last voter knows exactly what's at stake in 2024, we MUST outraise Biden and the Democrats at each and every deadline. Thank you, | Donald J. Other staff in the building were supposed to wait behind. Friend, when Nikki heard about this, she hit the ROOF. This wouldn't stand on Nikki’s watch. >From then on, anyone was welcome to ride in the elevator with Nikki. And when they did, she would greet them hello and ask how their day was. And she will bring that same sense of right and wrong to the White House as America’s president. Nikki is battle-tested, passionate about America, and genuinely cares about every person she meets. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: A very important initiative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
To help us prepare to reach such an important target for our campaign, our fundraising team dove into the numbers and did some math:
#
Peter,
Today we're launching a very important initiative to raise $40,000 to help boost our grassroots funded movement by the end of the month. And while we know this sounds like a very ambitious goal — we're hoping that with your support, we can reach it.
To help us prepare to reach such a critical target for our campaign, our fundraising team dove into the numbers and did some math:**if one out of every four people who open this email can contribute at least $16, we'll be well on our way to closing our fundraising gap before midnight on Sunday.**
**[So what do you say, Peter? Can we count on you to be one of the key supporters we need to kick off our fundraising push today? Click here to chip in and boost our grassroots movement.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41711?refcode=em20230427-2416&t=1&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41711?refcode=em20230427-2416&t=20&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)**
We know that you get a lot of emails like these around this time of the month. Urgency is high, and grassroots campaigns like ours need to keep our fundraising on track to ensure we can keep up with our ever changing goals. But Peter, your contribution to this campaign is about much more than reaching a goal.
Every single dollar donated is made by everyday, hard-working people who believe in the power of our grassroots campaign. Whether you're able to contribute $1, $5, or even $50, your support shows our opponents the true strength of our people-centered movement.
**When you make a donation, you prove that the voice of the people is in fact stronger than the influence of lobbyists and interest groups who actively work against our values. But we can't do this without you.[Chip in today to boost our fundraising before Sunday at midnight and ensure that our movement has the tools and resources to thrive.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41711?refcode=em20230427-2416&t=21&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41711?refcode=em20230427-2416&t=22&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)**
Let's do this,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230427-2416-footer&t=23&refcode2=2416_420207_lycchB&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2416%2E420207%2ElycchB)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: One Week Left to Become a 2023 Sustaining Member!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

clean_body: Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=102%2E791427%2EUNMJKS)
Friends -
If you know Ilhan, you probably already know that the _only_ way we fund our campaign for Congress is by lots and lots of people chipping in small amounts when they can.
No corporate PACs. No billionaires waiting in the wings. That's not how Ilhan does things — never has, never will.
It's a huge part of why it's so important that we generate as many grassroots contributions as we possibly can, each and every month.
Some of them will be $3. Others will be $25. And no matter the amount, every single one of them is critical to building a winning campaign.
**[That's why we have to ask, especially since we have just a few days to go before our end-of-month fundraising deadline: Can you chip in $3 or anything you can to Ilhan Omar's re-election campaign today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230427-1-t2&t=2&akid=102%2E791427%2EUNMJKS)**

[Express Donate: $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-apr23.MlxFjL&refcode=em230427-1-t2&t=25&akid=102%2E791427%2EUNMJKS)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230427-1-t2&t=26&akid=102%2E791427%2EUNMJKS)
You may have also noticed that when we talk about our fundraising goals, it's usually not about how many dollars we raise, but how many donations make up that amount.
That's because we know the _best_ way to fund a campaign that can fight back against the right wing and their outside spending is by getting as many real, grassroots supporters involved as possible.

Team Ilhan

There are _a lot_ of candidates in this race running for an office. I’m running to make people’s lives better: with the biggest vision for safer streets, stronger schools, good-paying jobs, and affordable housing in every community. I’ll be an on-the-ground Mayor who shows up and serves the people — not the whims of billionaires or special interests. **Our new ad is all about families, neighborhoods, and big ideas, and I hope you’ll chip in to support it.[Please click to watch our ad and contribute to keep it on air »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62403855/403346745/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQyYzNjMy0xOWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8HIXrSMZ8205ivlai4Xn5PIt4mvmzncwrywX9WXHiE=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62403857/403346747/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQyYzNjMy0xOWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8HIXrSMZ8205ivlai4Xn5PIt4mvmzncwrywX9WXHiE=) | [DONATE TODAY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62403859/403346750/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQyYzNjMy0xOWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8HIXrSMZ8205ivlai4Xn5PIt4mvmzncwrywX9WXHiE=)

I’m the only candidate running on a bold vision for Philadelphia grounded in supporting families, strengthening neighborhoods, and fostering joy. **My plan for a safer Philly invests in people right now.**
We’ve worked hard to build the biggest, most powerful grassroots coalition in this race: the one with the most individual donors and the support of Philly’s teachers, librarians, and social workers.

When we come together, we can do big things. Let's make it happen.
— Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. clean_body: My opponents think my plans are too big. I think their ideas are too small. | = There are a lot of candidates in this race running for an office. I’m running to make people’s lives better: with the biggest vision for safer streets, stronger schools, good-paying jobs, and affordable housing in every community. I’ll be an on-the-ground Mayor who shows up and serves the people — not the whims of billionaires or special interests. Our new ad is all about families, neighborhoods, and big ideas, and I hope you’ll chip in to support it.= = | = My opponents think my plans are too big. I think their ideas are too small. I’m the only candidate running on a bold vision for Philadelphia grounded in supporting families, strengthening neighborhoods, and fostering joy. My plan for a safer Philly invests in people right now. We’ve worked hard to build the biggest, most powerful grassroots coalition in this race: the one with the most individual donors and the support of Philly’s teachers, librarians, and social workers. So please, can you rush a donation of $20.23, or whatever you’re able, to keep our ads on TV and win on May 16th? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = When we come together, we can do big things. Let's make it happen. — Helen Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here: | = Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States | mailto:info@helengym.com Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
