name: Amy Osol
subject: 3, 1,000, 10k, $25
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I have some numbers on my mind today.
Three days left until the end of the month to hit our fundraising goals.
1,000 donors so far have contributed to Bob Lorinser's campaign this cycle
10,000 individuals have contributed since 2022
$25 is the average contribution this year [bit.ly/FundDrBob] .
We have some upcoming bills that we need to pay at the end of the month to keep our campaign infrastructure going, and three days to hit a $10,000 goal to top off March.
Our two-cycle strategy is the most viable
bit.ly/FundDrBob [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
Can you donate right now [http://bit.ly/FundDrBob] and help Dr. Bob Lorinser continue a strong primary fight and bring dignity and integrity to our Congressional seat? We must replace a MAGA extremist and put up the most viable Democrat who can unseat Jack Bergman next fall.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will process immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
Jack Bergman, if running, will likely face a contested primary, so he'll see obstacles before us, and we want to be prepared for any GOP candidate next summer. We need your support and loyalty.
A lot is different this cycle. Ballot name recognition is crucial to a two-cycle strategy. We have the best path to victory in August and November of 2024, but we need your help.
We're restructuring - building a vault, creating field teams, doing massive outreach to local leaders, and creating partnerships with rural organizations to entice their investment in this race.
Here's a personal message from Dr. Bob about why he needs your support today.
Friend, I seek your support in my run for US Congress in Michigan's 1st District.
I'm not naive about the challenges ahead of us. Our country is more divided than ever before in history, but when I consider the state of our District, I think about the fiercely independent nature of the people we serve.
Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula comprise America's most resilient and congenial people.
That's where my faith is; in our people.
It's why I've dedicated my entire life to public service as a social worker for Veterans, a physician for low-income rural families, a diplomat overseas, and a public health medical director.
With your moral, public, or financial support, I intend to bring that service to the United States Congress.
- Can you chip in now [bit.ly/FundDrBob] to help us meet our March monthly goal?
bit.ly/FundDrBob [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Tim Kaine Update (via MarkWarnerVA.com)
subject: FWD: We can’t afford to lose Tim Kaine’s Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We just received this email...

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62403934/403347026/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjA0YzhjOS0xOWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rv-nQfE0TYyC2Xu1F5FqbzWlSb0PFGy1asXzD-FJ2NQ=&emci=45a219ac-6ce4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8b04c8c9-19e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, We just checked our inbox and saw this urgent message below from Tim Kaine’s team: **He’s officially considered a vulnerable incumbent.** _**[So we’re asking you, Derek, if you can step up and split a contribution between Senator Warner and Senator Kaine to fight back against Republicans and the special interests pouring money into winning this seat so we can send Tim Kaine back to the Senate next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62403937/403347029/381491633?refcode=mw_em_230427_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjA0YzhjOS0xOWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rv-nQfE0TYyC2Xu1F5FqbzWlSb0PFGy1asXzD-FJ2NQ=)**_ Tim is an _exceptional_ public servant. Whether he’s passing legislation to support our military and their families in the Commonwealth, lowering the cost of everyday medications, or strengthening our economy, Tim is going to do whatever it takes to be the best public servant he can possibly be and deliver for Virginians. So we need to do everything we can to help him win this race so he can keep making meaningful progress in the Senate. _**[Split a $5 contribution right now to support Senator Kaine’s re-election>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62403941/403347032/381491633?refcode=mw_em_230427_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjA0YzhjOS0xOWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rv-nQfE0TYyC2Xu1F5FqbzWlSb0PFGy1asXzD-FJ2NQ=)**_ Thank you Team Warner —------- Forwarded message ------— Derek, a new report from Morning Consult lists Tim Kaine as a “vulnerable incumbent” in 2024. _**[We can’t afford to lose Tim's Senate seat, so we've set an emergency campaign goal of raising $20,000 by midnight tonight. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for State Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404111/403347691/-1410322864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=&emci=b7767c34-15e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=498b488b-1ae5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) Derek, for so long we have been fighting for a ban on assault weapons for the safety of our nation. The recent shooting at the Covenant Christian school in Tennessee, where 9 people were murdered, was a reminder that our educators, our children, and our most vulnerable citizens aren’t safe in schools. [**We need courageous legislators at all levels of government to fight for common sense gun safety reforms. That’s one of the things I’m going to fight for as your next State Senator — will you make a contribution now so I can get to Richmond and do just that?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404114/403347694/-685578700?refcode=em-20230427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=) **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404117/403347697/-685578700?refcode=em-20230427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=)** This is the same reason 3 Democratic Representatives in Tennessee, Justin Jones, Justin Pearson, and Gloria Johnson, joined a peaceful protest last week at the statehouse to demand stricter gun control laws. As a result, Republicans in the house accused the lawmakers of “disorder and dishonor to the House” and voted to expel them from their elected positions. Let me be clear, Derek: I stand in solidarity with the Tennessee Three. It takes political courage to protest and fight for what’s right in the face of Republican extremism. **In fact, as a Virginia Democratic representative, I stood up to MAGA Republicans and[confronted Donald Trump](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404120/403347700/-685578700?refcode=em-20230427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=) for his extreme xenophobic policies towards recent immigrants and people of color alike. I’m ready to get to the State Senate and stand up against Trumpism and right-wing extremists in the legislature. ** Virginians need a leader who will champion progressive visions and fight against MAGA Republicans — I will be that leader. **[This journey won’t be easy, but together, I know we can achieve it and keep our kids safe, our schools safe, and ensure everyday Virginians live in a healthy community. Will you join me in standing in solidarity with the Tennessee Three by making a contribution right now so we can fight against this type of extremism in the Virginia legislature?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404123/403347703/-685578700?refcode=em-20230427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=)** In solidarity, Dr. Ibraheem Samirah | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404126/403347706/966826497?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=&emci=b7767c34-15e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=498b488b-1ae5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404129/403347709/1897281395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=&emci=b7767c34-15e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=498b488b-1ae5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62404132/403347712/1000175125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OThiNDg4Yi0xYWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v1ecX32wjALwxViDqoj8VGLdGZX1fRu1NEnnXJXKWQ=&emci=b7767c34-15e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=498b488b-1ae5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178)

name: Joe Biden
subject: If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the very beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Folks, did you hear? I’m officially running for reelection.**
When I ran in 2020, I set out to do three things: Restore the soul of our nation, rebuild the backbone of America -- the middle class -- and create a government to work _for_ us, rather than _against_ us.
Together, we took our economy back from the brink. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share. We passed the first federal gun violence prevention legislation in 30 years. We took the strongest action on climate in the world -- I’m not kidding.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._But we’ve got to finish the job._ And I can only do that with you behind me.**
[_So, will you chip in a few bucks -- or even $5 -- split between Kirsten Gillibrand's and my reelection campaigns? clean_body: | | | Folks, did you hear? I’m officially running for reelection. When I ran in 2020, I set out to do three things: Restore the soul of our nation, rebuild the backbone of America -- the middle class -- and create a government to work for us, rather than against us. Together, we took our economy back from the brink. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share. We passed the first federal gun violence prevention legislation in 30 years. We took the strongest action on climate in the world -- I’m not kidding. We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term.But we’ve got to finish the job. And I can only do that with you behind me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Joe Biden and Kirsten Gillibrand: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Grassroots supporters just like you helped elect Kamala, me, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. And I’m so proud of the incredible progress we’ve made together, folks. But every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. I believe this is ours._ = From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Joe = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . Women showed up in 2022 to stop the GOP’s red wave, and they’ve only mobilized further since then. Women are fired up to protect our rights, and we must continue to build on that momentum as we prepare to take back our Democratic majority.

[**_We can’t take any chances in falling behind Republicans and their fundraising operations. Congresswoman Shontel Brown has been named the Communications Task Force Co-Chair of the Democratic Women’s Caucus. = With an unprecedented number of women serving in the 118th Congress, we have a unique opportunity to ensure that our voices are heard. But, Peter, we must start investing early to break the GOP’s slim majority in the House and pass critical legislation like the Women’s Health Protection Act. = = Shontel is ready to use this critical position to elevate the wins achieved in Congress for women. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2697c8f0dc4c447ea0505a8a794f4563&_e=PforBeZkR0gsHyvbqst96RjOY2Sxy2hHd2K5PFuvQQnA9L89qX99hTRQ8S5qhUBVLCYVrdUFhUFBnvqK9oU5AGZecYfQzAbBBTi2gmHQP7pGf-NOZGM4QiYy7kdinrcNkOuk1qoIPh1KlAEyXoCrD0z_9lnbiwU4pCtii37-xn-RObyKqTAVY0iDxYBbsoNzvJgApo23DEjFFE4wdWEUrjLPOU6qOhUuqJJKvpqJ_H2QRrunyP7kO8VkNncRphbnoc6-wrUoysxwPlpodyqLYg%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2697c8f0dc4c447ea0505a8a794f4563&_e=PforBeZkR0gsHyvbqst96RjOY2Sxy2hHd2K5PFuvQQnA9L89qX99hTRQ8S5qhUBVLCYVrdUFhUFBnvqK9oU5AGZecYfQzAbBBTi2gmHQP7pGf-NOZGM4QiYy7kdinrcNsT6-3YFaubmO1lsb-lmqgbd7mzLDLZ1QMwvikfdsphj8ki55KXsntt2elPZmUkPwFoQupPisTug-g-8NGlb9W7PpZpQaE3L3lmupCSH5TK5zYkVvvQcihqqDr9lEydMNJMSzzwHXFNxcXze0ITyoXw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2697c8f0dc4c447ea0505a8a794f4563&_e=PforBeZkR0gsHyvbqst96RjOY2Sxy2hHd2K5PFuvQQnA9L89qX99hTRQ8S5qhUBVLCYVrdUFhUFBnvqK9oU5AGZecYfQzAbBBTi2gmHQP7pGf-NOZGM4QiYy7kdinrcN1zVxJK_5ZnC_ti6uJcML0UqM0venZ3VUJg4x6suQz4--oIPSc5YunBuIKrBG1_lkGRMvnOI-jDXQYrjbvgZlfphfBn76pyObKvmqzrgorUdPGMpaBZBF8AvU7AuwritDqurZac1fuv5utw19MBIC-Q%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. This is a HUGE deal for the team — especially for Brandon — because it’s a public display of the campaign’s momentum going into November (and yes, even our opponent, Tate Reeves, will see these numbers.) name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWt1WoWDNO

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You
love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWt1WoWDNO

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand

WHAT
the Constitution says;
HOW
it relates to current issues and events; and
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61745326:Wt1WoWDNO:m:3:2532013465:4F21C0B2083329D3B4C9ED2EB2E7DCCA:r

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says Please see a special message from our sponsor: Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. Your leadership and knowledge are needed today… We need more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! For our children, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72053188195-echo3-A6E80F8B5E3E78409F2039AEC853AF36@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

Team, here at All On The Line we strive to ensure folks like you know how to get involved within your community to advocate for fair maps and democracy. But we know sometimes it’s hard to figure out where to start or how to speak up about issues that matter to you. **That’s why it’s important to craft your story.**
[**Join All On The Line Storytelling Training:
Sharing Your Story For Impact

clean_body: | Team, here at All On The Line we strive to ensure folks like you know how to get involved within your community to advocate for fair maps and democracy. But we know sometimes it’s hard to figure out where to start or how to speak up about issues that matter to you. That’s why it’s important to craft your story. During this virtual event, attendees will learn: ➡️ How to develop their story. ➡️ How to use their story to create change in communities of interest. ➡️ How to use their story to inspire and organize people to get involved. When it comes to changing minds and creating change, the most impactful tool is your voice. We hope to see you there! \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. | | | **Ron DeSantis is a terrible governor, and Florida legislators need to[impeach and remove him now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T952b9f1d-dea0-476b-9ae9-239ddc8545f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** His Covid policies were an absolute disaster, and were based on junk science, lies, and outright stupidity. He has pitted Floridians against one another, and **he has trampled on basic rights** in order to appeal to the idiot base of the Republican party for a run for president. He's even abused his power to go after Disney -- because it had the audacity to speak out against his "Don't Say Gay" policy. He is a disaster, and it's time for Florida's leaders to LEAD and kick him out. [**Add your name, and tell them to impeach DeSantis.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d601d57-b20e-47eb-9b87-c2df83a4d2a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:

Hi Peter, I have a personal request: [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]Will you make a
contribution ahead of the first monthly fundraising deadline of my
reelection campaign? I’ll explain more in just a moment.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-launch23.Givb53&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ve been working hard in the Senate for the past few years to pass
legislation that addresses the issues that matter most to Wisconsin’s
working families. From lowering the cost of insulin and other life-saving
prescriptions to protecting marriage equality, I’m proud of the positive
change we’ve made in the Senate.

But there’s more to be done, and it's clear now more than ever that we
need to hold onto our Democratic Senate majority to keep up the progress
our working families are counting on.

You see, Senate Republicans’ agenda has become more and more extreme.
They’re threatening cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and even voting
to limit reproductive healthcare access for veterans. It’s unacceptable.

That’s why we need to protect our Democratic Senate majority. But
Democrats will be on defense across the country next year — including here
in Wisconsin. You can bet dollars to donuts Mitch McConnell and his
right-wing allies will do and spend whatever it takes to flip my seat and
reclaim the Senate majority.

But this team is no stranger to a tough fight. We’ve proved over and over
again that the strength of our grassroots team is no match for right-wing
special interests and dark money groups.

Now, we all need to step up to be victorious once more. We’ve done it
before, and I know we can do it again. That’s why I’m humbly asking:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]Will you pitch in ahead of our end-of-month deadline to protect my
Senate seat and our Democratic majority? We have a tough fight ahead of
us, but together, I know this team is capable of anything.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-launch23.l0WzBv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-launch23.zrlp7O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1014&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-launch23.xa76pe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1015&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-launch23.Givb53&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM1_V1_S1&t=1016&akid=218%2E35263%2EGDA6p1 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

Thanks for reading and pitching in today,
Peter.

More soon,

Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

subject: Big endorsement
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62408052/403360836/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmRkYjk0ZS0yMmU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8L_r_Q3sds-9wvDGzqsfRLTbZU2E_yU12irLQTAjek=)
Peter, I've got some exciting news:

**My campaign was just endorsed by End Citizens United and Let America Vote -- two of the largest grassroots organizations working to fix our broken campaign finance laws.**

I just got to Congress, but it doesn't take years in the beltway to see that big money has had a corrupting influence in Washington. The _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision opened the floodgates to special interests spending _billions_ polluting our elections with misleading smears and dirty hit pieces.

**We would know, Peter. Republican super PAC spending was rampant in our 2022 campaign, and since they're funded with undisclosed dark money, there was no way to hold bad actors accountable for their dishonesty.**

I’m fighting to reverse this decision and restore the voice of the people in our democracy. That's why I’m so proud of this endorsement, and I hope you'll join End Citizens United in supporting my campaign:

[**Help us build on the momentum of this endorsement by making a donation of $3 toward our April fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62408053/403360852/-665437442?refcode=em-4.27.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmRkYjk0ZS0yMmU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8L_r_Q3sds-9wvDGzqsfRLTbZU2E_yU12irLQTAjek=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62408054/403360853/-665437442?refcode=em-4.27.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmRkYjk0ZS0yMmU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8L_r_Q3sds-9wvDGzqsfRLTbZU2E_yU12irLQTAjek=)

---

The corruption we need to weed out in Congress goes beyond unfettered election spending. I’m also supporting legislation that would ban members of Congress from trading stocks while serving. I also back bills like the **Anti-Corruption and Public Integrity Act** which would make sweeping reforms to lobbying rules and close the "revolving door."

The American people deserve to know their elected officials work for them -- not the special interests. That's a fight I’m committed to.

[**If you support bold campaign finance reform, chip in a donation to support my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62408064/403360865/-665437442?refcode=em-4.27.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmRkYjk0ZS0yMmU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8L_r_Q3sds-9wvDGzqsfRLTbZU2E_yU12irLQTAjek=)

Thanks,

Eric

clean_body: | = Peter, I've got some exciting news: My campaign was just endorsed by End Citizens United and Let America Vote -- two of the largest grassroots organizations working to fix our broken campaign finance laws. I just got to Congress, but it doesn't take years in the beltway to see that big money has had a corrupting influence in Washington. The Citizens United Supreme Court decision opened the floodgates to special interests spending billions polluting our elections with misleading smears and dirty hit pieces. We would know, Peter. Republican super PAC spending was rampant in our 2022 campaign, and since they're funded with undisclosed dark money, there was no way to hold bad actors accountable for their dishonesty. I’m fighting to reverse this decision and restore the voice of the people in our democracy. That's why I’m so proud of this endorsement, and I hope you'll join End Citizens United in supporting my campaign: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The corruption we need to weed out in Congress goes beyond unfettered election spending. I’m also supporting legislation that would ban members of Congress from trading stocks while serving. I also back bills like the Anti-Corruption and Public Integrity Act which would make sweeping reforms to lobbying rules and close the "revolving door." The American people deserve to know their elected officials work for them -- not the special interests. That's a fight I’m committed to. = Thanks, Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, Adam came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. name: John Kasich
subject: Hope works
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
How much more evidence do they need that fueling anger and grievances is a losing formula?| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=86133b745a70494593a47c9c5470238d&_e=fFLnuWtRZd3f8bapYwgzew4F7RictCyUeVGPB-uvGv2sKbepdk5H6Sx9K1XN4sjG0Nf5_U6zN6GUeD-bJeyIdSoiWNBDSsnfyOHVKJnOC8I_GrLpQt4Mp-SeYNk2rBGXb_17pWvjnhyRwfon67LggwvPZrnSJiUqdsXbhGFfAEy33WkO1FmKwZFPXmi2oMyxYozyeIGEnc05ZV02_IEtpA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, To be an effective leader sometimes means that you end up walking a lonely road. There are times when you need to put the politics aside and advocate for things that may be tough for some people to hear. When I look around and see the Republicans who are running for president, I remain baffled why, for the most part, they refuse to offer a hopeful vision for America. They need to be talking about their ideas and why they are running for President. It's almost as if they're all competing to be selected as Trump's running-mate rather than beating him to save the Republican Party and bring America together to make us stronger. **How much more evidence do they need that fueling anger and grievances is a losing formula? Just look the results:** **• 2018:** Republicans lost 41 seats in the U.S. House of Representatives and Democrat Nancy Pelosi became Speaker again. **• 2020:** Trump lost the White House, Democrats secured the majority in the U.S. Senate and held their majority in the U.S. House. **• 2021:** In two very winnable special elections, and largely because of Trump's false election claims, Republicans lost two U.S. Senate runoff elections and the Democrats maintained control of the U.S. Senate. **• 2022:** Democrats expanded their U.S. Senate majority, and while Republicans barely gained control of the U.S. House by five seats, they've largely been ineffective leading with such a narrow majority. **I recently discussed this with NBC's Chuck Todd:**
---
|
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=86133b745a70494593a47c9c5470238d&_e=fFLnuWtRZd3f8bapYwgze1O8hyIbcJS8KxbET4gJyBEmONN5cRhmHvKKH8QvAXbU1QnSD7mEHeCR4OZdzGd5lZedeVMxWqN0YAr3-l0bSktFp2jshoOnWUApJyD6a1nVxr5pRfO5ZvZXMLW51kLuUMu9BsA50VJy0686BnVFv7hFlI05_oReOCjQ1o3b2Cy5QiEXA37ZfWS7QaFKWUxwEGQzKjBr5Ap3S03foNotbP4%3D "Hope Works")
|

Peter, we can’t say this enough: Every elected office has a role to play in defending our essential rights and making sure that all our communities have a voice in the rooms where decisions are made. **That’s why today we’re highlighting three trailblazing Emerge alums who are making a difference on the judicial bench, in the sheriff’s office, and in the district attorney’s office. Take a minute to meet them now!**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62409321/403365545/-1657939538?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=jtk1194-fr-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzNDQwOTY2LTI1ZTUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=soM-01yuAvpcVo1hNyqOcKQctGGb85uV7igWFObB-vk=)**
**Judge Shannon Baldwin (Emerge Texas)** made history as the first Black and LGBTQ+ woman to run and preside over the Harris County court. A public servant since the age of 17, Judge Baldwin holds fast to the belief that everyone deserves to have their rights protected. She continues to advocate for the wellbeing of those who have been harmed, while protecting access to fair trials for all defendants.
**Sheriff Kristin Graziano (Emerge South Carolina)** is a 33-year law enforcement veteran and the first woman and LGBTQ+ person ever elected to serve as sheriff in her state. After spending years walking her beat to get to know her community deeply, Graziano is now serving as a bridge builder and ensuring the community has a seat at the table when it comes to public safety decisions.
**Deborah Gonzalez (Emerge Georgia)** is the first Latina to be elected to the district attorney’s office in Georgia, and the first woman elected in her circuit. She is also the first Puerto Rican woman to serve in this role nationwide! A trailblazer many times over, Gonzalez’s perspective will help ensure her office can effectively support all the communities it represents. She is especially dedicated to ending the school-to-prison pipeline and helping young people of all backgrounds thrive.
Peter, to achieve a truly inclusive democracy, one where all our communities enjoy fair representation and truly meaningful support, we must elevate bold Democratic women who understand the communities they serve. **That’s why Emerge is working tirelessly to recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to lead at every level of office in every state. But we can’t sustain our efforts without your help, Peter. So please:**
**[Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge now to empower MORE bold Democratic women to run, win, and lead at every level of our government?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62409322/403365547/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1194-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzNDQwOTY2LTI1ZTUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=soM-01yuAvpcVo1hNyqOcKQctGGb85uV7igWFObB-vk=) **
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express your contribution will go through immediately. _

clean_body: | | | | | Emerge has one goal: recruit and train Democratic women who will flip seats blue up and down the ballot and lead a Democratic wave across the country. = | | = Peter, we can’t say this enough: Every elected office has a role to play in defending our essential rights and making sure that all our communities have a voice in the rooms where decisions are made. That’s why today we’re highlighting three trailblazing Emerge alums who are making a difference on the judicial bench, in the sheriff’s office, and in the district attorney’s office. Take a minute to meet them now! = Judge Shannon Baldwin (Emerge Texas) made history as the first Black and LGBTQ+ woman to run and preside over the Harris County court. A public servant since the age of 17, Judge Baldwin holds fast to the belief that everyone deserves to have their rights protected. She continues to advocate for the wellbeing of those who have been harmed, while protecting access to fair trials for all defendants. Sheriff Kristin Graziano (Emerge South Carolina) is a 33-year law enforcement veteran and the first woman and LGBTQ+ person ever elected to serve as sheriff in her state. After spending years walking her beat to get to know her community deeply, Graziano is now serving as a bridge builder and ensuring the community has a seat at the table when it comes to public safety decisions. Deborah Gonzalez (Emerge Georgia) is the first Latina to be elected to the district attorney’s office in Georgia, and the first woman elected in her circuit. She is also the first Puerto Rican woman to serve in this role nationwide! A trailblazer many times over, Gonzalez’s perspective will help ensure her office can effectively support all the communities it represents. She is especially dedicated to ending the school-to-prison pipeline and helping young people of all backgrounds thrive. Peter, to achieve a truly inclusive democracy, one where all our communities enjoy fair representation and truly meaningful support, we must elevate bold Democratic women who understand the communities they serve. That’s why Emerge is working tirelessly to recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to lead at every level of office in every state. But we can’t sustain our efforts without your help, Peter. So please: = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express your contribution will go through immediately. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being a part of our movement, Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. Hi there – it's nearly summertime and unfortunately, my campaign is still paying down the bills we accrued to win in November.

You see, in the days before Election Day, pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win.

Polls were tightening and the GOP was shoveling money into New Hampshire to defeat us.

We had to take on debt to fund our response. The good news is that it worked, and we won.

Those outstanding bills make emails like this one extremely important.
If we’re going to pay it down according to schedule, I need 17 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. [**Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62409774/403366646/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2263-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlmMGU2MC0yNWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHYucj-TNKPWfc52AWI_5Z4fQvxnmEH4uHHZEZlQE_g=)
Thanks so much. With our fundraising numbers made public each quarter, we can’t afford to fall short.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: the GOP's priorities are out of whack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Our children deserve leaders who prioritize their safety over guns and the gun lobby.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62410788/403370362/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230427-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDE3ZDczMC0yOGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjQ_wMkOnAMl71zokBdTTWv60LPIW6o0D68NfcJiHMA=)
---
| Peter,

The Republican Party have made their priorities clear.

As communities across the US grapple with gun violence, Republicans are focused on banning books and restricting LGBTQ+ rights. **But when it comes to banning assault weapons, Republicans choose to turn a blind eye.**

name: Jim Renacci
subject: ICYMI: More support to secure your vote!
body:
Read this then sign the petition to secure your vote!
| |
---
ICYMI: GOP Chair Endorses Growing Calls to Secure Ohio's Primary
NEW OP-ED: Portage County GOP Chair Endorses Growing Calls to Secure Ohio's Primary
"It’s critical that we protect that process from outside interference." In a Sunday op-ed in the Tribune Chronicle, Amanda Suffecool, the chairman of the Portage County Republican Party, officially endorsed the growing movement to secure Ohio's primary and require voters to register with a party in advance before casting a ballot with that party.
"We welcome anyone to join the Republican Party and participate in this process," Amanda said, "but it needs to be a conscious and genuine decision by a voter to align with the GOP, not a bet-hedging strategy taken by a partisan Democrat on Primary Day." "It’s critical that we protect that process from outside interference, which is why I support the growing movement in Ohio to stop partisan Democrats from voting in our Republican primaries," she wrote. "Amanda has worked tirelessly to grow the Ohio Republican Party for years," Jim Renacci said in a statement. "She's seen first hand what Republicans across the state are coming to recognize: our party's nominating contests will never truly be safe and transparent until we stop loyal Democrats from raiding our primary elections. Our Republican leaders in Columbus need to act now to right this wrong."
[Click here](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxcUT2PnDAQ_TVD5xWMjc0WFJsQpEhJk-LalbG9y9z5g8NGK_59xN3mirRvnt7X6LB4uu09qG-AOJPNgAj8Aohiv_z-M7f70rK3d8F0DD-OG34HxLIv7ov41Di5oMkfqBoq28vpbGXl-kZ2KLFu6nM191bdzkq5huNZC2eda4Wpp7OQDaqJo6ioxxp5LVA1HXbYnoxVqmtl11phOtkJEHU4vVJYXdTG0MmkUPl-LmXJH2lGwPHxeJzKSlNJVu8HA3BMC0VKEXC8by4XZpLfQqRcMuB4eAKOtQAcl5WCXslllue0ecsmxzwFKs6yktii17IfNnzcSrgGZ2kLwIdneXmAOW2rccCHaPz1uc7zZHRYNN0j8OGzJsvb7eZMSv765fyPm2JxsXzqsN2-vA66NS8XQHmNnizw4T_w4398eHsXP5tftlp7uzzIe8pSgajvR8Rjjr8BAAD__42Wnwo) to read online and share on social media.
_**I NEED YOUR HELP!**_ SIGN THIS PETITION! then forward this email and get your circle of influence to sign on so we can get our Primary Elections CLOSED in Ohio. We need to be more like Florida and Kentucky, where democrats cannot walk into the voting booth on election day, grab a republican ballot and vote for a RINO. Click the button below!

clean_body: Read this then sign the petition to secure your vote! | | ICYMI: GOP Chair Endorses Growing Calls to Secure Ohio's Primary NEW OP-ED: Portage County GOP Chair Endorses Growing Calls to Secure Ohio's Primary "It’s critical that we protect that process from outside interference." In a Sunday op-ed in the Tribune Chronicle, Amanda Suffecool, the chairman of the Portage County Republican Party, officially endorsed the growing movement to secure Ohio's primary and require voters to register with a party in advance before casting a ballot with that party. "We welcome anyone to join the Republican Party and participate in this process," Amanda said, "but it needs to be a conscious and genuine decision by a voter to align with the GOP, not a bet-hedging strategy taken by a partisan Democrat on Primary Day." "It’s critical that we protect that process from outside interference, which is why I support the growing movement in Ohio to stop partisan Democrats from voting in our Republican primaries," she wrote. "Amanda has worked tirelessly to grow the Ohio Republican Party for years," Jim Renacci said in a statement. "She's seen first hand what Republicans across the state are coming to recognize: our party's nominating contests will never truly be safe and transparent until we stop loyal Democrats from raiding our primary elections. Our Republican leaders in Columbus need to act now to right this wrong." to read online and share on social media. I NEED YOUR HELP! SIGN THIS PETITION! then forward this email and get your circle of influence to sign on so we can get our Primary Elections CLOSED in Ohio. We need to be more like Florida and Kentucky, where democrats cannot walk into the voting booth on election day, grab a republican ballot and vote for a RINO. Click the button below! | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 www.JimRenacci.com

Fellow conservative,

In 2016, President Trump put us on a path to prosperity. But in only three years, Joe Biden and the Left have undone all of his successes.

Now in 2023, China is buying our land, drugs are pouring across our borders, our tax dollars are flowing into foreign countries, and our jobs are disappearing overseas.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. body:
| Peter,

In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [pitch in to support Upset the Setup and my campaign for U.S. Senate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62411071/403371560/1815789988?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230427_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNWVlMjkyLTI5ZTUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xP6PuMFI_Dlyf78swO_LhSclZwPmsgzFGnvyGgsGDEw=) ahead of Sunday’s April fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?

Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.

As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, Tucker Carlson, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.

Earlier this month, McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.

**It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit Sunday’s April fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.**

Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable. As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, Tucker Carlson, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day. Earlier this month, McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Hey there, it’s Conor — Gabe’s campaign manager. Reaching out because **three days from now, we face our FIRST fundraising deadline since our former far-right opponent Yvette Herrell officially announced her 2024 rematch against Gabe.** Herrell and her far-right extremist buddy Kevin McCarthy think they can flip this seat back to red next November so they can hold their House majority and continue to push an extreme agenda against New Mexicans’ freedoms and wellbeing. While they want to rip away reproductive rights, repeal historic investments in infrastructure and climate action, cut Social Security and Medicare, and eliminate thousands of jobs, Gabe is focused on fighting for the people of New Mexico’s 2nd District. As Gabe stands up to Big Oil & Gas CEOs, demands better housing conditions for our veterans and energy workers, and defends every woman’s right to choose, he has less time to focus on fundraising than he did last year. **That’s why I’m asking: can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal by 11:59 PM on Sunday, April 30?** Here’s your personal link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vas-email-apr2023/personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62411723/403373286/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230427eom2_cm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjQ4ZjdkMi0yYmU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixRWivlFo-8rcA1Dawr-PvF01uNavCwqOxHsAdcNVmI=)** This people-powered movement won and flipped NM-02 blue in 2022 because of grassroots supporters like YOU contributing what you could along the way. If we’re going to defend this Frontline seat and keep Gabe in Congress this time around, we need that same support! Thanks for everything you do, Conor

Today, I’m traveling to New Hampshire – home of the **FIRST PRIMARY** in the nation.
Now that Joe Biden is officially in the race, I want to lock up the Republican nomination as quickly as possible so that we can focus 100% of our time on winning back the White House.
_**Soros himself has said that he’s hoping for a long drawn-out Republican primary so he can quietly buy the White House for Biden.**_
We’re not going to let that happen.
With your support, we will take our DOUBLE-DIGIT LEAD in the primary and soar even higher so that the primary is effectively OVER.
That’s why – while I travel to First-In-The-Nation New Hampshire today – I’m asking you to make a contribution to our Primary Victory Fund before the April end-of-month deadline.

clean_body: FIRST-IN-THE-NATION New Hampshire! | | | Friend, Today, I’m traveling to New Hampshire – home of the FIRST PRIMARY in the nation. Now that Joe Biden is officially in the race, I want to lock up the Republican nomination as quickly as possible so that we can focus 100% of our time on winning back the White House. Soros himself has said that he’s hoping for a long drawn-out Republican primary so he can quietly buy the White House for Biden. We’re not going to let that happen. With your support, we will take our DOUBLE-DIGIT LEAD in the primary and soar even higher so that the primary is effectively OVER. That’s why – while I travel to First-In-The-Nation New Hampshire today – I’m asking you to make a contribution to our Primary Victory Fund before the April end-of-month deadline. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
Join us this Saturday
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LAHtIiiuwc8FDSlguPquR2tFT5q1t_MjMe6TINch3NyG2SyHHvPSDT_3QXPTIui46eNTpmJ90Ip2Iaop9ob3hNqGb1sIehtdK3COMec2KWr7wqArKYzIrDL-S-kd7zpy1HIVhbjdV1EL5LeW9l514TdTSVnnucCIXGWISKD21m8=&c=sGbpzLgg-8Ut6S6zOjQkQ58IR7aJ7hV3wCWrBjBVtFtwiuplIxFLGA==&ch=PpAekb_e1mvbia6icbNeGmB8w-jlFfv-dhsBb6Ht8G6Mxhoq9_KDTQ==)

| Super Saturday
---
| Join us to Knock Doors
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Friends,

Join us this Saturday at 10am at our campaign office, located at 1108 Courthouse Rd. North Chesterfield, VA 23236. We plan to meet at the office before heading out to hit the neighborhoods.

We need your support. I am the most conservative candidate in this race and we need to let Republican primary voters know that. Also, the later date of June 20th has created some problems for some voters, so we need to reach them now to let know that early voting starts May 5th.

And you don't have to wait until Saturday to help. Our campaign office is open during the week. [Please email us](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com) to let us know you can help.

We look forward to seeing you this week.
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

North Chesterfield, VA 23236. We plan to meet at the office before heading out to hit the neighborhoods. We need your support. I am the most conservative candidate in this race and we need to let Republican primary voters know that. Also, the later date of June 20th has created some problems for some voters, so we need to reach them now to let know that early voting starts May 5th. And you don't have to wait until Saturday to help. Our campaign office is open during the week. mailto:chris@chaseforva.com to let us know you can help. We look forward to seeing you this week. # Best Products for Side Sleepers
Not only is side sleeping preferred by 60% of adults, but it is also considered to be one of the healthiest sleep positions. Side sleeping offers many benefits, from improved spinal alignment to a reduced risk of snoring, heartburn, and back pain. **To unlock the full potential of these benefits, you’ll want to also find the right products to support your sleep. Discover the best mattresses, pillows, and mattress toppers for side sleepers!**

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley: The GOP’s most vulnerable U.S. Senator in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
From his own former mentor to reliable GOP mega-donors, Josh Hawley’s support base has abandoned him.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley did more than just prove that he’s a fraud and a coward when he ran away after raising his fist at the Capitol on January 6th — **he made himself the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election in 2024.**
**FIRST:** Hawley’s mentor, three-term U.S. Senator Jack Danforth — a Missouri GOP icon who cleared the field for Hawley in 2018 — says supporting him was _“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”_
**THEN:** Missouri GOP mega-donor David Humphreys, whose family and network gave a combined $4.4 MILLION to Hawley’s statewide campaign in 2016, called him “undemocratic” and a “political opportunist” who “should be censured by his Senate colleagues.”
**AND NOW:** Just yesterday, Big Tech billionaire Peter Thiel — who’s donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to Hawley’s campaigns over the years — announced he won’t support _any_ Republicans this election cycle because of their out-of-touch culture wars.
**Almost all of Josh Hawley’s support base has abandoned him** — and a poll last month showed him facing “intensely negative sentiments” in Missouri, with 39% of voters holding STRONGLY unfavorable views.
**We have a real opportunity to defeat Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for the people next year, but none of this means it’s going to be easy.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31719?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_)**
**GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are already working overtime to make Josh Hawley look strong.** They’ve launched a string of desperate attacks at Lucas and — on the very last day of the most recent FEC fundraising quarter — used their joint committee with Hawley to transfer _$250,000_ directly to his campaign.
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend in the off-year, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks and put Hawley’s campaign in the position to win.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to raise the kind of money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley and get our positive vision for Missouri in front of voters as soon, and as often, as possible.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? Our best shot at building a winning campaign is keeping up our record-breaking momentum — and we need your support to do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31719?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31720?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31720?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31720?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31720?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31720?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31720?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31719?refcode=em20230427-3052&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_)
---
Thank you,
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230427-3052-footer&t=10&refcode2=3052_614464_8bbyX_&akid=3052%2E614464%2E8bbyX_)**

name: Helene (Kirsten's daughter)
subject: Would you endorse my mom's campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
My mom, Kirsten Engel, has always prioritized running people-powered campaigns.
Even while her opponents were accepting big checks from special interests, my mom stuck to her principles. She got into politics to fight for her constituents, not for corporate agendas. And last year, despite being outspent 6:1, my mom lost by a tiny margin — proving how powerful grassroots support can be.
My mom is running to represent everyone in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District, and to fight for the issues that matter most to them. As we gear up for this ultra-competitive race, we want to show how much support she has.
You don't have to be a big politician for your endorsement to matter. Because every person who takes a minute to support my mom in this race WILL make a difference.
Will you sign on now to become a Community Endorser for my mom's campaign for AZ-06? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D1CzVtM2PE6C-k7Hr4AyVg2]
Become a Community Endorser [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D1CzVtM2PE6C-k7Hr4AyVg2]
Thank you so much!
— Helene, Kirsten Engel's Daughter
Donate now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042723_CommunityEndorser]
Donate monthly >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042723_CommunityEndorser&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042723_CommunityEndorser [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042723_CommunityEndorser] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042723_CommunityEndorser]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Folks: This new poll just stressed just how much the GOP's attacks on our electoral process have impacted poll workers → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_042723_b1_election-workers_30ac&amount=20] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_042723_b1_election-workers_30ac&amount=20] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_042723_b1_election-workers_30ac&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_042723_b1_election-workers_30ac&amount=25]
Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible!
But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. That’s why nearly HALF of election officials fear for their safety. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_042723_b1_election-workers_30ac&amount=20]
We can’t let election deniers push conspiracy theories and legislation that disenfranchises voters. We need to do everything in our power to DEFEAT them and elect Democrats who will protect the sacred right to vote.
With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy - but that takes grassroots support!
That’s why we’re asking you to chip in anything you can to help us crush our daily fundraising goal and elect Democratic Secretaries of State. Please, chip in now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_042723_b1_election-workers_30ac&amount=20]

clean_body: [] Folks: This new poll just stressed just how much the GOP's attacks on our electoral process have impacted poll workers → [] [] [] Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible! But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. That’s why nearly HALF of election officials fear for their safety. [] We can’t let election deniers push conspiracy theories and legislation that disenfranchises voters. We need to do everything in our power to DEFEAT them and elect Democrats who will protect the sacred right to vote. With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy - but that takes grassroots support! That’s why we’re asking you to chip in anything you can to help us crush our daily fundraising goal and elect Democratic Secretaries of State. Please, chip in now >> [] Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in $250 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. The study shows that, following the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , more than **66,000 people** seeking abortions were unable to receive care in their home state — and those numbers are from last year _alone_. **The current abortion climate is untenable.**

That 66,000 people are not getting the help they need is entirely unacceptable, and we know the abortion landscape is only getting more dire, with states like Florida — one of the few places in the South where abortion is somewhat accessible — passing increasingly restrictive bans.

So, what can we do? How do we fight back? The solution isn't easy, but it's simple: **We elect Democratic pro-choice women at every level of government, all across the country.** We put women in power who will fight for our freedom. ****Donate now to help hit our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and support women who will fight to preserve, expand, and restore abortion rights _everywhere_ :**

Here’s what they had to say about our people-focused, grassroots campaign: _“The New Jersey Forward Party is proud to announce its official endorsement of Mayor Joe Signorello for the United States Senate. Joe has demonstrated a strong commitment to the values and principles that the party stands for, and his dedication to advocating for the citizens of New Jersey has solidified the party’s decision to support his candidacy._ _His unwavering commitment to democracy reform and his pragmatic, results-oriented approach to addressing critical issues make him the ideal candidate for the U.S. Senate. The NJ Forward Party firmly believes that Mr. Signorello will provide the kind of leadership our state and nation need during these challenging times._ _‘Joseph Signorello is the leader New Jersey needs in the U.S. Senate,’ says Brian Varela, a leader of the NJ Forward Party. ‘His steadfast commitment to democracy reform and his pragmatic, results-oriented approach will be instrumental in advancing our state’s interests. We are proud to endorse Mr. Signorello and stand behind his vision for a brighter future."_ New Jerseyans of all political beliefs who are committed to building a just and bright future can call this movement home. We are incredibly grateful to have the support of the Forward Party as we continue growing our coalition of volunteers, organizations, and advocates across the state who are ready for change in Washington. [_**Help us keep up the work with a contribution of $33 before the end of April to make sure we stay on track:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62413909/403380651/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_27042023_FR_Actives_FWD-Party&amount=33&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ2NjgyZjUtMzFlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=009NGH0a42f-hJ19kkWJP6DDamNw6K8Kxd404SvYEbI=) [CHIP IN FOR JOE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62413910/403380659/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_27042023_FR_Actives_FWD-Party&amount=33&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ2NjgyZjUtMzFlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=009NGH0a42f-hJ19kkWJP6DDamNw6K8Kxd404SvYEbI=) Onward, **— Everyone on Team Signorello** |
* * *
_I'm Joe Signorello. I’m the Mayor of Roselle Park, New Jersey, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in 2024. Bob Menendez is an embarrassment to the people of the state of New Jersey, but for the last couple of years, we’ve had no other option – nobody’s been willing to step up to him. **I'm ready to get to work!**_ _Once we leave the corrupt politics of the past behind, we can move forward with progress and have a smart, efficient government with the ability to make positive change for everyone.**I need your support to build our grassroots movement — [so please chip in what you can right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62413911/403380660/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ2NjgyZjUtMzFlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=009NGH0a42f-hJ19kkWJP6DDamNw6K8Kxd404SvYEbI=)**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62413915/403380662/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ2NjgyZjUtMzFlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=009NGH0a42f-hJ19kkWJP6DDamNw6K8Kxd404SvYEbI=) Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in New Jersey and around the country. If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, please use [this link to unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qsataXLFGEWcjxevshYDeA2?unsubscribedata=v99m%2BClEb2%2Fdx3SV6Pi05C%2F%2Bg16TS4zuqI1NRJ9uK7qpo%2FqxwBmX0sAfxh9nqlTAR1LGI7g5spPA9tP1Cy2kd8gfyPK2Yj9OFpb1uHfLFHRs9fptF13EHBs13OPxMYhEdUBM8LlQW4onSpvR7%2FjmtSrOwImP0tJt%2FtNdicmNo54m%2BJUuRxFSvIYJPYWEmh3XwfnfBs1WW7U7EbJSr9Vj5W74JeyTm5V1nPbIcNrJG6mplb5b6L%2B6el9XxDD%2B1ia8HcuRIVtYVein0yH2GMdCcwEWJagES0rCRTuU%2BYY8b73Yap%2BtpUS3%2FOzIDsRJrWgvXLeIYwn1bJC%2B2k%2FLAeCoZMo5j2yXP1f9ckNW2leGKA2j8nHXu%2FKb6864aeYzZbKWcYXGW9uOwu499QIXxn55Z1Pp5W27v%2B9Evda%2BnVfYMIC7IK2CkJ5Az1NUSEhas%2Fi3) Paid for by Signorello for Senate

name: Jon Tester
subject: It’s planting season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
With some hard work and a little luck, we will set ourselves up for a good harvest.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62414379/403381884/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230427-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1NmRjOThmLTMzZTUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FbqmeXIykhXLCMJ77MYTFoa4eaVa2ZB32L5vK4s_KQI=)
---
Peter,

It’s planting season, and Sharla and I have been waiting for the snow to melt and the water to recede from some of our fields. In the meantime, we’re getting the equipment ready. You can plan as much as you want, but Mother Nature calls the shots.

I gotta tell ya, I love this time of year — sure, it is a bit stressful with all the work we have to get done. But getting my hands in the soil and running the tractor for 16 hours a day really grounds me. With some hard work and a little luck, we will set ourselves up for a good harvest.

**In fact, the work Sharla and I do on the farm is kind of like the campaign we’re running. Fundraising early helps plant the seeds of our campaign so that we can continue to grow our movement and, ultimately, come home with a successful harvest on Election Day.**

[_**So, here’s the part where I ask: Can I count on you to help us *sow the seeds* of our campaign by splitting a donation between me and Fight for Progress to help us reach our critical April goal? I’d really appreciate it.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62414380/403381885/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230427-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1NmRjOThmLTMzZTUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FbqmeXIykhXLCMJ77MYTFoa4eaVa2ZB32L5vK4s_KQI=)

Jon
