clean_body: With some hard work and a little luck, we will set ourselves up for a good harvest. | = Peter, It’s planting season, and Sharla and I have been waiting for the snow to melt and the water to recede from some of our fields. In the meantime, we’re getting the equipment ready. You can plan as much as you want, but Mother Nature calls the shots. I gotta tell ya, I love this time of year — sure, it is a bit stressful with all the work we have to get done. But getting my hands in the soil and running the tractor for 16 hours a day really grounds me. With some hard work and a little luck, we will set ourselves up for a good harvest. In fact, the work Sharla and I do on the farm is kind of like the campaign we’re running. Fundraising early helps plant the seeds of our campaign so that we can continue to grow our movement and, ultimately, come home with a successful harvest on Election Day. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = Farming allows me to take time to work in the open and quiet fields. It reminds me what’s important, and reaffirms my commitment to representing Montana. I’m not in this race to get rich. I’m running because I’m not done fighting for you and your family. National Republicans will spend tens of millions in shady dark money to try and stop us. But just like in planting, you reap what you sow. That’s why I care so much about building this campaign up from the grassroots. OK — I’m going to get back to the shop to work on my tractor, thanks for your support! The race to succeed Adam Schiff in CA-30 is shaping up to become one of the most competitive House races in the state -- if not the entire country.

Voters in our community will elect a new representative for the first time in two decades, which gives us a rare chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we need to see in Congress today.

**The good news is that Laura is setting the pace when it comes to attracting local support.** She’s received dozens of endorsements from progressive activists, elected officials, and local unions. We're also powered by hundreds of grassroots donations from across our community.

**But here's the concerning news: So far, our campaign has been out-raised by at least four other major candidates in this race.** That’s especially concerning because our April fundraising has been lagging a bit. We need to raise another $10,500 before the end of the month to get back on track.

clean_body: | = We'll be direct, team. The race to succeed Adam Schiff in CA-30 is shaping up to become one of the most competitive House races in the state -- if not the entire country. Voters in our community will elect a new representative for the first time in two decades, which gives us a rare chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we need to see in Congress today. The good news is that Laura is setting the pace when it comes to attracting local support. She’s received dozens of endorsements from progressive activists, elected officials, and local unions. We're also powered by hundreds of grassroots donations from across our community. But here's the concerning news: So far, our campaign has been out-raised by at least four other major candidates in this race. That’s especially concerning because our April fundraising has been lagging a bit. We need to raise another $10,500 before the end of the month to get back on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're confident that when voters hear more about Laura's experience and track record on important issues like abortion rights, climate change, and economic justice, we can win this race. But the truth is if we get outspent, it could drown out our message completely. We can’t let that happen, which is why this end-of-month fundraising push is so important. = Thanks for all you do, Team Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! clean_body: | Derek, As the end of the month approaches, I want to take a moment to thank you for your unwavering commitment to the Democratic Party in Virginia. Your support has been critical in our mission to build a brighter future Virginia. But we still have half the year to go, and much more to get done before November. Support from our grassroots foundation is critical in reaching our fundraising goals and keeping on track. Every dollar counts, and will go towards supporting Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = The stakes couldn't be higher. We have the opportunity to shape the future of Virginia and continue making progress on issues that matter to all of us. Whether it's expanding access to affordable healthcare, fighting for our environment, or ensuring equal rights for every Virginian. We can only achieve our goals by working together. = Thank you again for your support. Let's keep working together to build a better Virginia for all. Sincerely, Nick **********=******** ********=******** ** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. subject: re: 2024
body:
The 2024 election cycle is heating up quickly and it feels like everyone from President Biden to crazy Republicans like George Santos are announcing their campaigns for re-election. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62414823/403384188/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0MTk1NGItMzVlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yYtg9392-uMvey4hbp0r1L3OJ-xxPWQ_3SVTxlTrG84=) | Hi Peter, how have you been? The 2024 election cycle is heating up quickly and it feels like everyone from President Biden to crazy Republicans like George Santos are announcing their campaigns for re-election. So I thought this was a good time to give you a quick update on my race too. (If you can chip in to help us win one of the most competitive seats in the country, I’ll leave a link [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62414824/403384216/369747357?refcode=E21328-20230427-JoshUpdate-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0MTk1NGItMzVlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yYtg9392-uMvey4hbp0r1L3OJ-xxPWQ_3SVTxlTrG84=).) **My plans:** As you may already know, I decided not to run for the open Senate seat here in California because I believe that protecting my House seat is the most important thing I can do to defend our democracy. So I announced my campaign for re-election here in California’s 9th district earlier this year. **What’s been happening:** Since I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy listed me as one of his top 2 targets in the next election and our first GOP opponent jumped into the race. Since then, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has put out nearly a dozen attacks against me - the negative campaign has already begun! **How we’re planning to fight back:** We need to get ahead of the attack ads so my team advised we should launch our first digital ads of the cycle, both in English and Spanish. Our next end-of-month deadline is this Sunday and my goal is to raise $25,000 to put towards the ads. **Why I need help from this team:** I’m proud to still not accept a dime of corporate PAC money (though many of my colleagues have gone back on the pledge...). I don’t rely on corporate dollars to fund my campaign because I believe in the power of grassroots campaigning. I’m hoping you’ll consider helping us reach our end-of-month goal so we can fund the digital ads and keep this seat blue. clean_body: The 2024 election cycle is heating up quickly and it feels like everyone from President Biden to crazy Republicans like George Santos are announcing their campaigns for re-election. | = | Hi Peter, how have you been? The 2024 election cycle is heating up quickly and it feels like everyone from President Biden to crazy Republicans like George Santos are announcing their campaigns for re-election. So I thought this was a good time to give you a quick update on my race too. (If you can chip in to help us win one of the most competitive seats in the country, I’ll leave a link =.) My plans: As you may already know, I decided not to run for the open Senate seat here in California because I believe that protecting my House seat is the most important thing I can do to defend our democracy. So I announced my campaign for re-election here in California’s 9th district earlier this year. What’s been happening: Since I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy listed me as one of his top 2 targets in the next election and our first GOP opponent jumped into the race. Since then, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has put out nearly a dozen attacks against me - the negative campaign has already begun! How we’re planning to fight back: We need to get ahead of the attack ads so my team advised we should launch our first digital ads of the cycle, both in English and Spanish. Our next end-of-month deadline is this Sunday and my goal is to raise $25,000 to put towards the ads. Why I need help from this team: I’m proud to still not accept a dime of corporate PAC money (though many of my colleagues have gone back on the pledge...). I don’t rely on corporate dollars to fund my campaign because I believe in the power of grassroots campaigning. I’m hoping you’ll consider helping us reach our end-of-month goal so we can fund the digital ads and keep this seat blue. Here is a link if you can donate: = This could be the most important election of our lifetimes and I’m so incredibly thankful to have you on my team. We can do this! \- Josh

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz plotted to steal the 2020 election beforehand. Now that there’s a viable alternative, let’s kick him out of the Senate.
body:
Kick this traitor out of the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2948e84-94c1-423d-8341-1775dca8df9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_BREAKING:_ _We suspected it, but now have the recording. Ted Cruz plotted to steal the 2020 election beforehand._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2608f6e4-62c3-4eff-9f5e-7df21b739be0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_In addition to being a sleazy, cruel Senator who left Texans to freeze without power as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. MSNBC broke the story last night, with tapes of Cruz talking to conspiracy nut Maria Bartiromo about a plan to create a fake commission to steal the election from President Biden._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f302f12-f8da-49e8-b0f6-4703b4333095/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Cruz must be prosecuted. And we must kick him out of the Senate in 2024, when he's up for reelection in Texas--where he only beat Beto O'Rourke by 2.5% in 2018._** **_And we have just the person to do it. Dallas-area Rep. Colin Allred's preparing to run. Raised by a single mother, Allred played in the NFL, worked in the Obama Administration and, in a huge upset, knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018. He's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, and has a ton of charisma._** [**There's a candidate fund set up to go to Allred when he gets in the race. _Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fund Allred as he removes Ted Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T925b56f6-9cfc-418d-9a59-aab67a7adac3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us oust this despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. With our race already being called a __pure “toss up”__ by leading election forecasters, it is critical that our campaign finish every month stronger than the last. And to do that, I’m going to need this grassroots team with me every step of the way.

That’s why I’m reaching out. The end of April is only three days away, but our campaign is still running _$6,000 short_ of where we need to be.

clean_body: With our race already being called a pure “toss up” by leading election forecasters, it is critical that our campaign finish every month stronger than the last. And to do that, I’m going to need this grassroots team with me every step of the way. | = Hey team, it's Greg. With our race already being called a pure “toss up” by leading election forecasters, it is critical that our campaign finish every month stronger than the last. And to do that, I’m going to need this grassroots team with me every step of the way. That’s why I’m reaching out. The end of April is only three days away, but our campaign is still running $6,000 short of where we need to be. = | = Our campaign doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. I choose not to accept corporate PAC contributions because my sole priority is fighting for you and your family, not Big Pharma or the insurance lobby. We are a true people-powered campaign, funded only by hardworking folks like you who believe in a better future for our children and communities. But that means, when it comes to consequential fundraising deadlines like this one, I really need to rely on the support of this grassroots team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Appreciate you, Greg = | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. subject: Shad White discusses crime in Jackson. Come listen!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133016?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**State Auditor Shad White has taken a hard line on corruption and the mishandling of taxpayer dollars. **

White has highlighted some of the key issues that lead to the ongoing high homicide rate in Jackson, such as the epidemic of fatherlessness in the state.

On Thursday, Shad White will be talking about ways he believes Mississippi's criminal justice system can be improved – and I would love you to join us.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e77c073faa&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| **White will be joined by best-selling author Rafael Mangual. ****Tickets can be found [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e44456bb2c&e=5703353baa). **

Each ticket comes with a copy of Mangual's book, "Criminal (In)Justice." You don't want to miss out!

I hope to see you there!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d1dbcad55c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Best,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b593c500ce) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b593c500ce).

As one of the most competitive Districts in the country, we knew the fight to protect this seat would start early. But we’re committed to doing the work to keep Nikki in Congress as a bipartisan problem solver who is prioritizing people over politics, because she’s exactly who we need as our Representative.

In the few short months that Nikki’s been in Congress, she’s already delivered results for central and southern Illinois and continues to advocate for farmers, small businesses, and workers nationwide. With money set to flood this district sooner than later, we need to rally the resources now to keep Nikki’s focus on her work in Congress, not on a campaign.

[Nikki is a proven bipartisan leader who is working for us, not special interests. We need all hands on deck now to help us keep her in Congress – stand with us by giving $10 today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62416189/403390894/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230427Challenger_NHQ_5_TESTB_l2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRlMTRhYi0zOGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEy4NDhnnLeYEIEKaMalD0DBJTmlziZKbkXUNF-ah5k=)

– Nikki HQ
Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

clean_body: We need our team to show up right now = Team – Nikki’s first Republican opponent just filed to challenge her seat in 2024. We need our supporters to show up to bolster Nikki’s resources to keep a champion for working families in Congress today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = As one of the most competitive Districts in the country, we knew the fight to protect this seat would start early. But we’re committed to doing the work to keep Nikki in Congress as a bipartisan problem solver who is prioritizing people over politics, because she’s exactly who we need as our Representative. In the few short months that Nikki’s been in Congress, she’s already delivered results for central and southern Illinois and continues to advocate for farmers, small businesses, and workers nationwide. With money set to flood this district sooner than later, we need to rally the resources now to keep Nikki’s focus on her work in Congress, not on a campaign. = = – Nikki HQ Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. subject: The House just passed a dangerous resolution to increase support for Israel.

body:
More Democrats are aligning with Palestinian rights. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTve21rMmlrHnuH0L-bHl_jcLq8hIgdfY0mfTqtaoYrY6beSJ53H_pSqmyh6KA2UwDqZf-3jYzS-jKzj5ODxO3w8De66E58chmeTUSj5PSdL2cbT9DE-Xj6J_qjBbiGfh4P-FzVjp5lKEyraFMeiH_ZAYNPrZzmODALzSQo01W4tIEMF9NuYZdPSHT9PR5HxTWWwZ0nxQq37Wk-90XZghnjuC-aJbzoGm6rDnwY-pb3zWg/3vp/-diljsWwSW-rqkdd8s6mNQ/h0/Sb_DGBujQ6UPyoId1JD2KcnTlNV_qC3o6b2nBiZx6uE)

Friend, Yesterday, the U.S. House of Representatives passed a resolution to encourage deepening support for Israel and expanding the Abraham Accords, Trump-era agreements between Israel and Arab countries that ignore Palestinians and enable human rights abuses in the Middle East and Africa. Members of Congress who voted for the resolution noted that their votes were in honor of the 75th anniversary of Israel’s founding as a state. But they ignore the reality of how the state of Israel was founded 75 years ago: by killing and displacing two-thirds of the Indigenous Palestinian population, in a brutal campaign that Palestinians call the “Nakba,” or catastrophe. **We have to end U.S. military aid to Israel’s apartheid regime, not double down on uncritical support for Israel’s human rights abuses.** **The resolution’s bipartisan passage shows how far we still have to go in the struggle for Palestinian freedom. However, 18 Democrats opposed yesterday’s resolution—an increase that reflects a huge shift in U.S. public opinion in favor of Palestinian rights.** As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I know my advocacy in Congress disrupts the unjust status quo. I will continue to speak up until we achieve safety and justice for all. [**Will you donate $5 or more today to support our work to grow the U.S. movement for Palestinian liberation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjrmb0NObjSzB3nxiqUcYL8SOBq5Ms03E_ccvtFWHJ1edZkLpyox1CI0iSx-8DlJovz5Eq4ZkVyfoAF8JaJ7I1Gi8ZTpAYzBWdgXzNzLzGg7sTBAKMaZ6PY-Pu07lyfwF1Cj5hkXDu_MKRFjKUD2Udg5FqcerJBtfsDQrOCr5UHO-86rZMhjP4lsx7EEK7vOH-DokBk6pGyQ57N_k5JcE4xKw1XSrj9_Xo8tR-NPa0j4zcutI883wvzgs9KV4zEL8OmqNm06Dmn5I3ULmyyuiWT3eyUn-Um1lRYHYUxwOzBjPzwVl3WM2ZtDy7Fa-zQ06fKH75aM1i9c9IguNjlViIc-AX7ZjuogeMu8EH5Ypq5GlWbBWppdZ93_lg38Iqe1iC8RnSypknrbOuqdqnmlIrsKiePI2qy91EsNjmamJgnw/3vp/-diljsWwSW-rqkdd8s6mNQ/h1/WrsWmAc9zzFmH0bLTs19_RUn7u4q7qxIXp65ULXN9ls) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjrmb0NObjSzB3nxiqUcYL8SOBq5Ms03E_ccvtFWHJ1edZkLpyox1CI0iSx-8DlJpCXrplFX34o_fHgSfevTK1jwoqE8NPl5-CF-zTq5nEmmjoew_vpZ4ftIyRDWgrlLWNNVt2td-VM4nthTg86C8zJIsNCsShNFdz2AQfZh86zi4hzEs3XYBMNGNIJ4Qrt4dPbJMUjJiwlwkoxZzUGJ1PWSctBJaDCxq2ZOs3TZ5HbFRBYRX3gvLnJmvzMsvSjHXQSwHNivtC5gpzPaAuAfAbSMjfLnnXnEjCaghpZo4gkEjFda-BUrOLwMeIVI-v5Ky2g7v7MFiZZ1HgASK_ieTIYTlba3IjLAnKHxn09cTT4UW2ZLtDSynx5VPdvd-c6mERFMMK4sbU5Upui2nMwaDJnDlLprv2ffdz1BiVKLLoJg/3vp/-diljsWwSW-rqkdd8s6mNQ/h2/jK5ZUrPB1UjZVvRVzeFyAOzmVZh-W6UiaFp6ludt7NM)

Unfortunately, yesterday’s passage of House Resolution 311 signifies increasing anti-Palestinian far-right radicalization among Republican leaders. Unlike prior versions of this resolution, this Republican-drafted version fails to even mention Palestinians or attempts at “peace.”
Instead, the resolution encourages expanding the Abraham Accords, which were pushed by the Trump administration and signed in 2020 to establish ties between Israel and Arab countries. These deals further enable Israel’s impunity and U.S. weapons sales while undermining human rights.**One leader in the negotiations that led to the Accords even admitted that the intent was to marginalize Palestinians.** 1
As the top supporter of the Israeli military, the U.S. has the leverage needed to demand equal rights for Palestinians. It's our responsibility to keep pushing for change. U.S. taxpayer dollars fund Israel’s colonial regime that restricts basic resources and freedoms from Palestinians, in an ongoing attempt to erase an entire people.
**We must urgently grow our movement to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s ethnic cleansing, military occupation, and apartheid. And we need your support to do so.**

clean_body: More Democrats are aligning with Palestinian rights. | | | Friend, Yesterday, the U.S. House of Representatives passed a resolution to encourage deepening support for Israel and expanding the Abraham Accords, Trump-era agreements between Israel and Arab countries that ignore Palestinians and enable human rights abuses in the Middle East and Africa. Members of Congress who voted for the resolution noted that their votes were in honor of the 75th anniversary of Israel’s founding as a state. But they ignore the reality of how the state of Israel was founded 75 years ago: by killing and displacing two-thirds of the Indigenous Palestinian population, in a brutal campaign that Palestinians call the “Nakba,” or catastrophe. We have to end U.S. military aid to Israel’s apartheid regime, not double down on uncritical support for Israel’s human rights abuses. The resolution’s bipartisan passage shows how far we still have to go in the struggle for Palestinian freedom. However, 18 Democrats opposed yesterday’s resolution—an increase that reflects a huge shift in U.S. public opinion in favor of Palestinian rights. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I know my advocacy in Congress disrupts the unjust status quo. I will continue to speak up until we achieve safety and justice for all. | Unfortunately, yesterday’s passage of House Resolution 311 signifies increasing anti-Palestinian far-right radicalization among Republican leaders. Unlike prior versions of this resolution, this Republican-drafted version fails to even mention Palestinians or attempts at “peace.” Instead, the resolution encourages expanding the Abraham Accords, which were pushed by the Trump administration and signed in 2020 to establish ties between Israel and Arab countries. These deals further enable Israel’s impunity and U.S. weapons sales while undermining human rights.One leader in the negotiations that led to the Accords even admitted that the intent was to marginalize Palestinians. 1 As the top supporter of the Israeli military, the U.S. has the leverage needed to demand equal rights for Palestinians. It's our responsibility to keep pushing for change. U.S. taxpayer dollars fund Israel’s colonial regime that restricts basic resources and freedoms from Palestinians, in an ongoing attempt to erase an entire people. We must urgently grow our movement to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s ethnic cleansing, military occupation, and apartheid. And we need your support to do so. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. In solidarity, Rashida 1\. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
After the House passed the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act last week...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6a25428dc4b643cc88cc673c19745132&_e=43heilIMhkz-9oBElRv2nM9lUCfsKE74GzilfJRCPWHG4UeLi9vwT3aqnSPGxjVONBwCB649lwWWct8flHXcgQ3NbaGC0a3O4oGWa2c1IPDZf1mPd4WR7QGUYWY8HAe8ZxetWkNJbgz77_1_RvIeIZrWq3Y7JphU178VLgjgu-lm2zylW48VA0FVzQJyrbFl6tGLPaLTuQzWVO11buSy68Q8kUxzfmiffBBWicXAXs4ILkHQEm1xa2NM7JmwBdSFJBRSMWjvlai8_6g6XRV28-7ZEQyatRLxJhqeJpLGcrk2eyMSboY-muOzmwfL_Q8k0MxGuLt9Z75Oa-iIyIJVjXObzBBI3xsA37rQAGWNh5w8WKe7j71MqSYuXW9iZTFH)
---
| | Peter, we had a critical early victory last week **with the House passing the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act.** However, Chuck Schumer intends to obstruct it in the Senate and Biden has threatened a veto if it reaches his desk. Their attempt to force female athletes to compete against men threatens the physical safety and mental health of women and girls. It also diminishes their opportunities to earn scholarships, win championships, set records, and compete. We can’t allow them to deny our female athletes the right to fair and safe competition. **And it’s more important than ever to take a stand.** Separately, Biden just had the Department of Education introduce a new regulation to force schools to allow males in women’s K-12 athletics. This is a disastrous regulation, and our activists are submitting thousands of public comments to oppose it

We are fighting on multiple fronts—passing good laws at the state level and in Congress while also opposing bad regulations from Biden. It’s important to stand up and oppose the Left’s radical gender ideology. [**_I AGREE >>>_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6a25428dc4b643cc88cc673c19745132&_e=43heilIMhkz-9oBElRv2nM9lUCfsKE74GzilfJRCPWHG4UeLi9vwT3aqnSPGxjVONBwCB649lwWWct8flHXcgQ3NbaGC0a3O4oGWa2c1IPDZf1mPd4WR7QGUYWY8HAe8ZxetWkNJbgz77_1_RvIeIZrWq3Y7JphU178VLgjgu-lm2zylW48VA0FVzQJyrbFl6tGLPaLTuQzWVO11buSy68Q8kUxzfmiffBBWicXAXs5HR8mH1mBguS9aEt2N2tC75e6uQ_SbzIEXW9YYo1iuPLjE0JlID6JuTNQ6VpZ9yzirGDz3RI32E1w-FR8ruiITqPlTiG3zP5Y7TBpc--y8nKA6VJi5O6OdDCjhBQt1UlJhHLfuFn80ODUeqMwioMOe)
---
[**SAVE WOMEN'S SPORTS: RUSH IN NOW >>>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6a25428dc4b643cc88cc673c19745132&_e=43heilIMhkz-9oBElRv2nM9lUCfsKE74GzilfJRCPWHG4UeLi9vwT3aqnSPGxjVONBwCB649lwWWct8flHXcgQ3NbaGC0a3O4oGWa2c1IPDZf1mPd4WR7QGUYWY8HAe8ZxetWkNJbgz77_1_RvIeIZrWq3Y7JphU178VLgjgu-lm2zylW48VA0FVzQJyrbFl6tGLPaLTuQzWVO11buSy68Q8kUxzfmiffBBWicXAXs7_43ZO2xvXEzjniBSFVfgIrnYvH06x3_Juxe2YpPG3M5URaNcyOVoiFcFfPUynB7Hz9FWi9Vnngv7PWsqYdIylpIxWY17ocSA2Rd-jCpkHV0OIXZUIFQ1vg0fQr-h6Dm_FnxQNuKmrRXchyuGar3A7)

**Next steps >>>** Last year, Heritage Action successfully helped four states pass legislation to protect women’s sports and female athletes. clean_body: After the House passed the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act last week...| | | | | Peter, we had a critical early victory last week with the House passing the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act. However, Chuck Schumer intends to obstruct it in the Senate and Biden has threatened a veto if it reaches his desk. Their attempt to force female athletes to compete against men threatens the physical safety and mental health of women and girls. It also diminishes their opportunities to earn scholarships, win championships, set records, and compete. We can’t allow them to deny our female athletes the right to fair and safe competition. And it’s more important than ever to take a stand. Separately, Biden just had the Department of Education introduce a new regulation to force schools to allow males in women’s K-12 athletics. This is a disastrous regulation, and our activists are submitting thousands of public comments to oppose it We are fighting on multiple fronts—passing good laws at the state level and in Congress while also opposing bad regulations from Biden. It’s important to stand up and oppose the Left’s radical gender ideology. Next steps >>> Last year, Heritage Action successfully helped four states pass legislation to protect women’s sports and female athletes. But with Chuck Schumer and the Biden Administration planning to obstruct our efforts–we want to double down our state-level fight and push through more legislation in states like Missouri , Ohio, Texas, and Kansas. Peter, if Congress is unsuccessful at the federal level, our state legislatures are the last line of defense to protect women and girls in their communities. Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. Hey Peter,

**We’ll get right to it: Our grassroots fundraising has taken a major hit this month.** We are only [**three days away from our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62417871/403394277/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.27_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTEzMGU0ZS0zY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWOZMqWLa9FnZKjLxzogYkcoCUjMgmpZVPaw82XObMk=) but we’re still running **$5,000 behind** where we need to be.

If we fail to close our fundraising gap before the end of the month, we run the risk of needing to scale back our campaign operation. _And put simply: That could be detrimental._

[**Can we count on you to pitch in before the end of the month to help us close out April in the strongest position possible? On a grassroots team like ours, every dollar makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62417872/403394278/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.27_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTEzMGU0ZS0zY2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWOZMqWLa9FnZKjLxzogYkcoCUjMgmpZVPaw82XObMk=)

**Peter, here on Team Emilia, we’re no strangers to hyper-competitive elections.** So we know that staying on track with fundraising is absolutely essential to our path to victory next fall.

Especially with Washington Republicans gearing up to spend millions of dollars against Emilia, we can’t afford to waste a single second when it comes to building up the resources we need to fight back.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Debt ceiling negotiations, explained
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Last night House Republicans passed a bill which links raising the country's debt ceiling with spending cuts and policy changes.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21964%2E3422442%2E_aAbCV)
Derek,
Last night House Republicans passed a bill which **links** raising the country's debt ceiling with spending cuts and policy changes.
Here’s what you should know: The debt ceiling and future spending are **two separate things** that Congress has to deal with.
* **Raising the debt ceiling is about making sure our country can pay off bills we have already incurred.** Failing to do this could be disastrous for the economy.
* **Budget negotiations are about deciding what we will spend money on in the future.** Members of both parties should negotiate how to best use taxpayer dollars, and I believe every cent should be an investment in the future of our country. For example, expanding the Child Tax Credit is an _investment_ in our future workforce, and lowering the cost of insulin for everyone lowers what we spend on healthcare long term.

Kevin McCarthy and some of the most extreme in his party want to link these to hold the entire economy hostage in order to further an extremist agenda.
Their budget includes support for Big Oil and draconian cuts to just about everything—except defense spending.
Now, because we have a divided government, this bill won’t be signed into law in its current form. **[Can you add your name to our petition to show your support for a budget that invests in the future of our country?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_gop_budget_debt/?source=EMAG27_1_DEB_20230427_V1_F&akid=21964%2E3422442%2E_aAbCV)**
**[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_gop_budget_debt/?source=EMAG27_1_DEB_20230427_V1_F&akid=21964%2E3422442%2E_aAbCV)**
The budget that President Biden has proposed would do just that—from investments in affordable child care to increasing Pell Grants, it would invest in our future workforce while raising taxes on billionaires and large corporations.
**[Sign on to show your support.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_gop_budget_debt/?source=EMAG27_1_DEB_20230427_V1_F&akid=21964%2E3422442%2E_aAbCV)**
**[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_gop_budget_debt/?source=EMAG27_1_DEB_20230427_V1_F&akid=21964%2E3422442%2E_aAbCV)**
More soon,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG27_1_DEB_20230427_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21964_3422442__aAbCV&akid=21964%2E3422442%2E_aAbCV)**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: The most competitive open Senate race this cycle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=148%2E135344%2E9bWZbx)
Friend --
Today we wanted to break down some numbers on what this Senate race in Michigan means for the Senate map and our razor-thin majority.
Next year, 33 of the 100 seats in the Senate are up for election and 25 of them are held by Democrats or Independents who caucus with Democrats. Of those 25 only 2 are open seats where the incumbent is retiring and 1 of those 2 seats are us.
So, next year, we are going to be running in the most competitive open Senate race this cycle in a notorious swing state that could determine control of the Senate. But that’s not all. The number of Democratic women in the Senate has not increased in three election cycles. In fact, the all-time high of 17 Democratic women that we had in 2016 has dropped to 15. And with Senator Stabenow’s retirement, that number could drop even lower. If Elissa is elected to Senator Stabenow’s seat, she will keep that number from dropping AND she will be the youngest Democratic woman in the Senate!
In 2020, during the Presidential elections, outside groups spent almost $80 million in Michigan on television ads alone. And in 2018, outside groups spent more than $40 million, more than six times the total of outside spending in the previous Michigan Senate race.
So you can bet that this time around during both a Presidential and Senate election cycle that outside groups are going to pour even more millions into Michigan and into our race to try and take back this seat and the Senate majority.
That’s why we’re reaching out today. We need to be prepared for the flood of outside spending heading toward Michigan. Every dollar we can raise now will help us prepare to fight back against the attack ads and reach voters earlier and more often. So what do you say?
[**Will you chip in $3 today to help us prepare for the challenges that lie ahead in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr23.D7oXHw&refcode=em230427-1-60&t=2&akid=148%2E135344%2E9bWZbx)

clean_body: Friend -- Today we wanted to break down some numbers on what this Senate race in Michigan means for the Senate map and our razor-thin majority. Next year, 33 of the 100 seats in the Senate are up for election and 25 of them are held by Democrats or Independents who caucus with Democrats. Of those 25 only 2 are open seats where the incumbent is retiring and 1 of those 2 seats are us. So, next year, we are going to be running in the most competitive open Senate race this cycle in a notorious swing state that could determine control of the Senate. But that’s not all. The number of Democratic women in the Senate has not increased in three election cycles. In fact, the all-time high of 17 Democratic women that we had in 2016 has dropped to 15. And with Senator Stabenow’s retirement, that number could drop even lower. If Elissa is elected to Senator Stabenow’s seat, she will keep that number from dropping AND she will be the youngest Democratic woman in the Senate! In 2020, during the Presidential elections, outside groups spent almost $80 million in Michigan on television ads alone. And in 2018, outside groups spent more than $40 million, more than six times the total of outside spending in the previous Michigan Senate race. So you can bet that this time around during both a Presidential and Senate election cycle that outside groups are going to pour even more millions into Michigan and into our race to try and take back this seat and the Senate majority. That’s why we’re reaching out today. We need to be prepared for the flood of outside spending heading toward Michigan. Every dollar we can raise now will help us prepare to fight back against the attack ads and reach voters earlier and more often. So what do you say? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: The GOP wants to cut funding for veterans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Our veterans deserve better, and I will fight like hell to ensure Kevin McCarthy’s disastrous plan never comes to fruition.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419191/403398461/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.27_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJiOGFmNS0zZWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abQeG1ecWTWmJlezLs_qztnux_HvzlLp29mejYaCun4=) Derek, the radical Republicans in the House have gone too far once again: **This time they’re calling for an almost _$30 billion cut to veterans funding._**

That’s right, close to **$30 BILLION** in cuts to the VA and other veteran services.

That means millions fewer healthcare visits. It means a backlog of unprocessed claims, keeping veterans from accessing their hard-earned benefits. It means an understaffed VA. _It means failing the men and women who put their lives on the line for us._

As a veteran, this issue is deeply personal to me. But for all Americans, the idea of turning our backs on our veterans should be unconscionable.

**Derek, let me be clear: I’m sick and tired of right-wing politicians wrapping themselves in the American flag while they’re selling out the very people who risked their lives to defend the flag.**

**Our veterans deserve better, and I will fight like hell to ensure Kevin McCarthy’s disastrous plan never comes to fruition.[But the best way we can stop the radical right’s anti-American agenda is by taking back control of the House, and that starts by defending seats like mine. If there’s anything you can chip in today to help me win in 2024, it would be deeply appreciated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419192/403398462/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.27_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJiOGFmNS0zZWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abQeG1ecWTWmJlezLs_qztnux_HvzlLp29mejYaCun4=)**

Respectfully,

Chris Deluzio | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. name: Nick Melvoin
subject: There is no "common sense" way to talk about gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289

| | Peter – **There have been more than 170 mass shootings in the United States this year.** And after nearly every one, we learn that the attacker was armed with a military-grade weapon and high-capacity magazines. Those magazines, which can enable a shooter to fire up to 100 bullets in less than a minute, make these attacks more deadly. Those magazines are widely available with no background check, sometimes for as little as $8. That's outrageous, Peter. [**Will you sign my petition demanding that Congress finally stand up to the gun lobby and ban deadly high-capacity magazines?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419335/403398991/292794785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlhNDhhMzgtM2ZlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6EmZivdHLHeU72Op5d3peMvOdKkh1onf5ykzDW5wW0I=&emci=84b2e875-fae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d9a48a38-3fe5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059) For years, we've watched lawmakers try to engage the gun industry in conversation about common sense solutions. It hasn't worked. That's because:
1. **Gun manufacturers are not on our side.** They are not on our kids' side. They're not on our families' side. They've refused to take even the slightest responsibility for ending the bloodshed. They're on their own side, and their only concern is boosting their bottom line.

2. There's no "common sense" way to _talk_ about gun violence in the United States, Peter. **It's a crisis – and the only common sense reaction to a crisis that kills more than four children per day on average is**** _to act._** Our children's lives demand it.

When I get to Congress, I'll be ready to take on the NRA and the gun lobby and pass gun safety legislation on Day One _._ **[Add your name to tell Congress, "Take action! Ban high capacity magazines now."](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419336/403398992/292794785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlhNDhhMzgtM2ZlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6EmZivdHLHeU72Op5d3peMvOdKkh1onf5ykzDW5wW0I=&emci=84b2e875-fae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d9a48a38-3fe5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059) name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: My record fighting for workers and families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for.
| | |
---
Friend, as our race in Ohio heats up, I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for.
I've spent my life fighting for workers and families. That means advocating for raising the federal minimum wage, for stronger labor unions, for protecting the retirement benefits that folks have earned, and more.
I've stood up to big banks and corporate special interests who pad their pockets at the expense of families, because taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for Wall Street's risky bets.

I've fought for voting rights, which are under attack. When I served as Ohio Secretary of State, _The Washington Post_ called my voter registration efforts "the most intensive and wide-ranging in the nation."
**I want what most Americans want: to ensure our nation delivers on its promises. That's why I'm fighting for a country where hard work is rewarded and where _all people _are given the opportunity to live their version of the American dream.**
But right now, I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and _Politico_ __ says Ohio could decide Senate control. I simply cannot defend my seat and keep up this critical fight without your grassroots support. **Unlike my potential GOP opponents, I don't have my own multimillion-dollar fortune to pour into this race – so I'm counting on folks like you, friend: **
**[Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me win in Ohio, keep the Senate blue, and continue delivering for working families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419380/403399143/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk114-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE0OGEzOC0zZmU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUdonn-NceK-rCe66CtjbgaeQkVZmCPWbpf3_vJ6-YY=)**

clean_body: I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for. | | | Friend, as our race in Ohio heats up, I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for. I've spent my life fighting for workers and families. That means advocating for raising the federal minimum wage, for stronger labor unions, for protecting the retirement benefits that folks have earned, and more. I've stood up to big banks and corporate special interests who pad their pockets at the expense of families, because taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for Wall Street's risky bets. I've fought for voting rights, which are under attack. When I served as Ohio Secretary of State, The Washington Post called my voter registration efforts "the most intensive and wide-ranging in the nation." I want what most Americans want: to ensure our nation delivers on its promises. That's why I'm fighting for a country where hard work is rewarded and where all people are given the opportunity to live their version of the American dream. But right now, I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and Politico says Ohio could decide Senate control. I simply cannot defend my seat and keep up this critical fight without your grassroots support. Unlike my potential GOP opponents, I don't have my own multimillion-dollar fortune to pour into this race – so I'm counting on folks like you, friend: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = It's an honor to serve. I'm humbled to have your support. With gratitude, Sherrod Brown = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
| **Update:** To keep fighting for our reproductive rights, Team Sharice must fill a budget gap and raise another $9,500 before Sunday’s monthly budget deadline.

The Supreme Court temporarily ruled to keep Mifepristone on the market, but the attacks are only going to keep coming.

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/april23-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419641/403400132/1004362382?amount=20&contactdata=aPfAMeMvWX+scOfXIysWJ2CajGTSFtwiTpecto7q7Um3aVq+pLHjk52CRA4I10MNV4EhcUGCnF8D3W3oFnTq6ZMxMwXxtHg81Ub6QprsMbtkG0mfh4+04EUJHfXFGsu0eFQd42nRYWmYbKx6Z2hJXA==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230427_FR.eom.2.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2U1ZDk5ZS00MGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjDuWmQ3X2e80QiASz14cGAVDX7pZx7LvFGDBoJFW14=)**

**_Original Message >From Sharice:_**

Folks in Kansas and nationwide have shown time and time again that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for them, not work to increase their own political power or get on TV.

Kansans are facing droughts, high costs of living, and need a new Farm Bill passed into law. But what are my Republican colleagues in the House focused on? Attacking our reproductive rights, undercutting our climate law, and launching partisan political attacks.

It’s mind-boggling. That’s why we must take action now to ensure they’re voted out of power.

**[The first deadline since the Supreme Court listened to our voices and ruled (at least temporarily) in favor of the FDA’s approval of Mifepristone is Sunday at midnight. My team is behind on our goal and needs to raise $11,000 before then to keep organizing for victory. Can you help? **We’ve heard it loud and clear: People want their rights to be protected. But the attacks aren’t going away. The other side has made it clear that despite the majority of Americans supporting reproductive health care access, they will not stop until we have a nationwide abortion ban.**

We must remain vigilant to stop the worst from happening. It’s been exciting to see people across our state make their voices heard in every aspect of our society. You are responsible for our success in defeating August’s anti-choice ballot measure, winning reelection in November, and more.

But we can’t do it again unless we jumpstart our organizing efforts right away. Please help us win by chipping in $20 now:

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/april23-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419656/403400147/1004362382?amount=20&contactdata=aPfAMeMvWX+scOfXIysWJ2CajGTSFtwiTpecto7q7Um3aVq+pLHjk52CRA4I10MNV4EhcUGCnF8D3W3oFnTq6ZMxMwXxtHg81Ub6QprsMbtkG0mfh4+04EUJHfXFGsu0eFQd42nRYWmYbKx6Z2hJXA==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230427_FR.eom.2.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2U1ZDk5ZS00MGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjDuWmQ3X2e80QiASz14cGAVDX7pZx7LvFGDBoJFW14=)**

clean_body: | Update: To keep fighting for our reproductive rights, Team Sharice must fill a budget gap and raise another $9,500 before Sunday’s monthly budget deadline. The Supreme Court temporarily ruled to keep Mifepristone on the market, but the attacks are only going to keep coming. = — Team Sharice Original Message >From Sharice: Folks in Kansas and nationwide have shown time and time again that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for them, not work to increase their own political power or get on TV. Kansans are facing droughts, high costs of living, and need a new Farm Bill passed into law. But what are my Republican colleagues in the House focused on? Attacking our reproductive rights, undercutting our climate law, and launching partisan political attacks. It’s mind-boggling. That’s why we must take action now to ensure they’re voted out of power. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’ve heard it loud and clear: People want their rights to be protected. But the attacks aren’t going away. The other side has made it clear that despite the majority of Americans supporting reproductive health care access, they will not stop until we have a nationwide abortion ban. We must remain vigilant to stop the worst from happening. It’s been exciting to see people across our state make their voices heard in every aspect of our society. You are responsible for our success in defeating August’s anti-choice ballot measure, winning reelection in November, and more. But we can’t do it again unless we jumpstart our organizing efforts right away. Please help us win by chipping in $20 now: = Thank you, Sharice | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Team, here's one of the biggest reasons I decided to get involved with the Wexton campaign: **Jennifer is the type of leader who puts her principles first, even when the politics might be hard.**

I've forwarded her message about her recent vote against a GOP bill that would further the manufactured divisions about our public school curriculum. Jennifer's not going to stand by while Republicans try to use teachers and children as political pawns.

But we know that the far right is mobilized on this issue, and that they'll come after those who call them out. So we're pushing hard to meet our latest fundraising goal in the next three days.

[**We still need to raise $7,291. Will you chip in right now to help us close the gap?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62419663/403400185/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_L3&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU1ZDk5ZS00MGU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdN3cXx_Z7ybk58OT3zmvEirXLccye8-mbtBmrqdTXI=)

Thank you,

Sujan Sedhai
Political Director

> As the mother of two kids in public school, it's been infuriating these last couple of years to watch Republicans try to turn the classroom into a battleground for their extreme culture wars.

> I believe that hard-working teachers should not be demonized. I believe that we should be more worried about gun violence in our schools than history books that Fox News have deemed "controversial." **If the GOP wants to have a debate on which party is more focused on improving public education, then bring it on.**

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: blood clots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-april2023?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2023.04.27_B1_CharlesPetition_NS_RS_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-april2023?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2023.04.27_B1_CharlesPetition_NS_RS_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-april2023?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2023.04.27_B1_CharlesPetition_NS_RS_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-april2023?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2023.04.27_B1_CharlesPetition_NS_RS_logo]Hello.
Nearly a decade ago, I lost my husband, Charles Rochester, to sudden complications from blood clots that went to his heart and lungs.
He was a healthy man in his early 50s who kept a vegetarian diet and worked out every morning. One day, he ruptured his Achilles tendon playing basketball before a business meeting with his colleagues. A few weeks later, he passed away.
Why am I telling you this?
When I decided to step up and run for office for the very first time ever, it was on the anniversary of his passing.
I made that decision with the knowledge that I didn’t know how to run a campaign. I had never done it before.
Looking back on that first campaign in 2016, I realize I was in mourning. As I traveled up and down our state, people shared their stories of challenge and triumph with me. They inspired me and gave me the motivation to keep going.
I’m just as inspired by Delawareans today as I was then, and I’m so grateful for the hope and healing they unknowingly gave me. It’s why I plan to continue to be an advocate and a fighter.
The reality is that many deaths from blood clots are preventable. Because of my own experience and the countless stories I’ve heard on the campaign trail, I’m spearheading a bipartisan effort in Congress to raise awareness and recognize March as Deep Vein Thrombosis and Pulmonary Embolism Awareness Month.
It would mean so much to me if you could be a part of this effort. Will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/T237LVMs0EabR0SLIgiXcA2]
Thank you,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-april2023?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2023.04.27_B1_CharlesPetition_NS_RS_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

While traveling abroad to put on a foreign policy show as part of his illegal, shadow 2024 Presidential campaign in violation of both federal FEC laws, and Florida's Resign to Run Law, Governor Ron DeSantis took advantage of being in Israel on Thursday, April 27, 2023 to sign anti-free speech "hate crime" legislation, known as HB 269: Public Nuisances.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/30c10efc-151d-4cbc-97cc-7b80241442b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The bill claims to combat "anti-Semitism", but in reality, this bill threatens the rights of all Florida citizens. Watch this video to find out how you could possibly be charged with a Felony and be jailed up to 5 years in Florida for simply expressing your opinions by passing out leaflets, offending someone who falsely accuses you of being "racist", or by projecting images onto buildings as a form of protest.
Make no mistake. This law will certainly be abused to target political dissidents and conservative Americans with "hate crime" charges. It's unconstitutional. And we must hold Governor DeSantis accountable for his attack on Free Speech.

I’m reaching out with an important ask: = | = Our team is hard at work to defend against Republican attacks as the GOP wants to send our community and country in a far more radical direction. Protecting Abigail’s seat is vital in our mission to regain the House majority. With Republicans in charge, reproductive rights, access to the ballot, and more are all under threat– not to mention their plans to severely loosen gun control. Abigail stands up for a woman’s right to choose, everyone’s right to vote, and commonsense gun reform. She has been and will continue to be our community’s strong advocate. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Isa Djerassi Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: This is a long but important email. Will you read the whole message?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this email
will probably be a bit longer than others you receive today, but it’s
really important and I hope you’ll read the entire message.

Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers
and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

In 2018, when Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a
bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running
for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class
candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise.

Since January 2021, our fundraising has been in a slow but steady decline
and it really isn’t sustainable for us as an organization. Here’s a
screenshot from our actual ActBlue dashboard:

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we rely on supporters like
you to power our work.

Thank you so much for joining our movement and supporting our work to
recruit and elect more working-class champions like AOC, Cori Bush, and
Summer Lee. It means so much that you’re with us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134151?refcode=em20230427-28688&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=28688%2E1203867%2EFsjst9 ]→ Will you take the next step to support our work by making a
contribution to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-month fundraising goal?
Every single donation will make a real difference and I wouldn’t be asking
if it wasn’t important.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134151?refcode=em20230427-28688&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=28688%2E1203867%2EFsjst9 ]Contribute $3

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight
with you, thank you again.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=28688%2E1203867%2EFsjst9 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=28688%2E1203867%2EFsjst9 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230427-28688-footer&t=1025&refcode2=28688_1203867_Fsjst9&akid=28688%2E1203867%2EFsjst9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=28688%2E1203867%2EFsjst9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: Before the end of this week...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends: I know you’re busy, so I’ll be brief.

By now you know that Sam Liccardo is taking steps to run against me in this next election. For the first time in a long time, I have to really focus on raising funds for my own race. It's not what I want to be doing right now — and I hate asking for help for myself — but there's no getting around it right now.

We are quickly coming up against the month-end reporting deadline and still are a ways from where we need to be to stay on track. If you can contribute anything today or this weekend to help, it'll go a long way to get us that much closer. I'd be very grateful — and I promise to put it to good use. Here is the link if you choose to help: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-ms-apr23?source={% include_tmpl custom_fields.refcode %} [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-ms-apr23?source={% include_tmpl custom_fields.refcode %}]

Thanks for all you're doing.

— Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
Click here to unsubscribe. clean_body: April showers bring May flowers | Peter, have you ever heard the saying " April showers bring May flowers?" If that's the case, then we really need to start making it rain before it's too late. Sorry to be corny, but we've been going over JD's finances, and with less than a week remaining for JD's End-of-Month deadline, we're TERRIBLY BEHIND. $13,283.62 BEHIND TO BE EXACT Look, we 're not going to give you bad news without a plan of action; that's just not how our team operates. That's why we're reaching out to YOU today. We know you're a dedicated conservative who can help JD get over the top, and we're asking that you dig deep in your Patriotic Heart and give what you can before midnight to make a 10X IMPACT to help JD hit his CRUCIAL END-OF-MONTH FUNDRAISING GOAL! | Thank you for stepping up and helping JD Vance get over the top when he needs it most. Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. clean_body: | | | Peter, There’s nothing more exhilarating than the final moments before a mission. When I was a Navy Special Operations Officer, those were my last few seconds to prepare to push myself to the limit. Now, I’m counting down to a new kind of mission, and I need your help. Our end-of-month deadline is just THREE DAYS away, and it’s CRITICAL to complete our mission to UNLEASH American potential. Peter, we’re building up to something MAJOR at Unleash America PAC. Make no mistakes: our mission will CHANGE the future of American leadership. But we can’t make it if we don’t have our top team members giving 110%. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Big news, Peter.

**I’m proud to join Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Sen. Ed Markey, and others to reintroduce the Green New Deal.**
This historic bill would help our nation tackle the climate crisis, invest in renewable energy and infrastructure, and put millions of Americans to work in good-paying, union jobs. We can ensure that fossil fuel workers aren’t left behind, while we build a renewable energy future.
With temperatures rising, storms and flooding getting worse, and energy prices climbing, it’s never been more urgent to address this crisis. **[Can you help our team fight and deliver real legislation to tackle the climate crisis? We can’t allow Trump to put another Justice just like Clarence Thomas on the Supreme Court. [**_Will you rush a donation right now to defeat Donald Trump and ensure that Joe Biden appoints the next Supreme Court Justice?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62421710/403406168/710125701?refcode=20230427.2_PSD_4BB&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWU2OWIzNC00N2U1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fqWj_sbrVB12sNZzud55xjNPgmlQLeob2GD_qMna3g=)_

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_t=Y6WGmuOxOY5AAovRkvGU1OHPCiCCP6hPQ08l43J6XDemJNdBUS9gsAVxtC0Nkii85sHzCmhf5_2DKtv065kQ_3ROmicP7x7pm86eCnM9FT0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_t=Y6WGmuOxOY5AAovRkvGU1OHPCiCCP6hPQ08l43J6XDemJNdBUS9gsAVxtC0Nkii85sHzCmhf5_2DKtv065kQ_3ROmicP7x7pm86eCnM9FT0%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvzoevw0aw3nkcs_OdBUqBy6KWDXO7-pXPEh5lthJJdFQxMV9VzD5g0L3c1qDzsoqXr-EeylmvcYLzmuG4zSlu0hSCCi0UVGvjquIPzb5-O9Uqj3lklZixr9LYLQPIZMjmEGslo3oLd60aD1SXzXx0gc)
---
Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvz5Oa6w5unjrYBbNzgpawVzw9niJKnS-dS0YZS8CyT42ggTLFiJbRNmW6kqVKuD0AaEULF2tt4TVTyWHXMB5RE7HLhJ6TUaBjaKN9GC4lc87M9cKDuN5k0pv3z2B7CdFkmYpVUdR7MtroITvrzCxagS)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvxVe1ZMBwqKtxoqKNzd34t7ZMnbr8d3AJpJUdd16G2Gs5b-4lJ_4Vd-2loPUERZLquPxM4xc-3It5JrAsNnVzDq6bjrLwJkxbkcL-SYvOdzOnnHYcISXdS3FWVxub9yyR7U3NUUq78zArbS_a_GDXFB)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvzppCh5rqjBwF_rQsyemMmZCsti7aWY6d6KxUO-EZtzGWmjD1qPN78L-fK_P3Cg5U-KxjLy6-y9ph9NtJ05XL2p_i80mv18xJSyDSz_XmBFWaFHCVYNhK3H1o_EnFYA5WkVFkFn6v6WbDQmliTTxo7z)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvx0sge3C7-CrmE8kFKDTvKqdv_rOp5ttc1u8C4MqgoR-hdN8v0baLknHumGnlure9HKuZ2kOpwZtFNMv72B9-pQ0xWhPwQFdWZDTIjeAhDSjv6aKGOIiDpk9QkbOzFWSGO7w_yOOvsqVycQcxHxfKFL)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvyNnDEzZ31Y0tpssZjVOHsiYNlsYUMe2l8H3PsJo3n0wkpAY6hXDQX4Ifttb7npV5hAZ4x0ofJT169wgdSXH0UrLlHCuXIH41m7govnoQnZlOqD1ZqFD_fsyBZ2EmSf_5y5lSfx87zDTi29uaRxzwMw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvwqG1ihFrP9iCqzhi1tVv6-mEI4pAk921PLSQ9V5WnLhqXKnQNcYALds7VKaTX4a1WwL-st8_wX21dc3G9KBvORTHueWvihpWf3xNN1Yz2dUfwKHRqC302ceHyZEyQojyDF71hqkfpsR2Nk2Hdyilyn) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55ec75906e304f79ac4a1d2fac4e69b0&_e=J16yfAqfKLhPFhjidHplEjMTEwUYqcjQxEqUsAbuI4kxjtvzvbP7vxfVvsTrH9IFmAzwoUlHuekbjboF6CCoJIHscAW6g-ErIaJAZGtNHuZe36xsJPiRkkEA3NltAOR0RBu_z1tP5tFRW5USvKqWvqKzwaEJMHiAtfG6r6u0vvydDXShpaA3OTlGE_2Cuc3GropQ_TDBpYnlCbR4Rzr9JX_vv2of2loYZJQICvJlGrLgnNGEFr3FA630_DnqkXqNJdWVc6mXvSQ_L1A9B1DyBDGOUsLsLI9_2aTiHvWUxdo40hhaPqOq-6dLen1sgjQo)
