clean_body: This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| | | | Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk own more wealth
than the bottom 40% of Americans! This historically high wealth inequality
is eroding the foundation of American democracy, allowing billionaires to
buy political power and rig the rules in their favor.

With billions being spent to buy elections and political power,, we need
your help to fight back and build grassroots power to fight for working
families.

That's why we're releasing this new poster honoring Bernie’s work taking
on corporate power as Chairman of the Senate Health, Education, Labor, and
Pensions Committee!

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d40c27f1e9941f7b43a1c0486a83e38&_e=N7BTwrENoTP_rAxyTeAjiNO0dfenNQCtf86Uv3aOE6DmcTKo4bDPULd28BxETHkqEQCmHMtj23QRgAcDb3wc9V-DwBoIgZbopvg00Noq4xJ3iQV5hl9GQsP7h2wAKFYGLxIeivYKgMFU5YDM0e-jGmQq6b3hzZ1SG_Ib1KrzmA6vBf37hZjJyoaaGkq3CQdpVLlmfQd3QPQE2UW4oIlWVE16T8789UMCa6cbJ5CmCXeCt8BPlAEnlDQwzqvxDxb7d4UGeuXtysEQQq_hrSkeay3g-bZf4xmun4zpvbpYRRYzwvbBvoDBZmnUJxgQbIyUyr8DoxeMb-A-ruvjAEvpMZAIg5xGFmcwR1madHEoVOUwH4RKZz73UxxTAp0eBy2DcXEdOG3EdnimUOw21vPU4w%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d40c27f1e9941f7b43a1c0486a83e38&_e=N7BTwrENoTP_rAxyTeAjiNO0dfenNQCtf86Uv3aOE6DmcTKo4bDPULd28BxETHkqEQCmHMtj23QRgAcDb3wc9V-DwBoIgZbopvg00Noq4xJ3iQV5hl9GQsP7h2wAKFYGLxIeivYKgMFU5YDM0e-jGmQq6b3hzZ1SG_Ib1KrzmA6vBf37hZjJyoaaGkq3CQdpVLlmfQd3QPQE2UW4oIlWVE16T8789UMCa6cbJ5CmCXeCt8BPlAEnlDQwzqvxDxb7rwtiP2cM00lT8SYrtjQhrKGOcAzWZMjsUnSjvFEvnna4BzcR1L4W1SYtbQnRm6XGutXUN8CvBcdjVlfvX9j45xlEDY8-TzcRaQbZvnpVzEZoaq72zd61vrhraD-FQgDNRuuziS8zkln2qgasapgBMQ%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d40c27f1e9941f7b43a1c0486a83e38&_e=N7BTwrENoTP_rAxyTeAjiNO0dfenNQCtf86Uv3aOE6DmcTKo4bDPULd28BxETHkqEQCmHMtj23QRgAcDb3wc9V-DwBoIgZbopvg00Noq4xJ3iQV5hl9GQsP7h2wAKFYGLxIeivYKgMFU5YDM0e-jGmQq6b3hzZ1SG_Ib1KrzmA6vBf37hZjJyoaaGkq3CQdpVLlmfQd3QPQE2UW4oIlWVE16T8789UMCa6cbJ5CmCXeCt8BPlAEnlDQwzqvxDxb7qGm3pFlm7K468g0m_3SvDCkuzmGpN3cPKaRNt0UOavL-seN__dvejISyPvYk_C5Ncm_kIv2uoHcCS1U81ZEaoVv6W6GdmdG4OK2cEwsEhGwAkxkLb3XIrgskh_fr5zRe-0veN0DwiDw-DX0t1_Ws2Q%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d40c27f1e9941f7b43a1c0486a83e38&_e=N7BTwrENoTP_rAxyTeAjiNO0dfenNQCtf86Uv3aOE6DmcTKo4bDPULd28BxETHkqEQCmHMtj23QRgAcDb3wc9V-DwBoIgZbopvg00Noq4xJ3iQV5hl9GQsP7h2wAKFYGLxIeivYKgMFU5YDM0e-jGmQq6b3hzZ1SG_Ib1KrzmA6vBf37hZjJyoaaGkq3CQdpVLlmfQd3QPQE2UW4oIlWVE16T8789UMCa6cbJ5CmCXeCt8BPlAEnlDQwzqvxDxb71dLoJbEeNk9vINsrQSeNQBzHhxM0H83SuDqHFwzJrwk8zCtWbBsKSalxajRMR3bzTgVAnNFQ0U1UmccUKqvm80VRRiyRslx9E_3Bh2P_Uj-UWE_1niuFSHiwOGWUbOUtuwJBLDdJV3B5ClVQqUO5Bg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d40c27f1e9941f7b43a1c0486a83e38&_e=N7BTwrENoTP_rAxyTeAjiNO0dfenNQCtf86Uv3aOE6DmcTKo4bDPULd28BxETHkqEQCmHMtj23QRgAcDb3wc9V-DwBoIgZbopvg00Noq4xJ3iQV5hl9GQsP7h2wAKFYGLxIeivYKgMFU5YDM0e-jGmQq6b3hzZ1SG_Ib1KrzmA6vBf37hZjJyoaaGkq3CQdpVLlmfQd3QPQE2UW4oIlWVE16T8789UMCa6cbJ5CmCXeCt8BPlAEnlDQwzqvxDxb7CJIcyT2f51483t89o4KHoGOceBtdvya-76dLlTPOphWmIIBkVQozrFcdm8GLHgcNsBvrK5tGW4NUDNSezd1caacrPtqlJwlgYBpuJ-hA1AbvP5k5P_qnLhLWbFQPwAK4OcdYCbLDSn8xy7Xv4G6QZg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=9d40c27f1e9941f7b43a1c0486a83e38&_t=ZSIczADNwm2tA5PmrmTz-xwI6nkvjN9gYHGpq3a_G-4UF0WrMcZ7YqNZ-XfsKR_gKz7oEpV0m6yEToQGyRZOmuaTvVbHQkqHt4mGOfpIn3-aRvHRnrPXYvtDxYcarARhwi35wRLKLlnjQpPWCc7hWsih0J4KlRI-tiKUqrlafOs%3D)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
[dog pictures inside] **Peter, it's me, Winnie – First Dog of Kentucky!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62422160/403407568/833868747?refcode=em23_230427_dlin2_fnd_gq_act___w_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230427_dlin2_fnd_gq_act___w_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=27376a05-49e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzM3NmEwNS00OWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_tbENrucH_wiqSsNC5muQgi_Qv-8ce1J2ox2QnfcMs=) I have been working my paws off this year to help Andy! But today's my fourth birthday, and I'm taking the day OFF! I'm thinkin’ dog spa, a walk in the park, steak for dinner, and a longgg nap.

While I munch on birthday treats, Andy is facing a big reporting deadline on Monday — the last one before the primary! I want to make sure he's taken care of while I'm hanging out/relaxing, which is why for my birthday, I'm asking you to step up and help him.

clean_body: [dog pictures inside] Peter, it's me, Winnie – First Dog of Kentucky! = I have been working my paws off this year to help Andy! But today's my fourth birthday, and I'm taking the day OFF! I'm thinkin’ dog spa, a walk in the park, steak for dinner, and a longgg nap. While I munch on birthday treats, Andy is facing a big reporting deadline on Monday — the last one before the primary! I want to make sure he's taken care of while I'm hanging out/relaxing, which is why for my birthday, I'm asking you to step up and help him. = = It's not easy bein’ The First Dog. Lots of meeting and greeting, and so many rules about what I can and can't eat. But it's a big year, and I know how much Andy needs my skills and support around the office. He says that he needs you, too! So, for my fourth bday, I'm hoping he gets all the support he can! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Thanks :) Winnie 🐾 = | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

clean_body: At Stop Gun Violence PAC, we are re-energized in our fight to end gun violence after President Biden announced he is running for re-election this week. | = | = Peter, Our April deadline is only days away. = | = | = At Stop Gun Violence PAC, we are re-energized in our fight to end gun violence after President Biden announced he is running for re-election this week. In his term, he signed the most significant legislation to prevent gun violence in 30 years and has taken steps to reduce gun violence. But it’s clear we still have a long road ahead of us. Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can save lives. Peter, Here’s what’s stressing me out: in just a few days, everything that we’ve raised to make Brandon Presley the next governor of Mississippi is going to go public. Tate Reeves, reporters, and national pundits are all going to be watching to measure our strength. But our fundraising numbers are dropping dangerously low. Take a look at our last few days: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62425537/403410211/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhZmM3YjgtNGNlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-raxgfPV9RvWxgapCpeXT7vlAinXX8O2Imjm6hvddU=) [We’re in serious danger of falling behind if we aren’t able to reverse this trend and raise $52,000 before the end of the month. Can I count on you to help turn our numbers around by rushing $25 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62425540/403410213/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhZmM3YjgtNGNlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-raxgfPV9RvWxgapCpeXT7vlAinXX8O2Imjm6hvddU=) | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62425547/403410215/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhZmM3YjgtNGNlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-raxgfPV9RvWxgapCpeXT7vlAinXX8O2Imjm6hvddU=)**

I’ll be blunt: our campaign does not have as much money as Tate Reeves’ does. While he’s bankrolled by the lobbyists and good ole boys club in Jackson, this is a campaign for average Mississippians. Last month, our average online donation was just $31.
Everyone on our staff is so grateful for everything grassroots supporters have done to power our campaign already. There is still so much more left to do if we are going to win.
It all comes down to this: If we see a surge of donations right now, we will have the resources to engage voters, train volunteers, travel to every corner of the state, and push back against Tate Reeves’ lies.
[The stakes are high, Peter. Please, can you chip in right now? I hope you’ll be a part of the surge of donations we need to support Brandon from now until Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62425549/403410219/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.62afc7b8-4ce5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhZmM3YjgtNGNlNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-raxgfPV9RvWxgapCpeXT7vlAinXX8O2Imjm6hvddU=)
Thank you so much. I’m so grateful you’re in this fight with us.
Isaac Lampner
Finance Director, Brandon Presley for Mississippi

Thank you,
Team Keith
* * *
Team,
When right-wing special interests are working nonstop to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, it’s my job as the People’s Lawyer to have your back.
Doing this work has been the honor of my life, but it doesn’t come without its challenges – especially when those same interests have essentially endless sums of money to spend on attack ads against me.
It’s ok. I’m used to it. I’ve been a top target of the far right for decades, and my belief that true strength lies with people-power has only grown stronger over time. They might have the money, but we have the many.
That’s why I’m reaching out personally this morning. Our next end-of-month deadline is coming up on Sunday, and according to our records, we’re still missing your support this year.
The good news is that Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1, which means you can make a contribution right now and get up to $50 (or $100 for couples) fully refunded.

name: Team Caraveo
subject: Colorado is not up for grabs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, the GOP has made it clear that they’re coming after Yadira’s seat in Congress. But no matter how much dark money they throw at us, this will always be a grassroots campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62431137/403414716/-1931136343?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.27_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmYzYzhjZS01MWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-t9hXdvUyb-iO413fTieTEJIgCy9OHWIS3uHMTjIbAc=) Peter, the GOP has made it clear that they’re coming after Yadira’s seat in Congress. But no matter how much dark money they throw at us, this will always be a grassroots campaign. _That is Yadira’s commitment to you and her district._ **We have to let Republicans know that Colorado is not up for grabs, and that Yadira isn’t going anywhere.** **[That’s why she needs your help, Peter. | | **Team, 2023 is speeding by... we’re already at the end of April.**

Districts for Democracy was founded to hold elected officials and school board members accountable, recruit and support candidates committed to democratic values, and keep partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. Your support as we’ve started this initiative has been invaluable – the first candidates we’ve backed just won an overwhelming victory in Westfield, NJ, running against book bans and censorship. But we cannot afford to slow down now.

Every day we see attacks on our students and the freedom to learn and teach in our public schools. We’re on a mission to stop MAGA extremists from censoring what our children are taught about American history, civics, science, and human relationships. [Our fight is impossible without your support. We’re getting closer and closer to the school elections this November, and it’s more clear than _ever_ that these partisan culture wars on our children’s curriculum are part of a twisted, top-down political strategy.

Failure to remain diligent now will only accelerate MAGA extremists’ attempts at censorship, and allow their fear-mongering to spread further across the nation.

[So, what do you say? Will you chip in $10 today to ensure our team has the resources to finish this month stronger than ever and stop these partisan culture wars once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62431327/403414771/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230427_FR_EOM_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_EOM&refcode2=99938cf7-51e5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTkzOGNmNy01MWU1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CC2EwdiRFrSSF7yT2zlOJgwKr0x_OO2HbJ4UCYhBk8=)

* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

We’re on a mission to stop MAGA extremists from censoring what our children are taught about American history, civics, science, and human relationships. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’re getting closer and closer to the school elections this November, and it’s more clear than ever that these partisan culture wars on our children’s curriculum are part of a twisted, top-down political strategy. Failure to remain diligent now will only accelerate MAGA extremists’ attempts at censorship, and allow their fear-mongering to spread further across the nation. = | = — Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
subject: Tammy asked me to reach out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=227%2E35263%2EdgaRRJ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Dear Peter —

Tammy Baldwin asked me to reach out today to explain how we’re going to
keep up our winning streak here in Wisconsin. A few weeks ago, we sent
shockwaves around the country by electing progressive Judge Janet
Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court. This win is a big deal for
many reasons — but we’re not sitting back and relaxing now.

Next year, all eyes are going to be on Wisconsin once again.

With Tammy up for reelection and a presidential election going on,
Wisconsin is going to be the tipping point for control of the White House
AND the United States Senate.

I have a feeling that it won’t be long before Wisconsin Republicans start
entering the race to take on Tammy. After their narrow victory in last
year’s Senate race, they’ll be back with BIG money to spend to try to
defeat Tammy and win the Senate majority.

Peter, I know that Tammy has what it takes to win next year.
She’s delivered results for Wisconsinites and had our backs all this time.
But it’s going to take all of us to win this tough race, which is why I’m
asking:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=227%2E35263%2EdgaRRJ ]Can you pitch in $10 or any amount to Tammy’s reelection campaign
before her first monthly deadline this weekend? Let’s show her our support
today >>

donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230427_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=227%2E35263%2EdgaRRJ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

Tammy has worked tirelessly to champion the working class in the U.S.
Senate. From capping the price of insulin at $35 per month for seniors on
Medicare to expanding health care benefits for millions of veterans, Tammy
is delivering for Americans like us in the Senate. Plus, she’s leading the
fight in the Senate to restore reproductive health care rights for all
Americans — she is the strong leader we deserve in the U.S. Senate.

I know it might seem like Election Day is far away, but it’s going to be a
tough road ahead for Tammy.

Republicans spent $77 million on last year's election and elected Ron
Johnson by one point. Elections are won and lost here by small margins.

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Dear Peter — Tammy Baldwin asked me to reach out today to explain how we’re going to keep up our winning streak here in Wisconsin. A few weeks ago, we sent shockwaves around the country by electing progressive Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court. This win is a big deal for many reasons — but we’re not sitting back and relaxing now. Next year, all eyes are going to be on Wisconsin once again. With Tammy up for reelection and a presidential election going on, Wisconsin is going to be the tipping point for control of the White House AND the United States Senate. I have a feeling that it won’t be long before Wisconsin Republicans start entering the race to take on Tammy. After their narrow victory in last year’s Senate race, they’ll be back with BIG money to spend to try to defeat Tammy and win the Senate majority. Peter, I know that Tammy has what it takes to win next year. She’s delivered results for Wisconsinites and had our backs all this time. But it’s going to take all of us to win this tough race, which is why I’m asking: [ ]Can you pitch in $10 or any amount to Tammy’s reelection campaign before her first monthly deadline this weekend? Let’s show her our support today >> If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $25 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $50 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $250 NOW [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Tammy has worked tirelessly to champion the working class in the U.S. Senate. From capping the price of insulin at $35 per month for seniors on Medicare to expanding health care benefits for millions of veterans, Tammy is delivering for Americans like us in the Senate. Plus, she’s leading the fight in the Senate to restore reproductive health care rights for all Americans — she is the strong leader we deserve in the U.S. Senate. I know it might seem like Election Day is far away, but it’s going to be a tough road ahead for Tammy. Republicans spent $77 million on last year's election and elected Ron Johnson by one point. Elections are won and lost here by small margins. [ ]That’s why we need to give Tammy the early resources necessary to build a sustainable campaign for the months ahead. Can you chip in $10 or anything you can ahead of her first end-of-month deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $25 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $50 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $250 NOW [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Together, we’ve won big in Wisconsin before — and I know we can do it again to send Tammy back to the Senate. Thank you so much for your support. — Ben Wikler Chair, Democratic Party of Wisconsin P.O. Kim needs your help to flip this seat blue and build a better future for _everyone_ in CA-45.

But this won’t be easy: Our GOP opponent, Michelle Steel, raised **over $1 million** last quarter, __including thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from Marjorie Taylor Greene.__

**Marjorie Taylor Greene and far-right MAGA donors are all-in on keeping Michelle Steel in Congress.**

[Will you help us fight back by joining our campaign as an Official 2023 Team Nguyen Member? | **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.
